src: Welsh AMs worried about 'looking like muppets'
mt: AMs Welsh bimbang tentang 'terlihat seperti wayang'

src: There is consternation among some AMs at a suggestion their title should change to MWPs (Member of the Welsh Parliament).
mt: Ada kegelisahan di kalangan sesetengah Ahli Majlis (AM) mengenai cadangan untuk mengubah nama gelaran mereka kepada Ahli Majlis Cymru (MWP).

src: It has arisen because of plans to change the name of the assembly to the Welsh Parliament.
mt: Ia telah berlaku disebabkan oleh rancangan untuk mengubah nama Persidangan menjadi Parlimen Wales.

src: AMs across the political spectrum are worried it could invite ridicule.
mt: Para ahli jawatankuasa di seluruh spektrum politik bimbang ia mungkin mengundang ejekan.

src: One Labour AM said his group was concerned "it rhymes with Twp and Pwp."
mt: Seorang Ahli Parlimen Barisan Nasional berkata kumpulan beliau bimbang ia bersambung bunyi dengan Twp dan Pwp.

src: For readers outside of Wales: In Welsh twp means daft and pwp means poo.
mt: Bagi pembaca di luar Wales: Dalam bahasa Cymraeg, 'twp' bermaksud bodoh dan 'pwp' bermaksud cecair.

src: A Plaid AM said the group as a whole was "not happy" and has suggested alternatives.
mt: Seorang ahli AM bersalut berkata bahawa kumpulan secara keseluruhannya "tidak gembira" dan telah mencadangkan alternatif.

src: A Welsh Conservative said his group was "open minded" about the name change, but noted it was a short verbal hop from MWP to Muppet.
mt: Seorang Konservatif Wales berkata bahawa kumpulan mereka "terbuka minda" tentang perubahan nama itu, tetapi mengesahkan ia hanyalah lompatan lisan yang singkat daripada MWP kepada Muppet.

src: In this context The Welsh letter w is pronounced similarly to the Yorkshire English pronunciation of the letter u.
mt: Dalam konteks ini, huruf w dalam bahasa Welsh dilafazkan secara serupa dengan pelafalan huruf u dalam bahasa Inggeris Yorkshire.

src: The Assembly Commission, which is currently drafting legislation to introduce the name changes, said: "The final decision on any descriptors of what Assembly Members are called will of course be a matter for the members themselves."
mt: Komisyen Perhimpunan, yang sedang menyusun perundangan bagi memperkenalkan perubahan nama tersebut, berkata: "Keputusan akhir mengenai sebarang penerangan bagi apa yang dipanggil Ahli-ahli Perhimpunan itu pastinya adalah urusan sendiri ahli-ahli tersebut."

src: The Government of Wales Act 2017 gave the Welsh assembly the power to change its name.
mt: Akhund Wales Act 2017 telah memberikan kepada Jawatankuasa Wales kuasa untuk mengubah nama rasmi mereka.

src: In June, the Commission published the results of a public consultation on the proposals which found broad support for calling the assembly a Welsh Parliament.
mt: Pada bulan Jun, Jawatankuasa telah mengeluarkan hasil konsultasi awam mengenai cadangan tersebut, yang mendapat sokongan luas bagi penamaan sidang tersebut sebagai Parlimen Wales.

src: On the matter of the AMs' title, the Commission favoured Welsh Parliament Members or WMPs, but the MWP option received the most support in a public consultation.
mt: Berhubung tajuk Ahli Majlis, Commission lebih mengutamakan Ahli Parlimen Cymru atau WMP, tetapi pilihan MWP mendapat sokongan terbanyak dalam konsultasi awam.

src: AMs are apparently suggesting alternative options, but the struggle to reach consensus could be a headache for the Presiding Officer, Elin Jones, who is expected to submit draft legislation on the changes within weeks.
mt: Pengerusinya, Elin Jones, sedang dijangka mengemukakan cadangan perundangan awal mengenai perubahan tersebut dalam beberapa minggu akan datang, namun usaha mencapai persetujuan umum mungkin menjadi masalah yang menyukarkan.

src: The legislation on the reforms will include other changes to the way the assembly works, including rules on disqualification of AMs and the design of the committee system.
mt: Perundangan bagi reformasi itu akan merangkumi perubahan lain kepada cara jawatan beramal, termasuk peraturan mengenai pembatalan keanggotaan ahli jawatan dan reka sistem jawatankuasa.

src: AMs will get the final vote on the question of what they should be called when they debate the legislation.
mt: AM akan mendapat keputusan akhir mengenai apa nama yang mereka gunakan apabila mereka membincangkan perundangan tersebut.

src: Macedonians go to polls in referendum on changing country's name
mt: Warga Macedonia keluar mengundi dalam referendum untuk mengubah nama negara

src: Voters will vote Sunday on whether to change their country's name to the "Republic of North Macedonia."
mt: Pewarganegara akan memilih pada hari Ahad sama ada untuk menukar nama negara mereka kepada "Republik Macedonia Utara".

src: The popular vote was set up in a bid to resolve a decades-long dispute with neighboring Greece, which has its own province called Macedonia.
mt: Undian popular diadakan bagi menyelesaikan pertikaian berdekad-dekad dengan Greece yang bersebelahan, yang mempunyai sebuah negeri yang dinamakan Macedonia.

src: Athens has long insisted that its northern neighbor's name represents a claim on its territory and has repeatedly objected to its membership bids for the EU and NATO.
mt: Athen telah lama bersikeras bahawa nama jiran di utara mereka mewakili tuntutan ke atas teritori mereka dan secara berulang kali membantah cubaan penyertaan mereka ke dalam Kesatuan Eropah dan NATO.

src: Macedonian President Gjorge Ivanov, an opponent of the plebiscite on the name change, has said he will disregard the vote.
mt: Presiden Macedonia, Gjorge Ivanov, yang merupakan penentang plebiscite mengenai perubahan nama, telah menyatakan bahawa dia akan mengabaikan keputusan undian tersebut.

src: However, supporters of the referendum, including Prime Minister Zoran Zaev, argue that the name change is simply the price to pay to join the EU and NATO.
mt: Walau bagaimanapun, para pendukung referendum, termasuk Perdana Menteri Zoran Zaev, berhujah bahawa perubahan nama hanyalah harga yang perlu dibayar untuk menyertai Kesatuan Eropah dan NATO.

src: The Bells of St. Martin's Fall Silent as Churches in Harlem Struggle
mt: Gedang St. Martin's Berbunyi Sunyi Manakala Gereja-gereja di Harlem Terjajah

src: "Historically, the old people I've talked to say there was a bar and a church on every corner," Mr. Adams said.
mt: "Secara sejarah, orang-orang tua yang saya bual berkata bahawa setiap sudut mempunyai sebuah bar dan sebuah gereja," kata Pak Adams.

src: "Today, there's neither."
mt: "Hari ini, tiada apa-apa pun."

src: He said the disappearance of bars was understandable.
mt: Katanya, ketiadaan bar adalah sesuatu yang boleh difahami.

src: "People socialize in a different way" nowadays, he said.
mt: "Orang ramai bersosial dengan cara yang berbeza" pada masa ini, katanya.

src: "Bars are no longer neighborhood living rooms where people go on a regular basis."
mt: Bar bukan lagi ruang tamu kawasan perumahan yang dikunjungi secara berkala.

src: As for churches, he worries that the money from selling assets will not last as long as leaders expect it to, "and sooner or later they'll be right back where they started."
mt: Bagi gereja-gereja, dia bimbang bahawa wang hasil daripada penjualan aset tidak akan bertahan sepanjang jangkaan para pemimpin, "dan sooner or later mereka akan kembali ke tempat mereka bermula."

src: Churches, he added, could be replaced by apartment buildings with condominiums filled with the kind of people who will not help the neighborhood's remaining sanctuaries.
mt: Gereja-gereja, tambahnya, boleh digantikan dengan bangunan kediaman yang dipenuhi kondominium oleh sebilangan orang yang tidak akan membantu tempat-tempat suci yang tinggal dalam lingkungan tersebut.

src: "The overwhelming majority of people who buy condominiums in these buildings will be white," he said, "and therefore will hasten the day that these churches close altogether because it is unlikely that most of these people who move into these condominiums will become members of these churches."
mt: "Sehinggalanya, kebanyakan orang yang membeli kondominium di bangunan-bangunan ini akan menjadi berkulit putih," katanya, "dan oleh itu, mereka akan mempercepatkan hari penutupan penuh gereja-gereja ini kerana tidak mungkin kebanyakan orang yang berpindah ke kondominium-kondominium ini akan menjadi ahli gereja-gereja tersebut."

src: Both churches were built by white congregations before Harlem became a black metropolis - Metropolitan Community in 1870, St. Martin's a decade later.
mt: Kedua-dua gereja itu dibina oleh jemaat berkulit putih sebelum Harlem menjadi pusat bandar bagi komuniti berkulit hitam — Metropolitan Community pada tahun 1870, dan St. Martin's pada satu dekad kemudian.

src: The original white Methodist congregation moved out in the 1930s.
mt: Jemaat Methodist putih asal berpindah pada tahun 1930-an.

src: A black congregation that had been worshiping nearby took title to the building.
mt: Sebuah jemaat berwarna hitam yang telah beribadat berhampiran mengambil alih bangunan tersebut.

src: St. Martin's was taken over by a black congregation under the Rev. John Howard Johnson, who led a boycott of retailers on 125th Street, a main street for shopping in Harlem, who resisted hiring or promoting blacks.
mt: St. Martin's telah diambil alih oleh satu jemaat kulit hitam di bawah kepimpinan Rev. John Howard Johnson, yang mengetuai boikot terhadap peniaga-peniaga di Jalan 125, sebuah jalan utama untuk membeli-belah di Harlem, yang enggan mempekerjakan atau mempromosikan orang kulit hitam.

src: A fire in 1939 left the building badly damaged, but as Father Johnson's parishioners made plans to rebuild, they commissioned the carillon.
mt: Sebuah kebakaran pada tahun 1939 telah memusnahkan bangunan tersebut, namun apabila umat parish Father Johnson merancang untuk membina semula, mereka memeterai carillon.

src: The Rev. David Johnson, Father Johnson's son and successor at St. Martin's, proudly called the carillon "the poor people's bells."
mt: Rakan Sejarawan David Johnson, anak dan penerus Bapa Johnson di St. Martin's, dengan bangga menamakan karillon itu sebagai "pembelahan bagi orang miskin."

src: The expert who played the carillon in July called it something else: "A cultural treasure" and "an irreplaceable historical instrument."
mt: Ahli yang memainkan karil pada Julai itu memanggilnya dengan nama lain: "sebuah harta budaya" dan "sebuah instrumen sejarah yang tidak boleh digantikan."

src: The expert, Tiffany Ng of the University of Michigan, also noted that it was the first carillon in the world to be played by a black musician, Dionisio A. Lind, who moved to the larger carillon at the Riverside Church 18 years ago.
mt: Ahli itu, Tiffany Ng dari Universiti Michigan, juga mencatatkan bahawa ia merupakan carillon pertama di dunia yang dimainkan oleh seorang muzikus berkulit hitam, Dionisio A. Lind, yang berpindah ke carillon besar di Gereja Riverside 18 tahun lalu.

src: Mr. Merriweather said that St. Martin's did not replace him.
mt: Tuan Merriweather berkata bahawa St. Martin's tidak menggantikan beliau.

src: What has played out at St. Martin's over the last few months has been a complicated tale of architects and contractors, some brought in by the lay leaders of the church, others by the Episcopal diocese.
mt: Apa yang berlaku di St. Martin's dalam beberapa bulan lepas adalah sebuah kisah rumit mengenai arkitek dan kontraktor, sebahagian dibawa masuk oleh pemimpin awam gereja, manakala sebahagian lagi oleh diosesis Episkopal.

src: The vestry - the parish's governing body, made up of lay leaders - wrote the diocese in July with concerns that the diocese "would seek to pass along the costs" to the vestry, even though the vestry had not been involved in hiring the architects and contractors the diocese sent in.
mt: Pangurus gereja - badan pentadbiran paroki yang terdiri daripada pemimpin awam - menulis keuskupan pada bulan Julai dengan bimbang bahawa keuskupan akan cuba "memindahkan kos" kepada pangurus gereja, walaupun pangurus gereja tidak dilibatkan dalam memilih arkitek dan kontraktor yang dihantar oleh keuskupan.

src: Some parishioners complained of a lack of transparency on the diocese's part.
mt: Sebilangan umat gereja mengadu mengenai ketiadaan ketelusan pihak eparki.

src: Shark injures 13-year-old on lobster dive in California
mt: Hantu Laut Merugikan Remaja 13 Tahun semasa Aktiviti Memancing Lobster di California

src: A shark attacked and injured a 13-year-old boy Saturday while he was diving for lobster in California on the opening day of lobster season, officials said.
mt: Ahli-ahli berkata, seorang budak lelaki berumur 13 tahun diserang dan cedera oleh seekor lumba-lumba pada hari Sabtu semasa beliau sedang menyelam mencari udang karang di California pada hari pembukaan musim penangkapan udang karang.

src: The attack occurred just before 7 a.m. near Beacon's Beach in Encinitas.
mt: Serangan itu berlaku kira-kira pukul 7 pagi berhampiran Beach Beacon di Encinitas.

src: Chad Hammel told KSWB-TV in San Diego he had been diving with friends for about half an hour Saturday morning when he heard the boy screaming for help and then paddled over with a group to help pull him out of the water.
mt: Chad Hammel memberitahu KSWB-TV di San Diego bahawa dia telah berenang bersama rakan-rakannya selama kira-kira setengah jam pada pagi Sabtu apabila dia terdengar seorang budak berteriak minta tolong dan kemudian berselancar ke situ bersama kumpulan untuk membantu menariknya keluar dari air.

src: Hammel said at first he thought it was just excitement of catching a lobster, but then he "realized that he was yelling, 'I got bit!
mt: Hammel berkata pada mulanya dia hanya berfikir itu adalah kegembiraan memancing ikan lobster, tetapi kemudian dia "sedar bahawa dia sedang berseru, 'Saya digigit!'

src: I got bit!'
mt: 'Saya digigit!'

src: His whole clavicle was ripped open," Hammel said he noticed once he got to the boy.
mt: "Seluruh tulang selangkangnya telah koyak," kata Hammel ketika dia sampai ke situ.

src: "I yelled at everyone to get out of the water: 'There's a shark in the water!'" Hammel added.
mt: "Hammel tambah, saya menjerit pada semua orang supaya keluar dari air: 'Ada ikan paus di dalam air!'"

src: The boy was airlifted to Rady Children's Hospital in San Diego where he is listed in critical condition.
mt: Budak lelaki itu telah diterbangkan ke Hospital Kanak-kanak Rady di San Diego di mana beliau berada dalam keadaan kritikal.

src: The species of shark responsible for the attack was unknown.
mt: Spesies hiu yang bertanggungjawab terhadap serangan itu tidak diketahui.

src: Lifeguard Capt. Larry Giles said at a media briefing that a shark had been spotted in the area a few weeks earlier, but it was determined not to be a dangerous species of shark.
mt:
Ketua Penjaga Pantai, Kapten Larry Giles, berkata dalam satu sidang media bahawa seekor ikan paus telah dikesan di kawasan tersebut beberapa minggu yang lalu, tetapi ia telah ditentukan bukan merupakan spesies paus yang berbahaya.

Note: There appears to be a factual error in the source text ("shark" was translated as "ikan paus" which is whale). The correct translation for "shark" is "ikan paus" is incorrect; it should be "ikan pari". Let me provide the accurate translation:

Ketua Penjaga Pantai, Kapten Larry Giles, berkata dalam satu sidang media bahawa seekor ikan pari telah dikesan di kawasan tersebut beberapa minggu yang lalu, tetapi ia telah ditentukan bukan merupakan spesies ikan pari yang berbahaya.

src: Giles added the victim sustained traumatic injuries to his upper torso area.
mt: Giles menambah bahawa mangsa cedera parah di bahagian dada atas.

src: Officials shut down beach access from Ponto Beach in Casablad to Swami's in Ecinitas for 48 hours for investigation and safety purposes.
mt: Rasuah telah menutup akses ke pantai dari Ponto Beach di Casablad hingga ke Swami's di Ecinitas selama 48 jam bagi tujuan penyiasatan dan keselamatan.

src: Giles noted that there are more than 135 shark species in the area, but most are not considered dangerous.
mt: Giles berpendapat bahawa terdapat lebih daripada 135 spesies haiwan paus biru di kawasan tersebut, namun kebanyakan daripadanya tidak dianggap berbahaya.

src: Sainsbury's plans push into UK beauty market
mt: Rancangan Sainsbury's untuk menyerbu pasaran kosmetik UK

src: Sainsbury's is taking on Boots, Superdrug and Debenhams with department store-style beauty aisles staffed with specialist assistants.
mt: Sainsbury's sedang menandingi Boots, Superdrug dan Debenhams dengan lorong kecantikan bergaya kedai perhiasan yang diselia oleh pegawai khas.

src: As part of a substantial push into the UK's £2.8bn beauty market, which is continuing to grow while fashion and homeware sales fall back, the larger beauty aisles will be tested out in 11 stores around the country and taken to more stores next year if it proves a success.
mt: Sebagai sebahagian daripada usaha besar untuk menembusi pasaran kecantikan UK bernilai £2.8 bilion, yang terus berkembang manakala jualan fesyen dan barang rumah tangga sedang merosot, lorong-lorong kosmetik yang lebih besar akan diuji dalam 11 kedai di seluruh negara dan diperluas ke lebih banyak kedai pada tahun hadapan jika ia terbukti berjaya.

src: The investment in beauty comes as supermarkets hunt for ways to use up shelf space once sued for TVs, microwaves and homeware.
mt: Pelaburan dalam kecantikan ini berlaku apabila superмаркеты berusaha mencari cara untuk menggunakan ruang rak yang sebelum ini dipertikaikan kerana mengandungi televisyen, ketuhar mikrowave, dan peralatan rumah.

src: Sainsbury's said it would be doubling the size of its beauty offering to up to 3,000 products, including brands such as Revlon, Essie, Tweezerman and Dr. PawPaw for the first time.
mt: Sainsbury's mengumumkan bahawa ia akan mendoorkan sajen penawaran kecantikan sehingga 3,000 produk, termasuk jenama seperti Revlon, Essie, Tweezerman dan Dr. PawPaw untuk pertama kalinya.

src: Existing ranges from L'Oreal, Maybelline and Burt's Bees will also get more space with branded areas similar to those found in shops like Boots.
mt: Berjenama sedia ada daripada L'Oreal, Maybelline dan Burt's Bees juga akan diberikan lebih ruang dengan kawasan berjenama yang serupa dengan yang terdapat di kedai-kedai seperti Boots.

src: The supermarket is also relaunching its Boutique makeup range so that the majority of products are vegan-friendly - something increasingly demanded by younger shoppers.
mt: Rangsangan produk semulajadi jenama butik di runcit juga akan dilancarkan semula bagi memastikan sebahagian besar produknya mesra vegan – sesuatu yang semakin dituntut oleh pembeli muda.

src: In addition, perfume retailer the Fragrance Shop will be testing out concessions in two Sainsbury's stores, the first of which opened in Croydon, south London, last week while a second opens in Selly Oak, Birmingham, later this year.
mt: Selain itu, pengejut wewangian, The Fragrance Shop, akan menguji konsep concession di dua kedai Sainsbury's, dengan yang pertama dibuka di Croydon, London Selatan, minggu lepas manakala yang kedua akan dibuka di Selly Oak, Birmingham, pada akhir tahun ini.

src: Online shopping and a shift towards buying small amounts of food daily at local convenience stores means supermarkets are having to do more to persuade people to visit.
mt: Belian dalam talian dan peralihan kepada pembelian jumlah makanan kecil setiap hari di kedai-kedai serba ada tempatan bermakna kedai-kedai runcit mesti membuat usaha lebih untuk meyakinkan orang ramai untuk melawat.

src: Mike Coupe, the chief executive of Sainsbury's, has said the outlets will look increasingly like department stores as the supermarket chain tries to fight back against the discounters Aldi and Lidl with more services and non-food.
mt: Mike Coupe, Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif Sainsbury's, berkata syarikat tersebut akan cuba memperjuangkan diri menentang peniaga murah seperti Aldi dan Lidl dengan menawarkan lebih banyak perkhidmatan dan barangan bukan makanan, menjadikanOutlet Outlet mereka semakin menyerupai pusat beli-belah.

src: Sainsbury's has been putting Argos outlets in hundreds of stores and has also introduced a number of Habitats since it bought both chains two years ago, which it says has bolstered grocery sales and made the acquisitions more profitable.
mt: Sainsbury's telah memasukkanOutlet-Outlet Argos ke dalam ratusan kedai dan juga memperkenalkan sejumlah kedai Habitats sejak ia membeli kedua-dua rangkaian tersebut dua tahun lepas, menurutnya ia telah meningkatkan jualan makanan dan menjadikan pengambilalihan itu lebih menguntungkan.

src: The supermarket's previous attempt to revamp its beauty and pharmacy departments ended in failure.
mt: Cubaan supermarket itu untuk merombak semula jabatan kecantikan dan farmasi berakhir dengan kegagalan.

src: Sainsbury's tested a joint venture with Boots in the early 2000s, but the tie-up ended after a row over how to split the revenues from the chemist's stores in its supermarkets.
mt: Sainsbury's pernah mencuba rancangan kongsi bersama Boots pada awal 2000-an, tetapi kerjasama itu berakhir selepas berlaku pertengkaran mengenai cara membahagikan pendapatan daripada kaunter farmasi yang ada di dalam kedai runcit mereka.

src: The new strategy comes after Sainsbury's sold its 281-store pharmacy business to Celesio, the owner of the Lloyds Pharmacy chain, for £125m, three years ago.
mt: Strategi baharu ini dilancarkan selepas Sainsbury's menjual perniagaan farmasi berkuat kuasa dengan 281 cawangan kepada Celesio, pemilik rangkaian farmasi Lloyds, pada nilai £125 juta tiga tahun lalu.

src: It said Lloyds would play a role in the plan, by adding an extended range of luxury skincare brands including La Roche-Posay and Vichy in four stores.
mt: Lembaga itu berkata Lloyds akan memainkan peranan dalam pelan itu dengan menambah julat jenama penjagaan kulit mewah yang lebih luas, termasuk La Roche-Posay dan Vichy, di empat kedai.

src: Paul Mills-Hicks, Sainsbury's commercial director, said: "We've transformed the look and feel of our beauty aisles to enhance the environment for our customers.
mt: Paul Mills-Hicks, pengarah komersial Sainsbury's, berkata: "Kita telah mengubahsuai penampilan dan suasana lorong produk kecantikan kami untuk meningkatkan persekitaran bagi pelanggan kami."

src: We've also invested in specially trained colleagues who will be on hand to offer advice.
mt: Kami juga telah melabur dalam rakan sekerja yang telah dilatih khas untuk memberikan nasihat.

src: Our range of brands is designed to suit every need and the alluring environment and convenient locations mean we're now a compelling beauty destination which challenges the old way of shopping."
mt: Kedai-kedai jenama kami direka untuk memenuhi pelbagai keperluan, dan persekitaran yang memikat serta lokasi yang mudah diakses menjadikan kami destinasi kecantikan yang menarik yang menantang cara berbelanja lama.

src: Peter Jones 'furious' after Holly Willoughby pulls out of £11million deal
mt: Peter Jones "marah" selepas Holly Willoughby menarik diri daripada tawaran bernilai £11 juta

src: Dragons Den star Peter Jones left 'furious' after TV presenter Holly Willoughby pulls out of £11million deal with his lifestyle brand business to focus on her new contracts with Marks and Spencer and ITV
mt: Raja Naga Peter Jones meninggalkan "marah" selepas penyaji televisyen Holly Willoughby membatalkan kesepakatan bernilai £11 juta dengan syarikat jenama gaya hidupnya untuk memberi tumpuan kepada kontrak baharu beliau dengan Marks and Spencer serta ITV.

src: Willoughby has no time for their homewear and accessories brand Truly.
mt: Willoughby tidak mempunyai masa untuk jenama pakaian dalam rumah dan aksesori mereka yang bernama Truly.

src: The pair's business had been likened to Gwyneth Paltrow's Goop brand.
mt: Usaha pasangan itu telah disamakan dengan jenama Goop milik Gwyneth Paltrow.

src: This Morning presenter, 37, took to Instagram to announce she is leaving.
mt: Presenter Pagi, 37, telah mengumumkan di Instagram bahawa beliau akan bersara.

src: Holly Willoughby has left Dragons" Den star Peter Jones fuming by pulling out of their lucrative lifestyle brand business at the last minute - to focus on her own new bumper contracts with Marks & Spencer and ITV.
mt: Holly Willoughby telah meninggalkan rakan Dragons' Den, Peter Jones, dalam keadaan marah dengan membatalkan perniagaan jenama gaya hidup yang menguntungkan mereka pada ketika terakhir, untuk memberi tumpuan kepada kontrak baharu yang besar dengan Marks & Spencer dan ITV.

src: Sources say Jones was "furious" when TV's golden girl admitted during a tense meeting on Tuesday at the headquarters of his business empire in Marlow, Buckinghamshire, that her new deals - worth up to £1.5 million - meant she no longer had enough time to devote to their homewear and accessories brand Truly.
mt: Sumber melaporkan bahawa Jones marah apabila gadis emas televisyen itu mengakui semasa pertemuan yang tegang pada hari Selasa di ibu perniagaan empayarnya di Marlow, Buckinghamshire, bahawa tawaran baharu beliau bernilai sehingga £1.5 juta bermaksud dia tidak lagi mempunyai cukup masa untuk mendedikannya kepada jenama pakaian rumah dan aksesori Truly mereka.

src: The business had been likened to Gwyneth Paltrow's Goop brand and was tipped to double Willoughby's estimated £11 million fortune.
mt: Usahasannya telah dibandingkan dengan jenama Goop milik Gwyneth Paltrow dan dijangka menggandakan kekayaan Willoughby yang dikira mencecah £11 juta.

src: As Willoughby, 37, took to Instagram to announce she was leaving Truly, Jones jetted out of Britain to head for one of his holiday homes.
mt: Sebagai Willoughby, 37, yang memuji perpisahan di Instagram daripada Truly, Jones terbang keluar dari Britain menuju ke salah satu rumah percutian beliau.

src: A source said: "Truly was by far the top of Holly's priorities.
mt: Satu sumber berkata: "Sungguhpun benar-benar menjadi teratas dalam keutamaan Holly."

src: It was going to be her long-term future that would see her through the next couple of decades.
mt: Masa depan jangka panjangnya ialah yang akan membawanya melalui dua dekad akan datang.

src: Her decision to pull out left everyone involved absolutely stunned.
mt: Keputusannya untuk menarik diri telah meninggalkan semua orang yang terlibat benar-benar terkejut.

src: Nobody could believe what was happening on Tuesday, it was so close to the launch.
mt: Tiada seorang pun yang percaya dengan apa yang berlaku pada hari Selasa kerana ia begitu hampir dengan pelancaran.

src: There is a warehouse full of goods at the Marlow HQ which are ready to be sold."
mt: Ada sebuah gudang penuh dengan barang di Markas Besar Marlow yang siap untuk dijual.

src: Experts believe the departure of the This Morning presenter, who is among Britain's most bankable stars, could cost the firm millions due to hefty investment in products ranging from cushions and candles to clothing and homewear, and the potential for further delays to its launch.
mt: Pakar-pakar percaya bahawa pengunduran penyaji program This Morning, yang merupakan antara bintang paling bergaji tinggi di Britain, boleh membosankan syarikat itu berjuta ringgit disebabkan oleh pelaburan yang besar dalam pelbagai produk seperti bantal dan lilin serta pakaian dan barang rumah, serta potensi penangguhan lebih lanjut kepada pelancaran produk tersebut.

src: And it could mean the end of a long friendship.
mt: Dan ia mungkin bermaksud berakhirnya persahabatan yang lama.

src: Mother-of-three Willoughby and husband Dan Baldwin have been close to Jones and his wife Tara Capp for ten years.
mt: Ibu bapa tiga orang anak, Willoughby, dan suaminya, Dan Baldwin, telah rapat dengan Jones dan isterinya, Tara Capp, selama sepuluh tahun.

src: Willoughby set up Truly with Capp in 2016 and Jones, 52, joined as chairman in March.
mt: Willoughby menubuhkan Truly bersama Capp pada tahun 2016, dan Jones berumur 52 tahun telah menyertai syarikat tersebut sebagai pengerusi pada bulan Mac.

src: The couples holiday together and Jones has a 40 per cent stake in Baldwin's TV production firm.
mt: Pasangan tersebut bercuti bersama dan Jones memiliki kepentingan 40 peratus dalam syarikat produksi televisyen Baldwin.

src: Willoughby is to become a brand ambassador for M&S and will replace Ant McPartlin as host of ITV's I'm A Celebrity.
mt: Willoughby akan menjadi duta jenama untuk M&S dan akan menggantikan Ant McPartlin sebagai hos program 'Saya Seorang Selebriti' di ITV.

src: A source close to Jones said last night "We wouldn't comment on his business affairs."
mt: Sumber yang rapat dengan Jones berkata semalam, "Kita tidak akan mengulas tentang urusan perniagaan beliau."

src: Tough talk 'and then we fell in love'
mt: Gosip 'dan kemudian kami jatuh cinta'

src: He joked about criticism he would get from the news media for making a comment some would consider "unpresidential" and for being so positive about the North Korean leader.
mt: Beliau bercakap secara jenaka mengenai kritikan yang bakal diterimanya daripada media berikutan pengucapannya yang oleh sesetengah pihak dianggap "tidak seperti seorang presiden", serta sikapnya yang sangat positif terhadap pemimpin Korea Utara.

src: Why has President Trump given up so much?
mt: Mengapa Presiden Trump telah mengorbankan begitu banyak?

src: Trump said in his mock "news anchor" voice.
mt: Trump berkata dengan suara parodi sebagai "pelaporan berita".

src: "I didn't give up anything."
mt: Saya tidak melepaskan apa-apa.

src: He noted that Kim is interested in a second meeting after their initial meeting in Singapore in June was hailed by Trump as a big step toward denuclearization of North Korea.
mt: Beliau memaklumkan bahawa Kim berminat untuk mengadakan pertemuan kedua selepas pertemuan pertama mereka di Singapura pada bulan Jun yang disambut baik oleh Trump sebagai langkah besar menuju penuburan nuklear di Korea Utara.

src: But denuclearization negotiations have stalled.
mt: Negosiasi penamatan nuklear telah terhenti.

src: More than three months after the June summit in Singapore, North Korea's top diplomat Ri Yong Ho told world leaders at the U.N. General Assembly Saturday that the North doesn't see a "corresponding response" from the U.S. to North Korea's early disarmament moves.
mt: Lebih daripada tiga bulan selepas persidangan di Singapura pada bulan Jun, diplomat terkemuka Korea Utara, Ri Yong Ho, berkata di hadapan pemimpin dunia dalam Perhimpunan Agung Perserikatan Bangsa-Bangsa pada Sabtu bahawa Korea Utara tidak melihat "sebarang tindak balas sepadan" dari Amerika Syarikat terhadap langkah penghapusan senjata awal Korea Utara.

src: Instead, he noted, the U.S. is continuing sanctions aimed at keeping up pressure.
mt: Sebaliknya, seperti yang diulasnya, AS terus menerapkan sekatan bagi mengekalkan tekanan.

src: Trump took a much more optimistic view in his rally speech.
mt: Trump mengambil pandangan yang jauh lebih optimis dalam ucapan rallynya.

src: "We're doing great with North Korea," he said.
mt: "Kita melakukannya dengan sangat baik bersama Korea Utara," katanya.

src: "We were going to war with North Korea.
mt: Kita sedang menuju ke arah perang dengan Korea Utara.

src: Millions of people would have been killed.
mt: Ratusan juta orang mungkin terbunuh.

src: Now we have this great relationship."
mt: Kini kita mempunyai hubungan yang hebat ini.

src: He said his efforts to improve relations with Kim have brought positive results - ending rocket tests, helping free hostages and getting the remains of American servicemen returned home.
mt: Beliau berkata usaha-usuhannya untuk meningkatkan hubungan dengan Kim telah membawa hasil yang positif, iaitu menghentikan ujian pelancaran roket, membantu membebaskan tawanan, dan memastikan sisa-sisa anggota tentera Amerika dihantar pulang ke negara mereka.

src: And he defended his unusual approach in talking about relations with Kim.
mt: Dan dia mempertahankan pendekatannya yang tidak lazim dalam membincangkan hubungan dengan Kim.

src: "It's so easy to be presidential, but instead of having 10,000 people outside trying to get into this packed arena, we'd have about 200 people standing right there," Trump said, pointing at the crowd directly in front of him.
mt: "Ber presidennya sangat mudah, tetapi bukannya mempunyai 10,000 orang di luar yang cuba memasuki arena ini yang penuh sesak, kita hanya akan mempunyai kira-kira 200 orang berdiri di sini sahaja," kata Trump, sambil menunjuk kepada kumpulan yang berada tepat di hadapan beliau.

src: Indonesia Tsunami and Quake Devastate an Island, Killing Hundreds
mt: Gelombang Tsunami dan Gempa Bumi Merosakkan Sebuah Pulau di Indonesia, Menewaskan Ribuan

src: In the aftermath of the Lombok earthquake, for instance, foreign nongovernmental organizations were told they were not needed.
mt: Selepas gempa bumi di Lombok, misalnya, organisasi bukan kerajaan asing didakwa tidak diperlukan.

src: Even though more than 10 percent of Lombok's population had been dislocated, no national disaster was declared, a prerequisite for catalyzing international aid.
mt: Walaupun lebih daripada 10 peratus penduduk Lombok telah terjejas dan berpindah, tiada bencana nasional yang diisytihar, satu syarat penting bagi memacu bantuan antarabangsa.

src: "In many cases, unfortunately, they've been very clear that they're not requesting international assistance, so it's a bit challenging," Ms. Sumbung said.
mt: "Sesetengah kes, sayangnya, sangat jelas bahawa mereka tidak meminta bantuan antarabangsa, jadi ia agak mencabar," kata Puan Sumbung.

src: While Save the Children is putting together a team to travel to Palu, it is not yet sure whether foreign staff can work on the ground.
mt: Sementara Save the Children sedang menyusun pasukan untuk ke Palu, mereka masih belum pasti samaada kakitangan asing boleh bekerja di lapangan.

src: Mr. Sutopo, the national disaster agency spokesman, said Indonesian officials were assessing the situation in Palu to see whether international agencies would be allowed to contribute to the aid effort.
mt: Datuk Sutopo, jurucakap agensi bencana negara, berkata pihak berkuasa Indonesia sedang menilai keadaan di Palu untuk melihat sama ada agensi antarabangsa dibenarkan menyumbang kepada usaha bantuan.

src: Given the earth shaking that Indonesia constantly endures, the country remains woefully underprepared for nature's wrath.
mt: Mengambil kira guncangan bumi yang secara berterusan dihadapi oleh Indonesia, negara ini masih ketinggalan dengan teruk dalam kesiapsiagaan menghadapi kemarahan alam.

src: While tsunami shelters have been built in Aceh, they are not a common sight on other coastlines.
mt: Meskipun pelancongan tsunami telah dibina di Aceh, ia bukanlah pemandangan biasa di pantai-pantai lain.

src: The apparent lack of a tsunami warning siren in Palu, even though a warning had been in effect, is likely to have contributed to the loss of life.
mt: Ketiadaan yang jelas bagi sirian amaran tsunami di Palu, walaupun amaran telah diisytiharkan, kemungkinan besar telah menyumbang kepada kehilangan nyawa.

src: At the best of times, traveling between Indonesia's many islands is challenging.
mt: Pada masa terbaik, perjalanan antara pelbagai pulau di Indonesia merupakan satu cabaran.

src: Natural disasters make logistics even more complicated.
mt: Bencana semulajadi membuatkan logistik semakin rumit.

src: A hospital ship that had been stationed in Lombok to treat earthquake victims is making its way to Palu, but it will take at least three days to reach the site of the new calamity.
mt: Sebuah kapal hospital yang berkhidmat di Lombok untuk merawat mangsa gempa bumi sedang berlayar ke Palu, namun ia akan mengambil masa sekurang-kurangnya tiga hari untuk sampai ke lokasi bencana baharu itu.

src: President Joko Widodo made improving Indonesia's tattered infrastructure a centerpiece of his election campaign, and he has lavished money on roads and railways.
mt: Presiden Joko Widodo menjadikan penambahbaikan infrastruktur Indonesia yang sedang dalam keadaan rosak sebagai fokus utama kempen pilihan raya beliau, dan beliau telah melabur banyak wang dalam pembinaan jalan raya dan keretapi.

src: But funding shortfalls have plagued Mr. Joko's administration as he faces re-election next year.
mt: Namun, kekurangan pendanaan telah menjadi masalah dalam pentadbiran Tuan Joko apabila beliau berhadapan dengan pilihan raya umum akan datang.

src: Mr. Joko is also facing pressure from lingering sectarian tensions in Indonesia, where members of the Muslim majority have embraced a more conservative form of the faith.
mt: Tuan Joko juga berdepan tekanan daripada ketegangan sekte yang masih berlegas di Indonesia, di mana ahli-ahli majoriti Muslim telah memeluk bentuk yang lebih konservatif daripada agama tersebut.

src: More than 1,000 people were killed and tens of thousands dislocated from their homes as Christian and Muslim gangs battled on the streets, using machetes, bows and arrows, and other crude weapons.
mt: Lebih 1,000 orang terbunuh dan puluhan ribu lagi terdesak meninggalkan rumah mereka apabila kumpulan-kumpulan Kristian dan Muslim bertempur di jalan-jalan menggunakan parang, busur dan anak panah, serta pelbagai senjata kasar lain.

src: Watch: Liverpool's Daniel Sturridge dips deep equalizer vs. Chelsea
mt: Lihat: Gol dalam perlawanan dari jauh oleh Daniel Sturridge Liverpool menentang Chelsea

src: Daniel Sturridge saved Liverpool from a Premier League loss to Chelsea with a score in the 89th minute on Saturday at Stamford Bridge in London.
mt: Daniel Sturridge berjaya menyelamatkan Liverpool daripada kekalahan Liga Perdana kepada Chelsea dengan menjaringkan gol pada minit ke-89 pada hari Sabtu di Stamford Bridge, London.

src: Sturridge received a pass from Xherdan Shaqiri while about 30 yards out from the Chelsea goal with his team trailing 1-0.
mt: Sturridge menerima pas dari Xherdan Shaqiri apabila berada kira-kira 30 yard dari gawang Chelsea manakala pasukan mereka ketinggalan 0-1.

src: He tapped the ball to his left before scooping a shot toward the far post.
mt: Dia menampar bola ke sebelah kirinya sebelum menyepak kuat ke arah bucu jauh.

src: The attempt sailed high above the box as it drifted toward the right top corner of the net.
mt: Usa itu terapung jauh di atas kotak manakala ia hanyut ke arah penjuru kanan atas jaring.

src: The ball eventually dropped over a leaping Kepa Arrizabalaga and fell into the net.
mt: Bolanya akhirnya jatuh di atas Kepa Arrizabalaga yang melompat dan jatuh ke dalam jaring.

src: "It was just trying to get into that position, to get on the ball and players like Shaq always play it forward as much as possible, so I just tried to create myself as much time as possible," Sturridge told LiverpoolFC.com.
mt: "It sahaja cuba untuk mendapatkan kedudukan tersebut, untuk berada di sebelah bola, dan pemain seperti Shaq sentiasa memainkannya ke arah hadapan sebanyak mungkin, jadi saya cuba mencipta sebanyak mungkin masa untuk diri saya," kata Sturridge kepada LiverpoolFC.com.

src: "I saw Kante coming and took one touch and didn't think about it too much and just took the shot on."
mt: Saya melihat Kante datang, ambil satu sentuhan, tidak fikir terlalu banyak dan terus melepaskan tembakan.

src: Chelsea led 1-0 at halftime after getting a score in the 25th minute from Belgian star Eden Hazard.
mt: Chelsea mengambil gandingan 1-0 pada separuh masa selepas mendapat gol pada minit ke-25 daripada bintang Belgium, Eden Hazard.

src: The Blues striker heeled a pass back to Mateo Kovacic on that play, before spinning off near midfield and sprinting into the Liverpool half.
mt: Pelari Blues itu membalas sepakan ke belakang kepada Mateo Kovačić dalam aksi tersebut, sebelum berputar di sekitar tengah padang dan berlari masuk ke separuh medan Liverpool.

src: Kovacic did a quick give-and-go at midfield.
mt: Kovacic melakukan hantaran pantas di tengah medan.

src: He then fired a beautiful through ball, leading Hazard into the box.
mt: Kemudian, beliau melepaskan pas bola merentasi yang indah, membawa Hazard memasuki kotak penalti.

src: Hazard outran the defense and finished into the far post netting with a left footed shot past Liverpool's Alisson Becker.
mt: Hazard meneruskan lariannya melebihi pertahanan dan menamatkan dengan sepakan kaki kiri yang menembus jaring jauh, melampaui Alisson Becker dari Liverpool.

src: Liverpool battles Napoli in the group stage of the Champions League at 3 p.m. on Wednesday at Stadio San Paolo in Naples, Italy.
mt: Liverpool berdepan dengan Napoli dalam peringkat kumpulan Liga Juara-Juara pada pukul 3 petang hari ini di Stadio San Paolo, Neapel, Itali.

src: Chelsea faces Videoton in the UEFA Europa Leaguge at 3 p.m. on Thursday in London.
mt: Chelsea bertemu Videoton dalam Liga Europa UEFA pada pukul 3 petang hari ini di London.

src: Death toll from Indonesia tsunami rises to 832
mt: Angka mangsa tsunami di Indonesia meningkat kepada 832

src: The death toll in Indonesia's earthquake and tsunami has climbed to 832, the country's disaster agency said early Sunday.
mt: Agensi bencana negara itu berkata pada awal hari Ahad bahawa jumlah kematian akibat gempa bumi dan tsunami di Indonesia telah meningkat kepada 832.

src: Many people were reported trapped in the rubble of buildings brought down in the 7.5 magnitude earthquake which struck Friday and triggered waves as high as 20 feet, agency spokesman Sutopo Purwo Nugroho told a news conference.
mt: Sutopo Purwo Nugroho, jurucakap agensi, berkata ramai orang dilaporkan terperangkap dalam reruntuhan binaaan yang roboh akibat gempa bumi berkuat kuasa 7.5 magnitud yang berlaku pada hari Jumaat dan menyebabkan gelombang setinggi 20 kaki.

src: The city of Palu, which has more than 380,000 people, was strewn with debris from collapsed buildings.
mt: Kawasan bandar Palu, yang mempunyai lebih daripada 380,000 penduduk, dipenuhi dengan sisa-sisa daripada bangunan yang runtuh.

src: Police arrest man, 32, on suspicion of murder after woman is stabbed to death
mt: Polis mengikutsertakan lelaki berumur 32 tahun atas dakwaan cubaan pembunuhan selepas seorang wanita disembelih sehingga mati.

src: A murder investigation has been launched after woman's body was found in Birkenhead, Merseyside this morning.
mt: Siasatan jenayah telah dilancarkan selepas mayat seorang wanita ditemui di Birkenhead, Merseyside pada waktu pagi ini.

src: The 44-year-old was found at 7.55am with stab wounds on Grayson Mews on John Street, with a 32-year-old man being arrested on suspicion of murder.
mt: Orang berusia 44 tahun itu ditemui pada jam 7.55 pagi dengan luka tusukan di Grayson Mews, Jalan John, manakala seorang lelaki berumur 32 tahun ditahan di bawah syak rogol.

src: Police have urged people in the area who saw or heard anything to come forward.
mt: Polis menggesa orang ramai di kawasan tersebut yang telah melihat atau mendengar apa-apa untuk tampil ke hadapan.

src: Detective Inspector Brian O'Hagan said: 'The investigation is in the early stages but I would appeal to anyone who was in the vicinity of John Street in Birkenhead who saw or heard anything suspicious to contact us.
mt: Ketua Siasatan Brian O'Hagan berkata: "Siasatan ini masih dalam peringkat awal dan saya memohon kepada sesiapa sahaja yang berada berhampiran Jalan John di Birkenhead yang melihat atau mendengar sesuatu yang mencurigakan untuk menghubungi kami."

src: I would also appeal to anyone, particularly taxi drivers, who may have captured anything on dashcam footage to contact us as they may have information which is vital to our investigation.'
mt: Saya juga mengalu-alakan sesiapa, terutamanya pemandu teksi, yang mungkin mempunyai rekod dashcam untuk menghubungi kami, kerana mereka mungkin mempunyai maklumat yang penting bagi siasatan kami.

src: A police spokesman has confirmed the woman whose body was found is local to Birkenhead and she was found inside a property.
mt: Seorang jurucakap polis telah mengesahkan bahawa wanita yang mayatnya ditemukan merupakan penduduk tempatan Birkenhead dan mayatnya ditemui di dalam sebuah premis.

src: This afternoon friends who believe they know the woman have arrived at the scene to ask questions about where she was found this morning.
mt: Tetapi, terjemahan yang tepat ialah: "Pada waktu petang ini, rakan-rakan yang percaya mereka mengenali wanita itu telah tiba di tempat kejadian untuk bertanya di mana dia ditemui pada pagi ini."

src: Investigations are ongoing as police have said they are in the process of informing the victim's next of kin.
mt: Siasatan sedang dijalankan kerana pihak polis sedang dalam proses memberitahu ahli keluarga terdekat mangsa.

src: A taxi driver who lives in Grayson Mews has just tried to get back into his flat but is being told by police no one is allowed in or out of the building.
mt: Seorang pemandu teksi yang tinggal di Grayson Mews baru-baru ini cuba memasuki unit flatnya tetapi dipolisi dilarang daripada masuk atau keluar bangunan tersebut.

src: He was speechless when he discovered what happened.
mt: Dia tercengang apabila mengetahui apa yang telah berlaku.

src: Residents are now being told it will be hours until they are allowed back in.
mt: Wargamasa kini diberitahu bahawa mereka perlu menunggu selama berjam-jam sebelum dibenarkan kembali masuk.

src: A police officer was heard telling one man that the entire area is now being treated as a crime scene.
mt: Satu pegawai polis telah didengar memberitahu seorang lelaki bahawa seluruh kawasan itu kini dianggap sebagai tapak jenayah.

src: A woman appeared at the scene in tears.
mt: Seorang wanita muncul di tempat kejadian itu sambil menangis.

src: She keeps repeating 'it's so awful'.
mt: Dia terus mengulangi 'ini begitu teruk'.

src: At 2pm two police vans were inside the cordon with another van just outside.
mt: Pada pukul 2 petang, dua van polis berada di dalam zon penapisan, dengan sebuah van lagi berada di luar.

src: A number of officers were stood inside the cordon monitoring the block of flats.
mt: Sebilangan pegawai berdiri di dalam paksi untuk memantau blok flat tersebut.

src: Anyone with information is asked to DM @MerPolCC, call 101 or contact Crimestoppers anonymously on 0800 555 111 quoting log 247 of 30th September.
mt: Mana-mana pihak yang mempunyai maklumat diminta untuk menghantar mesej terus (DM) kepada @MerPolCC, menghubungi talian 101 atau menghubungi Crimestoppers secara rahsia pada nombor 0800 555 111 dengan menyebut log 247 tarikh 30 September.

src: Parliament's statue of Cromwell becomes latest memorial hit by 'rewriting history' row
mt: Patung Cromwell di Parlimen menjadi tumbukan terkini dalam kontroversi 'menulis semula sejarah'

src: Its banishment would be poetic justice for his Taliban-like destruction of so many of England's cultural and religious artefacts carried out by his fanatical Puritan followers.
mt: Penyinggirannya akan menjadi keadilan puisi bagi kehancuran yang menyerupai Taliban oleh banyak artefak budaya dan keagamaan England yang dilakukan oleh pengikut Puritan yang fanatik beliau.

src: But the Cromwell Society described Mr Crick's suggestion as "folly" and "attempting to rewrite history."
mt: Namun, Persatuan Cromwell menggambarkan cadangan Tuan Crick sebagai "kewangan bodoh" dan "cubaan untuk menulis semula sejarah."

src: John Goldsmith, chairman of the Cromwell Society, said: "It was inevitable in the present debate about the removal of statues that the figure of Oliver Cromwell outside the Palace of Westminster would become a target.
mt: John Goldsmith, pengerusi Persatuan Cromwell, berkata: "Dalam perbahasan semasa mengenai pembuangan patung, adalah pasti bahawa figur Oliver Cromwell di luar Palas Westminster akan menjadi sasaran."

src: The iconoclasm of the English civil wars was neither ordered nor carried out by Cromwell.
mt: Keicohan ikon terhadap gereja semasa Perang Saudara England bukanlah perintah yang dikeluarkan atau dilaksanakan oleh Cromwell.

src: Perhaps the wrong Cromwell would be sacrificed for the actions of his ancestor Thomas in the previous century.
mt: Mungkin Cromwell yang salah akan dikorbankan bagi tindakan leluhurnya, Thomas, pada abad lepas.

src: Sir William Hamo Thorneycroft's magnificent representation of Cromwell is evidence of 19th century opinion and part of the historiography of a figure who many believe is still worth celebrating.
mt: Portret megah William Hamo Thorneycroft tentang Cromwell merupakan bukti daripada pendirian abad ke-19 dan sebahagian daripada historiografi mengenai tokoh yang ramai percaya masih layak diiktiraf.

src: Mr Goldsmith told The Sunday Telegraph: "Cromwell is regarded by many, perhaps more in the late 19th century than today, as a defender of parliament against external pressure, in his case of course the monarchy.
mt: Cromwell dianggap oleh ramai, mungkin lebih pada akhir abad ke-19 berbanding hari ini, sebagai pembela parlimen terhadap tekanan luar, dalam kes ini tentu saja mahkota.

src: Whether that is a wholly accurate representation is the subject of continuing historical debate.
mt: Adalah sama ada itu merupakan perbandingan yang sepenuhnya tepat merupakan satu perdebatan sejarah yang berterusan.

src: What is certain is that the conflict of the mid 17th century has shaped the subsequent development of our nation, and Cromwell is an individual recognisable figure who represents one side of that divide.
mt: Yang pasti ialah bahawa pergaduhan pada pertengahan abad ke-17 telah membentuk perkembangan selanjutnya negara kita, dan Cromwell ialah seorang tokoh yang boleh dikenal pasti yang mewakili satu pihak dalam pembahagian tersebut.

src: His achievements as Lord Protector are also worth celebrating and commemorating."
mt: Keberhasilannya sebagai Lord Protector juga layak diprayakan dan diingati.

src: Killer Pig Mauls Chinese Farmer to Death
mt: Babi Pembunuh Merampas Maut Petani China

src: A farmer was attacked and killed by a pig in a market in southwest China, according to local media reports.
mt: Menurut laporan media tempatan, seorang petani diserang dan dibunuh oleh seekor babi di sebuah pasar di bahagian barat daya China.

src: The man, identified only by his surname "Yuan," was found dead with a severed artery, covered in blood near a sty at the market in Liupanshui in Guizhou province, the South China Morning Post reported Sunday.
mt: Lelaki yang dikenal pasti hanya dengan nama keluarganya, "Yuan," ditemui mati dengan arteri yang dipotong dan tertutup darah berhampiran sebuah kedai kuda di pasar di Liupanshui, Wilayah Guizhou, lapor Akhbar Pagi China Selatan pada hari Ahad.

src: A pig farmer prepares to inject vaccines into pigs at a hoggery on May 30, 2005 in Xining of Qinghai Province, China.
mt: Seorang peternak babi sedang menyediakan untuk menyuntik vaksin ke dalam babi di sebuah bumbung babi di Xining, Wilayah Qinghai, China pada 30 Mei 2005.

src: He had reportedly travelled with his cousin from the neighboring Yunnan province Wednesday to sell 15 pigs at the market.
mt: Difahamkan, dia telah melawat bersama sepupunya dari wilayah Yunnan yang bersebelahan pada星期三 untuk menjual 15 ekor babi di pasaran.

src: The following morning, his cousin found him dead, and discovered a door to a neighbouring pig sty open.
mt: Esok pagi, sepupunya menemui dia dalam keadaan mati dan mendapati sebuah pintu ke kandang babi yang bersebelahan terbuka.

src: He said that in the sty was a large male pig with blood on its mouth.
mt: Dia berkata bahawa dalam lembu itu ada seekor baka besar dengan darah di mulutnya.

src: A forensic examination confirmed that the 550 pound hog had mauled the farmer to death, according to the report.
mt: Laporan itu mengesahkan bahawa pemeriksaan forensik mendapati babi berat 550 paun itu telah menyakiti petani sehingga mati.

src: "My cousin's legs were bloody and mangled," the cousin, referred to by his surname "Wu," said, as quoted by the Guiyang Evening News.
mt: "Kaki saudara saya berlumuran darah dan cedera parah," kata saudara tersebut, yang dikenali dengan nama belakangnya, "Wu," seperti yang dilaporkan oleh Berita Malam Guiyang.

src: Security camera footage showed Yuan entering the market at 4.40 am Thursday to feed his pigs.
mt: Rakaman kamera pengaman menunjukkan Yuan memasuki pasar pada pukul 4.40 pagi Khamis untuk memberi makan babi-babinya.

src: His body was found about an hour later.
mt: Mayatnya ditemui kira-kira satu jam kemudian.

src: The animal who killed the man did not belong to Yuan or his cousin.
mt: Hewan yang membunuh lelaki itu bukan milik Yuan atau sepupunya.

src: A market manager told the Evening News that the pig had been locked away to prevent it attacking anyone else, while police gathered evidence at the scene.
mt: Seorang pengurus pasar telah memberitahu Berita Petang bahawa lembu itu telah dikunci untuk menghalangnya daripada menyerang sesiapa sahaja, manakala polis mengumpul bukti di lokasi kejadian.

src: Yuan's family and market authorities are reportedly negotiating compensation for his death.
mt: Keluarga Yuan dan pihak berkuasa pasaran dilaporkan sedang bincang mengenai ganti rugi untuk kematiannya.

src: Though rare, cases of pigs attacking humans have been recorded before.
mt: Walaupun jarang, kes babi menyerang manusia pernah direkodkan.

src: In 2016, a pig attacked a woman and her husband at their farm in Massachusetts, leaving the man with critical injuries.
mt: Pada tahun 2016, seekor babi menyerang seorang wanita dan suaminya di ladang mereka di Massachusetts, menyebabkan lelaki itu mengalami kecederaan yang serius.

src: Ten years previously, a 650 pound pig pinned a Welsh farmer to his tractor until his wife scared the animal away.
mt: Sepuluh tahun sebelumnya, seekor babi seberat 650 paun merempuh seorang petani Wales sehingga terkapar di atas traktornya sehingga isterinya menakutkannya supaya lari.

src: After an Oregon farmer was eaten by his pigs in 2012, one Manitoba farmer told CBC News that pigs are not normally aggressive but the taste of blood can act as a "trigger."
mt: Selepas seorang petani di Oregon dimakan lembu pig pada tahun 2012, seorang petani di Manitoba memberitahu CBC News bahawa lembu pig tidak biasanya agresif tetapi rasa darah boleh bertindak sebagai "pemicu."

src: "They're just being playful.
mt: Mereka hanya bermain-main.

src: They're nippers, very inquisitive ... they aren't out to hurt you.
mt: Mereka adalah buaya, sangat ingin tahu ... mereka tidak berniat menyakitkan anda.

src: You just have to pay them the right amount of respect," he said.
mt: Anda hanya perlu membayar mereka dengan hormat yang wajar," katanya.

src: Hurricane Rosa's remnants to bring widespread heavy rain to southwest US
mt: Sisa-sisa ribut tropika Rosa dijangkah membawa hujan lebat meluas ke Amerika Syarikat Barat Daya

src: As forecast, Hurricane Rosa is weakening as it moves over the cooler waters of the northern coast of Mexico.
mt: Seperti ramalan, Ekoran Rosa melemah apabila ia bergerak ke atas air yang lebih sejuk di pantai utara Mexico.

src: However, Rosa will bring flooding rains across northern Mexico and the southwest U.S. over the coming days.
mt: Walau bagaimanapun, Rosa akan membawa hujan lebat merentasi Mexico Utara dan barat daya Amerika Syarikat pada hari-hari akan datang.

src: Rosa had winds of 85 mph, a Category 1 Hurricane, as of 5 a.m. Eastern time Sunday, and was located 385 miles southwest of Punta Eugenia, Mexico.
mt: Rosa mempunyai angin sebanyak 85 mph, iaitu topan kategori 1, pada pukul 5 pagi waktu Timur pada hari Ahad, dan terletak 385 batu bersebelahan dengan arah selatan-pesiaran dari Punta Eugenia, Mexico.

src: Rosa is expected to move north on Sunday.
mt: Dijangkakan Rosa akan bergerak ke utara pada hari Ahad.

src: Meanwhile, a trough is beginning to take shape over the Pacific Ocean and move east toward the West Coast of the U.S. As Rosa approaches the Baja California peninsula on Monday as a tropical storm it will begin to push deep tropical moisture northward into the southwest U.S.
mt: Sebaik sahaja, sebuah lembangan mula terbentuk di atas Laut Pasifik dan bergerak ke timur menuju Pantai Barat Amerika Syarikat. Apabila Rosa menghampiri Semenanjung Baja California pada hari Isnin sebagai satu ribut tropika, ia akan memulakan pemindahan kelembapan tropika yang mendalam ke arah utara ke Amerika Syarikat Barat Daya.

src: Rosa will bring up to 10 inches of rain in parts of Mexico on Monday.
mt: Rosa boleh membawa sehingga 10 inci hujan di sebahagian wilayah Mexico pada hari Isnin.

src: Then, tropical moisture interacting with the approaching trough will create widespread heavy rainfall in the Southwest over the coming days.
mt: Kemudian, kelembapan tropika berinteraksi dengan lembangan yang sedang menghampiri akan mewujudkan hujan lebat meluas di Barat Daya pada beberapa hari akan datang.

src: Locally, 1 to 4 inches of rain will cause dangerous flash flooding, debris flows and possibility landslides in the desert.
mt: Secara tempatan, hujan 1 hingga 4 inci akan menyebabkan banjir kilat yang berbahaya, aliran puing, dan kemungkinan tanah runtuh di gurun.

src: Deep tropical moisture will cause rainfall rates to approach 2 to 3 inches per hour in spots, especially in parts of southern Nevada and Arizona.
mt: Kelembapan tropika yang mendalam akan menyebabkan kadar hujan mencecap 2 hingga 3 saat per jam di sesetengah kawasan, terutamanya di bahagian Nevada Selatan dan Arizona.

src: As much as 2 to 4 inches of rain is expected in parts of the Southwest, especially over much of Arizona.
mt: Setakat 2 hingga 4 inci hujan dijangka berlaku di beberapa bahagian Barat Daya, terutamanya merangkumi kebanyakan Arizona.

src: Flash flooding is possible with rapidly deteriorating conditions due to the scattered nature of tropical rain.
mt: Banjir kilat mungkin berlaku dengan keadaan yang merosot dengan cepat akibat taburan hujan tropika yang bertaburan.

src: It would be extremely ill advised to venture out into the desert on foot with the threat of tropical rainfall.
mt: Sangat tidak wajar untuk memasuki padang pasir dengan kaki sendiri dengan ancaman hujan tropika.

src: Heavy rain could cause canyons to become raging rivers and thunderstorms will bring locally gusty winds and blowing dust.
mt: Hujan lebat boleh menyebabkan lembah berubah menjadi sungai yang ganas, dan tompokan kilat akan membawa angin yang sangat kencang serta debu yang berterbangan secara tempatan.

src: The approaching trough will bring some locally heavy rain to parts of the Southern California coastline.
mt: Lembah yang akan tiba akan membawa hujan lebat di sesetengah bahagian pantai California Selatan.

src: Rainfall totals of over half an inch are possible, which could cause minor debris flows and slick roadways.
mt: Jumlah hujan melebihi setengah inci adalah mungkin, yang boleh menyebabkan aliran puing-puing kecil dan laluan jalan yang licin.

src: This would be the region's first rainfall of their wet season.
mt: Ini akan menjadi hujan musim hujan pertama di rantau ini.

src: Some scattered tropical rain showers will begin to approach Arizona late Sunday and early Monday, before the rain becomes more widespread late Monday and Tuesday.
mt: Sebilangan gerak hujan tropika yang berselerak akan mula menghampiri Arizona pada hari Ahad lewat dan Isnin awal, sebelum hujan menjadi lebih meluas pada Isnin lewat dan Selasa.

src: Heavy rain will spread into the Four Corners on Tuesday and last through Wednesday.
mt: Hujan lebat akan merentasi Sudut Empat pada hari Selasa dan berterusan sehingga hari Rabu.

src: October can see some intense temperature swings across the U.S. as the Arctic gets cooler, but the tropics remain quite warm.
mt: Oktober boleh melihat beberapa perubahan suhu yang teruk di seluruh Amerika Syarikat apabila Kutub Utara menjadi lebih sejuk, tetapi tropika kekal agak panas.

src: Sometimes this leads to dramatic changes in temperature over short distances.
mt: Kadang-kadang ini menyebabkan perubahan mendadak dalam suhu merentas jarak yang singkat.

src: There is a great example of dramatic temperature differences through the central U.S. on Sunday.
mt: Ada contoh hebat perbezaan suhu yang mencabar di seluruh Amerika Syarikat Tengah pada hari Ahad.

src: There is nearly a 20-degree temperature difference between Kansas City, Missouri, and Omaha, Nebraska, and between St. Louis and Des Moines, Iowa.
mt: Kecenderungan perbezaan suhu hampir 20 darjah Fahrenheit wujud antara Kansas City, Missouri, dan Omaha, Nebraska, serta antara St. Louis dan Des Moines, Iowa.

src: Over the next few days, lingering summer warmth will try to build and expand again.
mt: Selama beberapa hari akan datang, kehangatan musim panas yang belum reda akan cuba terbentuk dan berkembang semula.

src: Much of the central and eastern U.S. is expected to see a warm start to October with widespread 80s from the Southern Plains to parts of the Northeast.
mt: Sebahagian besar wilayah tengah dan timur Amerika Syarikat dijangka mencatatkan permulaan bulan Oktober yang panas, dengan suhu mencapai lingkungan 80-an darjah Fahrenheit merangkumi dari Satahan Selatan hingga ke sebahagian bahagian Timur Laut.

src: New York City could reach 80 degrees on Tuesday, which would be approximately 10 degrees above average.
mt: New York City boleh mencecah suhu 80 darjah pada hari Selasa, yang mana kira-kira 10 darjah lebih tinggi daripada purata.

src: Our long term climate forecast is indicating high chances for above-average temperatures for the eastern U.S. through the first half of October.
mt: Ramalan jangka masa panjang kami menunjukkan kebarangkalian tinggi bagi suhu di atas purata di bahagian timur Amerika Syarikat sehingga pertengahan Oktober.

src: More than 20 million people watched Brett Kavanaugh hearing
mt: Lebih daripada 20 juta orang menonton perbicaraan Brett Kavanaugh

src: More than 20 million people watched Thursday's gripping testimony by Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh and the woman who accused him of a sexual assault that allegedly occurred in the 1980s, Christine Blasey Ford, on six television networks.
mt: Lebih daripada 20 juta orang menonton kesaksian yang mengejutkan pada hari Khamis oleh calon Mahkamah Agung Brett Kavanaugh dan wanita yang menuduhnya melakukan pengguguran seksual yang據称 berlaku pada 1980-an, Christine Blasey Ford, di enam rangkaian televisyen.

src: Meanwhile, the political standoff continued, with broadcasters interrupting regular programming for Friday's last-minute twist: an agreement engineered by Arizona Sen. Jeff Flake for the FBI to conduct a one-week investigation of the charges.
mt: Pada masa yang sama, impas politik berterusan, dengan penyampai siaran menyekat penyiaran biasa untuk kejutan pada hari Jumaat yang terakhir: sebuah persetujuan yang direka oleh Senator Arizona, Jeff Flake, bagi Agensi Federal Penyiasatan (FBI) untuk menjalankan satu siasatan selama satu minggu mengenai dakwaan tersebut.

src: Ford told the Senate Judiciary Committee that she's 100 percent certain that Kavanaugh groped her drunkenly and tried to take off her clothes at a high school party.
mt: Ford memberitahu Jawatankuasa Perundangan Senat bahawa beliau 100 peratus yakin bahawa Kavanaugh telah menjangkitinya apabila beliau mabuk dan cubai membuka pakaiannya pada sebuah parti sekolah menengah.

src: Kavanaugh, in impassioned testimony, said he's 100 percent certain that it didn't happen.
mt: Dalam kesaksian yang penuh semangat, Kavanaugh berkata dia 100 peratus pasti bahawa ia tidak berlaku.

src: It's likely that more than the 20.4 million people reported by Nielsen on Friday watched it.
mt: Walaupun Nielsen melaporkan 20.4 juta orang pada hari Jumaat, kemungkinan ramai lagi telah menontonnya.

src: The company was counting average viewership on CBS, ABC, NBC, CNN, Fox News Channel and MSNBC.
mt: Syarikat tersebut menghitung purata penontonan di CBS, ABC, NBC, CNN, Fox News Channel dan MSNBC.

src: Figures weren't immediately available for other networks that showed it, including PBS, C-SPAN and the Fox Business Network.
mt: Angkara tidak serta-merta tersedia untuk rangkaian lain yang menampilkannya, termasuk PBS, C-SPAN dan Fox Business Network.

src: And Nielsen usually has some trouble measuring people who watch in offices.
mt: Dan Nielsen biasanya mempunyai kesukaran mengukur orang yang menonton di pejabat.

src: To put that in perspective, that's an audience size similar to that for a playoff football game or the Academy Awards.
mt: Untuk mencontohkan perkara itu, itu adalah saiz penonton yang serasi dengan perlawanan bola sepak pusingan akhir atau Anugerah Akademi.

src: Fox News Channel, whose opinion hosts have strongly backed Kavanaugh's appointment, led all networks with an average of 5.69 million viewers during the all-day hearing, Nielsen said.
mt: Menurut Nielsen, saluran berita Fox, yang hos pendapatnya telah mengundi dengan kuat menyokong penubuhan Kavanaugh, mendahului semua rangkaian dengan purata 5.69 juta penonton semasa sidang yang berlangsung sepanjang hari.

src: ABC was second with 3.26 million viewers.
mt: ABC menduduki tempat kedua dengan 3.26 juta penonton.

src: CBS had 3.1 million, NBC had 2.94 million, MSNBC had 2.89 million and CNN had 2.52 million, Nielsen said.
mt: Nielsen berkata, CBS mempunyai 3.1 juta penonton, NBC mempunyai 2.94 juta, MSNBC mempunyai 2.89 juta dan CNN mempunyai 2.52 juta.

src: Interest remained high after the hearing.
mt: Kerajaan kekal berminat selepas pendengaran itu.

src: Flake was the central figure in Friday's drama.
mt: Flake adalah tokoh utama dalam drama pada Jumaat.

src: After the moderate Republican's office issued a statement that he would be voting in favor of Kavanaugh, he was caught be CNN and CBS cameras Friday morning being shouted at by protesters as he tried to ride an elevator to a Judiciary Committee hearing.
mt: Selepas pejabat Republikan yang sederhana mengeluarkan kenyataan bahawa beliau akan mengundi menyokong Kavanaugh, beliau disedut oleh kamera CNN dan CBS pada pagi Jumaat apabila cuba naik lif ke sesi dengar pandangan Jawatankuasa Kehakiman, sambil diserang oleh para penunjuk perasaan.

src: He stood with eyes downcast for several minutes as he was berated, televised live on CNN.
mt: Dia berdiri dengan mata terendah selama beberapa minit sambil ditelah secara langsung di CNN.

src: "I'm standing right here in front of you," one woman said.
mt: "Adalah berdiri di hadapan kamu," kata seorang wanita.

src: "Do you think he's telling the truth to the country?
mt: Adakah anda berfikir bahawa beliau memberitahu kebenaran kepada negara?

src: He was told, "you have power when so many women are powerless.""
mt: Dia dikehendaki, "Anda memiliki kuasa apabila begitu ramai wanita tidak berdaya."

src: Flake said that his office had issued a statement and said, before the elevator closed, that he would have more to say at the committee hearing.
mt: Flake berkata bahawa pejabatnya telah mengeluarkan kenyataan dan menyatakan, sebelum lif ditutup, bahawa beliau akan mempunyai lagi perkara untuk dibentangkan pada persidangan jawatankuasa.

src: The cable and broadcast networks were all covering live hours later, when the Judiciary Committee was to vote to advance Kavanaugh's nomination to the full Senate for a vote.
mt: Rangkaian kabel dan siaran langsung semuanya menyiarkan secara langsung beratus-ratus jam kemudian, apabila Jawatankuasa Yurisdiction bersidang untuk mengundi cadangan pertukaran jawatan Kavanaugh ke Senat penuh untuk diundi.

src: But Flake said he would only do so with the understanding that the FBI would look into the allegations against the nominee for the next week, which minority Democrats have been urging.
mt: Namun Flake berkata bahawa beliau hanya akan berbuat demikian dengan syarat bahawa Jabatan Kehakiman Persekutuan (FBI) akan menyiasat dakwaan terhadap calon tersebut selama satu minggu lagi, yang telah didesak oleh Demokrat-dalam minoriti.

src: Flake was convinced in part by conversations with his friend, Democratic Sen. Chris Coons.
mt: Flake terpengaruh sebahagian daripada perbualan dengan rakan Demokratnya, Senator Chris Coons.

src: After a conversation with Coons and several senators afterwards, Flake made his decision.
mt: Selepas perbualan dengan Coons dan beberapa senator, Flake membuatkan keputusan.

src: Flake's choice had power, because it was evident Republicans would not have the votes to approve Kavanaugh without the investigation.
mt: Pilihan Flake mempunyai kuasa kerana ia jelas bahawa Republikan tidak akan mempunyai undian untuk menyetujui Kavanaugh tanpa siasatan.

src: President Trump has opened an FBI investigation into the allegations against Kavanaugh.
mt: Presiden Trump telah membuka siasatan FBI ke atas dakwaan terhadap Kavanaugh.

src: British PM May accuses critics of 'playing politics' over Brexit
mt: PM British May menuduh kritikan bahawa mereka 'bermain politik' mengenai Brexit

src: Prime Minister Theresa May accused critics of her plans to leave the European Union of "playing politics" with Britain's future and undermining the national interest in an interview with the Sunday Times newspaper.
mt: Perdana Menteri Theresa May menuduh kritikan terhadap rancangannya untuk keluar daripada Kesatuan Eropah sebagai "politik permainan" terhadap masa depan Britain dan mengabaikan kepentingan nasional dalam temubual dengan akhbar Sunday Times.

src: Britain's Prime Minister Theresa May arrives for the Conservative Party Conference in Birmingham, Britain, September 29, 2018.
mt: Perdana Menteri Britain, Theresa May, tiba untuk menghadiri Konvensi Parti Konservatif di Birmingham, Britain, pada 29 September 2018.

src: In another interview next to the one with her on the newspaper's front page, her former foreign minister Boris Johnson pressed his attack of her so-called Chequers plan for Brexit, saying a proposal that Britain and the EU should collect each other's tariffs was "entirely preposterous."
mt: Dalam temubual lain di sebelah temubual dengan beliau di halaman depan surat khabar itu, bekas Menteri Luar Boris Johnson memperkasakan serangan terhadap rancangan Chequersnya yang dipanggil sebagai rancangan Brexit, dengan menyatakan bahawa cadangan bahawa Britain dan Kesatuan Eropah hendaklah mengutip cukai duties antara satu sama lain adalah "sepenuhnya pelik".

src: Wayde Sims shooting: Police arrest suspect Dyteon Simpson in LSU player's death
mt: Pembunuhan pemain LSU Wayde Sims: Polis membuat tahanan terhadap suspek Dyteon Simpson

src: Police have arrested a suspect in the fatal shooting death of Wayde Sims, a 20-year-old basketball player at LSU.
mt: Polis telah mengasingkan seorang suspek dalam kes pembunuhan Wayde Sims, seorang pemain bola keranjang berumur 20 tahun di LSU.

src: Dyteon Simpson, 20, has been arrested and booked into prison on a second-degree murder charge, the Baton Rouge Police Department said.
mt: Dyteon Simpson, 20, telah ditahan dan dimasukkan ke dalam penjara atas dakwaan pembunuhan darjah dua, menurut Jabatan Polis Baton Rouge.

src: Officials released video of the confrontation between Sims and Simpson, and police said Sims lost his glasses during the fight.
mt: Rasuah telah mengeluarkan video konfrontasi antara Sims dan Simpson, dan polis berkata Sims telah kehilangan cermin mata semasa perkelahian itu.

src: Police recovered the glasses from the scene and said they found Simpson's DNA on them, CBS affiliate WAFB reports.
mt: Polis telah mengambil kembali cermin mata daripada lokasi kejadian dan melaporkan bahawa mereka menemui DNA Simpson di atasnya, menurut laporan rakan kongsi CBS, WAFB.

src: After questioning Simpson, police said he admitted to fatally shooting Wayde.
mt: Selepas memburu Simpson, polis berkata beliau mengakui menembak mati Wayde.

src: His bond has been set at $350,000, the Advocate reports.
mt: Iaitu $350,000, lapor peguam pendakwa.

src: The East Baton Rouge Parish Coroner's Office released a preliminary report Friday, saying the cause of death is a gunshot wound to the head into the neck.
mt: Pejabat Pembunuh Negeri Parish East Baton Rouge mengeluarkan laporan awal pada Jumaat, yang menyatakan punca kematian adalah tembakan pistol ke kepala ke arah leher.

src: The department is crediting the Louisiana State Police fugitive task force, the state police crime lab, Southern University police and area citizens in assisting in the investigation leading to the arrest.
mt: Jabatan tersebut memuji Pasukan Tugas Tugasan Pencari Fugitif Polis Negeri Louisiana, makmal jenayah polis negeri, polis Universiti Selatan, dan penduduk tempatan atas bantuan mereka dalam siasatan yang membawa kepada penangkapan.

src: LSU athletic director Joe Alleva thanked area law enforcement for its "diligence and pursuit of justice."
mt: Pengarah sukan LSU, Joe Alleva, mengucap syukur kepada pihak penguatkuasaan undang-undang daerah atas "ketekunan dan usaha mereka bagi mengupamakan keadilan."

src: Sims was 20 years old.
mt: Sims berumur 20 tahun.

src: The 6-foot-6 forward grew up in Baton Rouge, where his father, Wayne, also played basketball for LSU.
mt: The forward setinggi 6 kaki 6 inci besar di Baton Rouge, di mana bapaknya, Wayne, juga bermain bola keranjang untuk LSU.

src: He averaged 5.6 points and 2.6 rebounds a game last season.
mt: Belum pernah bermain.

src: On Friday morning, LSU basketball coach Will Wade said the team is "devastated" and "in shock" by Wayde's death.
mt: Pada pagi Jumaat, pengajar bola keranjang LSU, Will Wade, berkata pasukan itu "terkejut" dan "dalam keadaan syok" akibat kematian Wayde.

src: "This is what you worry about at all times," Wade said.
mt: "Begini yang anda risau sepanjang masa," kata Wade.

src: Volcano spews ash on Mexico City
mt: Gunung berapi melemparkan abu ke atas Mexico City

src: Ash spewing from the Popocatepetl volcano has reached the southern neighborhoods of Mexico's capital.
mt: Awan panas yang memancar dari gunung berapi Popocatépetl telah menjangkau kawasan-kawasan di bahagian selatan ibu negara Mexico.

src: The National Center for Disaster Prevention warned Mexicans on Saturday to stay away from the volcano after activity picked up in the crater and it registered 183 emissions of gas and ash over 24 hours.
mt: Pusat Kebangsaan untuk Pencegahan Bencana mengisytiharkan amaran kepada rakyat Mexico pada hari Sabtu supaya menjauhi gunung berapi selepas aktiviti meningkat di dalam kawah dan ia mencatatkan 183 pelepasan gas serta abu dalam tempoh 24 jam.

src: The center was monitoring multiple rumblings and tremors.
mt: Pusat itu memantau bunyi guruh dan getaran yang berbilang.

src: Images on social media showed thin layers of ash coating car windshields in neighborhoods of Mexico City such as Xochimilco.
mt: Gambar di media sosial menunjukkan lapisan nipis abu yang menutupi kaca cermin hadapan kereta di kawasan-kawasan Mexico City seperti Xochimilco.

src: Geophysicists have noticed an increase in activity at the volcano that sits 45 miles (72 kilometers) southeast of the capital since a 7.1-magnitude earthquake rocked central Mexico in September 2017.
mt: Para ahli geofisik telah perhatikan peningkatan aktiviti di gunung berapi yang terletak 45 batu (72 kilometer) di tenggara ibu kota sejak gempa bumi berkuat kuasa 7.1 skala Richter merentasi Mexico Tengah pada September 2017.

src: The volcano known as "Don Goyo" has been active since 1994.
mt: Gunung berapi yang dikenali sebagai "Don Goyo" telah aktif sejak tahun 1994.

src: Police clash with Catalan separatists ahead of independence vote anniversary
mt: Polis berdepan dengan pemisah Catalonia menjelang ulang tahun kerat kemerdekaan

src: Six people were arrested in Barcelona on Saturday after pro-independence protesters clashed with riot police, and as thousands joined rival demonstrations to mark the first anniversary of Catalonia's polarizing vote on secession.
mt: Enam orang telah ditahan di Barcelona pada hari Sabtu selepas penunjuk arah yang menyokong kemerdekaan berseteru dengan polis pengawalan awam, manakala ribuan orang telah menyertai demonstrasi berlawanan bagi menandakan ulang tahun pertama undian yang memecahbelahkan Catalonia mengenai pemisahan diri.

src: A group of masked pro-separatists held back by riot police pelted them with eggs and hurled powder paint, creating dark clouds of dust in streets that would usually be thronged with tourists.
mt: Sebuah kumpulan pro-pemisahan bertopengan yang dihalang oleh polis pengawalan membalas dengan melemparkan telur dan cat serbuk, mewujudkan awan debu gelap di jalan-jalan yang biasanya sesak dengan pelancong.

src: Scuffles also broke out later in the day with police using their batons to contain the fighting.
mt: Kejohahan juga berlaku kemudian pada hari itu dengan polis menggunakan tongkat mereka untuk mengawal pergaduhan.

src: Over several hours pro-independence groups chanting "No forgetting, no forgiveness" faced off with unionist protesters shouting, "Long live Spain."
mt: Selepas beberapa jam, kumpulan pro-kemerdekaan yang menjerit "Tiada pengabaian, tiada ampunan" berhadapan dengan demonstran unionis yang bersorak, "Selamanya hiduplah Sepanyol."

src: Fourteen people received treatment for minor injuries received in the protests, local press reported.
mt: Menurut laporan media tempatan, empat belas orang menerima rawatan untuk kecederaan ringan yang dialami semasa perhimpunan.

src: Tensions remain high in the independence-minded region a year after the October 1 referendum deemed illegal by Madrid but celebrated by separatist Catalans.
mt: Ketegangan kekal tinggi di wilayah yang berazam merdeka setahun selepas referendum Oktober 1 yang dianggap haram oleh Madrid tetapi diraikan oleh separatis Katalan.

src: Voters chose overwhelmingly to become independent, though turnout was low with those against secession largely boycotting the vote.
mt: Pewarganegara memilih secara besar-besaran untuk menjadi bebas, walaupun kehadiran undian adalah rendah kerana mereka yang menentang pemisahan boikot undian tersebut.

src: According to Catalan authorities almost 1000 people were injured last year after police tried to stop the vote going ahead at polling stations across the region in violent clashes.
mt: Menurut pihak berkuasa Catalonia, hampir 1,000 orang cedera pada tahun lepas apabila polis cuba menghalang pengundian yang diteruskan di pusat-pusat pengundian di seluruh wilayah tersebut dalam pertembungan ganas.

src: Pro-independence groups had camped out overnight on Friday to prevent a demonstration in support of the national police.
mt: Kumpulan pro-kemerdekaan telah mendirikan kem semalaman pada Jumaat untuk menghalang sebuah perhimpunan yang menyokong polis kebangsaan.

src: The demonstration went ahead but was forced to take a different route.
mt: Perhimpunan itu dilangsunkan tetapi terpaksa mengambil laluan yang berbeza.

src: Narcis Termes, 68, an electrician attending the separatist protest with his wife said he was no longer hopeful about the prospects of Catalonia gaining independence.
mt: Narcis Termes, 68, seorang tukang elektrik yang menghadiri protes autonomi bersama isterinya, berkata dia sudah tidak lagi berharap akan prospek Catalonia memperoleh kemerdekaan.

src: "Last year we lived through one of our best moments.
mt: Tahun lalu, kita telah melalui salah satu saat terbaik dalam hidup kita.

src: I watched my parents cry with joy at being able to vote but now we are stuck," he said.
mt: "Adalah saya memerhatikan ibu bapa saya menangis dengan sukacita apabila mereka dapat mengundi tetapi sekarang kita terperangkap," katanya.
