mt: "Berapa banyak kali saya berjumpa dengan orang putih dan mereka berkata: 'Bagaimana boleh anda menyokong Trump, dia seorang rasist?'"

src: Well, if I was concerned about racism I would've moved out of America a long time ago," he said.
mt: "Nah, kalau saya betul-betul risau tentang rasisme, saya sudah pindah keluar dari Amerika ini lama lagi," katanya.

src: SNL started the show with a skit starring Matt Damon in which the Hollywood star made fun of Brett Kavanaugh's testimony before the Senate Judicial Committee on sexual assault claims made by Christine Blasey Ford.
mt: SNL memulakan rancangan dengan satu lakonan yang dibintangi Matt Damon, di mana bintang filem tersebut membuat jenaka mengenai kesaksian Brett Kavanaugh di hadapan Jawatankuasa Keadilan Senat mengenai dakwaan gangguan seksual yang dikemukakan oleh Christine Blasey Ford.

src: Although it was not broadcast, the footage of West's rant was uploaded to social media by comedian Chris Rock.
mt: Walaupun tidak disiarkan, rekod video tersebut mengenai kemarahan West telah dimuat naik ke media sosial oleh pelawak Chris Rock.

src: It is unclear if Rock was trying to mock West with the posting.
mt: Tidak jelas sama ada Rock cuba menghina West dengan pautan tersebut.

src: Also, West had complained to the audience that he had got a hard time backstage about his head wear.
mt: Selain itu, West juga mengadap kepada penonton bahawa dia telah menghadapi kesukaran di belakang tabir berkaitan dengan penutup kepalanya.

src: "They bullied me backstage.
mt: "Mereka memperlekehkan saya di belakang pentas.

src: They said, 'don't go out there with that hat on.'
mt: Mereka berkata, 'Jangan keluar dengan memakai topi itu.'

src: They bullied me!
mt: Mereka mendesak saya!

src: And then they say I'm in a sunken place," he said, according to the Washington Examiner.
mt: Dan kemudian mereka kata aku berada di tempat tenggelam," katanya, menurut Washington Examiner.

src: West went on: "You wanna see the sunken place?" saying that he would "put my superman cape on, because this means you can't tell me what to do. You want the world to move forward?
mt: West meneruskan: "Kau nak lihat tempat tenggelam?" katanya, "aku akan pakai selendang Superman, kerana ini bermaksud kau tidak boleh menyuruh aku melakukan apa-apa. Adakah kau mahu dunia ini bergerak ke hadapan?"

src: Try love."
mt: Cuba cintakan.

src: His comments drew boos at least twice from the audience and SNL cast members appeared to be embarrassed, Variety reported, with one person there telling the publication: "The entire studio fell dead silent."
mt: Komen beliau mengundang tepukan bantah sekurang-kurangnya dua kali daripada penonton dan para pelakon SNL kelihatan terkejut, lapor Variety, dengan seorang hadirin memberitahu penerbitan itu: "Seluruh studio menjadi sunyi sepi."

src: West had been brought in as a late replacement for singer Ariana Grande, whose former boyfriend, the rapper Mac Miller had died a few days ago.
mt: West telah dibawa masuk sebagai pengganti akhir untuk penyanyi Ariana Grande, yang bekas kekasihnya, rapper Mac Miller, meninggal dunia beberapa hari lepas.

src: West puzzled many with a performance of the song I Love it, dressed as a Perrier Bottle.
mt: West membingkangkan ramai dengan pertunjukannya lagu I Love It, berpakaian seperti botol Perrier.

src: West got backing from head of conservative group TPUSA, Candace Turner who tweeted: "To one of the most courageous spirits: THANK YOU FOR STANDING UP TO THE MOB."
mt: West mendapat sokongan daripada ketua kumpulan konservatif TPUSA, Candace Turner, yang memetik tweetnya: "Kepada salah seorang roh yang paling berani: TERIMA KASIH ATAS KEHADAPAN ANDA TERHADAP PARA KEBUNYAHAN."

src: But talk show host Karen Hunter tweeted that West was simply "being who he is and that's absolutely wonderful."
mt: Namun hos wacara televisyen, Karen Hunter, memetik bahawa West sekadar "menjadi sesiapa yang dia adalah dan itu amatlah indah."

src: "But I chose NOT to reward someone (by purchasing his music or clothing or supporting his "art") who I believe is embracing and spewing ideology that is harmful to my community.
mt: "Tetapi saya memilih TIDAK untuk memberi ganjaran kepada seseorang (dengan membeli muziknya atau pakaiannya atau menyokong 'seni'nya) yang menurut saya sedang merangkul dan meludah ideologi yang berbahaya kepada komuniti saya."

src: He is free.
mt: Dia bebas.

src: So are we," she added.
mt: "Maka kita juga," tambahnya.

src: Before the show, the rapper announced on Twitter that he had changed his name, saying that he was now "the being formally known as Kanye West."
mt: Sebelum pertunjukan, rapper tersebut mengumumkan di Twitter bahawa dia telah mengubah nama beliau, berkata bahawa beliau kini "entiti yang dikenali sebagai Kanye West."

src: He is not the first artist to change their name and follows in the footsteps of Diddy, also known as Puff Daddy, Puffy and P Diddy.
mt: Belum ramai artis yang mengubah nama mereka, dan dia mengikuti jejak Diddy, juga dikenali sebagai Puff Daddy, Puffy dan P Diddy.

src: Fellow rapper, Snoop Dogg has had the name Snoop Lion and of course the late music legend Prince, changed his name to a symbol and then the artist previously known as Prince.
mt: Rakan rapper, Snoop Dogg telah mempunyai nama Snoop Lion dan tentu saja legenda muzik yang telah meninggal, Prince, telah mengubah namanya kepada satu simbol dan kemudian artis yang sebelum ini dikenali sebagai Prince.

src: Attempted murder charge over Belfast restaurant stabbing
mt: Akan dikenakan tuduhan cubaan bunuh berhubung kejadian tusukan di restoran Belfast

src: A 45-year-old man has been charged with attempted murder after a man was stabbed in a restaurant in east Belfast on Friday.
mt: Seorang lelaki berumur 45 tahun telah didakwa dengan pertuduhan cubaan pembunuhan selepas seorang lelaki dipukul parang di sebuah restoran di Belfast timur pada hari Jumaat.

src: The incident happened in Ballyhackamore, police said.
mt: Insiden tersebut berlaku di Ballyhackamore, menurut polis.

src: The defendant is expected to appear before Belfast Magistrates' Court on Monday.
mt: Defendan dijangka tampil di Mahkamah Magistrate Belfast pada hari Isnin.

src: The charges will be reviewed by the Public Prosecution Service.
mt: Sy控方 akan meninjau dakwaan tersebut.

src: Game of Thrones star Kit Harington hits out at toxic masculinity
mt: Kit Harington, bintang Game of Thrones, menyerang budaya maskulina toksik

src: Kit Harington is known for his sword-swinging role as Jon Snow in HBO's violent medieval fantasy series Game of Thrones.
mt: Kit Harington dikenali kerana wataknya yang mengayunkan pedang sebagai Jon Snow dalam siri fantasi pertengahan abad pertengahan HBO yang ganas, Game of Thrones.

src: But the actor, 31, has hit out at the stereotype of the macho hero, saying such roles on screen mean young boys often feel like they have to be tough to be respected.
mt: Namun pelakon berusia 31 tahun itu telah menyeru untuk menolak stereotaip wira gagah, dengan mengatakan bahawa watak-watak seperti itu di skrin sering kali menyebabkan budak-budak lelaki berasa perlu menjadi tegar untuk dihormati.

src: Speaking to The Sunday Times Culture, Kit said he believes 'something's gone wrong' and questioned how to tackle the problem of toxic masculinity in the #MeToo era.
mt: Berucap kepada The Sunday Times Culture, Kit berkata dia percaya 'sesuatu telah berlaku' dan bertanya bagaimana untuk menangani isu kekelasan toksik dalam era #MeToo.

src: Kit, who recently married his Game of Thrones co-star Rose Leslie, also 31, admitted he feels 'quite strongly' about addressing the issue.
mt: Kit, yang baru-baru ini berkahwin dengan bintang Game of Thrones, Rose Leslie, yang juga berusia 31 tahun, mengakui bahawa dia berasa "sangat kuat" mengenai isu tersebut.

src: 'I feel personally, quite strongly, at the moment - where have we gone wrong with masculinity?,' he said.
mt: "Secara peribadi, saya merasa sangat kuat pada masa ini—kami sudah tersesat di mana dalam keperkasaan," katanya.

src: 'What have we been teaching men when they're growing up, in terms of the problem we see now?'
mt: "Apa yang telah kita ajarkan kepada lelaki ketika mereka sedang membesar, dari segi masalah yang kita lihat sekarang?"

src: Kit believes television may be partly responsible for the rise in toxic masculinity thanks to its very masculine characters.
mt: Kit percaya televisyen mungkin sebahagian bertanggungjawab terhadap peningkatan maskuliniti toksik berikutan watak-wataknya yang sangat maskulin.

src: He continued: 'What's innate and what's taught?
mt: Beliau berterusan: "Adakah yang berpunca secara semula jadi atau diajar?"

src: What is taught on TV, and in the streets, that makes young boys feel they have to be this certain side of being a man?
mt: Apa yang diajar di televisyen dan di jalan raya yang menyebabkan budak-budak muda berasa mereka mesti menjadi satu jenis lelaki tertentu?

src: I think that's really one of the big questions in our time - how do we change that?
mt: Saya rasa itu salah satu soalan besar dalam zaman kita – bagaimana kita mengubahnya?

src: Because clearly something has gone wrong for young men.'
mt: Oleh kerana jelas ada sesuatu yang salah dengan pemuda-pemuda.

src: In the interview he also admitted that he wouldn't be doing any Game of Thrones prequels or sequels when the series comes to an end next summer, saying he is 'done with battlefields and horses'.
mt: Dalam temubual itu, beliau juga mengakui bahawa beliau tidak akan membuat mana-mana penerbitan terdahulu atau sambungan Siri Game of Thrones apabila siri itu berakhir pada musim panas hadapan, kerana beliau sudah 'selesai dengan medan perang dan kuda'.

src: From November Kit will star in a revival of Sam Shepard's True West which is the story of a film producer and his brother, who is a robber.
mt: Pada bulan November, Kit akan membintangi semulafilem True West oleh Sam Shepard, yang merupakan kisah seorang pengeluar filem dan adiknya yang merupakan seorang pencuri.

src: The actor recently revealed that he considers meeting his wife Rose to be the best thing to come out of Game of Thrones.
mt: Pelakon itu baru-baru ini mendedahkan bahawa berjumpa isterinya, Rose, merupakan perkara terbaik yang telah keluar daripada Game of Thrones.

src: 'I met my wife in this show, so in that way it gave me my future family, and my life from here on in,' he said.
mt: "aku bertemu isteri saya dalam penerbitan ini, jadi dalamerti itu ia memberikan saya keluarga masa depan saya dan hidup saya bermula dari sini ke hadapan," katanya.

src: Rose played Ygritte, the love interest of Kit's character Jon Snow, in the Emmy award-winning fantasy series.
mt: Rose memainkan watak Ygritte, cinta kasih bagi watak Kit, Jon Snow, dalam siri fantasi yang memenangi anugerah Emmy.

src: The couple married in June 2018 on the grounds of Leslie's family estate in Scotland.
mt: Pasangan itu berkahwin pada bulan Jun 2018 di tanah milik keluarga Leslie di Scotland.

src: HIV/Aids: China reports 14% surge in new cases
mt: HIV/Susukan: China melaporkan peningkatan 14% dalam kes baharu

src: China has announced a 14% jump in the number of its citizens who are living with HIV and Aids.
mt: China telah mengumumkan peningkatan sebanyak 14% dalam bilangan warganya yang menghidap HIV dan AIDS.

src: More than 820,000 people are affected in the country, health officials say.
mt: Lebih daripada 820,000 orang terjejas di negara ini, menurut pihak berkuasa kesihatan.

src: About 40,000 new cases were reported in the second quarter of 2018 alone.
mt: Sekitar 40,000 kes baharu dilaporkan pada suku kedua tahun 2018 sahaja.

src: The vast majority of new cases were transmitted through sex, marking a change from the past.
mt: Sejumpanya kes baharu ditularkan melalui hubungan seksual, menandakan perubahan berbanding masa lalu.

src: Traditionally, HIV spread rapidly through some parts of China as a result of infected blood transfusions.
mt: Secara tradisional, HIV meluas dengan cepat ke sebahagian China akibat transfusi darah yang tercemar.

src: But the number of people contracting HIV in this way had been reduced to almost zero, Chinese health officials said at a conference in Yunnan province.
mt: Walaupun bilangan orang yang dijangkiti HIV melalui cara ini telah dikurangkan hampir kepada sifar, kata pegawai kesihatan China pada satu konvensyen di Wilayah Yunnan.

src: Year-on-year, however, the number of those living with HIV and Aids in China has risen by 100,000 people.
mt: Walaupun begitu, bilangan mereka yang menghidap HIV dan AIDS di China telah meningkat sebanyak 100,000 orang dari tahun ke tahun.

src: HIV transmission through sex is an acute issue in China's LGBT community.
mt: Penularan HIV melalui hubungan seksual merupakan isu mendesak dalam komuniti LGBT China.

src: Homosexuality was decriminalised in China in 1997, but discrimination against LGBT people is said to be rife.
mt: Homoseksual telah diloloskan daripada hukuman di China pada tahun 1997, tetapi didakwa bahawa diskriminasi terhadap orang LGBT masih meluas.

src: Because of the country's conservative values, studies have estimated that 70-90% of men who have sex with men will eventually marry women.
mt: Oleh kerana nilai-nilai konservatif negara, kajian telah menganggarkan bahawa antara 70% hingga 90% lelaki yang melakukan hubungan seks dengan lelaki pada akhirnya akan berkahwin dengan wanita.

src: Many of the transmissions of the diseases come from inadequate sexual protections in these relationships.
mt: Sebilangan besar penularan penyakit tersebut berasal daripada perlindungan seks yang tidak mencukupi dalam hubungan-hubungan tersebut.

src: Since 2003, China's government has promised universal access to HIV medication as part of an effort to tackle the issue.
mt: Sejak tahun 2003, kerajaan China telah berjanji untuk memberikan akses universal terhadap ubat-ubatan HIV sebagai sebahagian daripada usaha menangani isu ini.

src: Maxine Waters denies staffer leaked GOP senators' data, blasts 'dangerous lies' and 'conspiracy theories'
mt: Maxine Waters menafikan bahawa kakitangan telah membocorkan data senator GOP, dan mengutuk 'bohongan berbahaya' serta 'teori konspirasi'.

src: U.S. Rep. Maxine Waters on Saturday denounced allegations that a member of her staff had posted the personal information of three Republican U.S. senators onto the lawmakers' Wikipedia pages.
mt: Ahli Parlimen Amerika Syarikat, Maxine Waters, pada Sabtu mengutuk dakwaan bahawa seorang ahli stafnya telah memaparkan maklumat peribadi tiga senator Republik Amerika Syarikat ke dalam halaman Wikipedia para legislator tersebut.

src: The Los Angeles Democrat asserted that the claims were being pedaled by "ultra-right wing" pundits and websites.
mt: Ahli Demokrasi Los Angeles tersebut menegaskan bahawa dakwaan itu dipaparkan oleh pakar dan laman web "ultra-kanan".

src: "Lies, lies, and more despicable lies," Waters said in a statement on Twitter.
mt: "Kebohongan, kebohongan lagi, dan kebohongan yang lebih teruk," kata Waters dalam kenyataan di Twitter.

src: The released information reportedly included the home addresses and phone numbers for U.S. Sens. Lindsey Graham of South Carolina, and Mike Lee and Orrin Hatch, both of Utah.
mt: Maklumat yang telah dibebaskan dilaporkan merangkumi alamat rumah dan nombor telefon untuk Senator-Senator AS Lindsey Graham dari Carolina Selatan, serta Mike Lee dan Orrin Hatch, kedua-duanya daripada Utah.

src: The information appeared online Thursday, posted by an unknown person on Capitol Hill during a Senate panel's hearing on the sexual misconduct allegations against Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh.
mt: Maklumat tersebut muncul dalam talian pada hari Khamis, dipos oleh seorang individu yang tidak diketahui di Bukit Capitol semasa dengar pendapat Jawatankuasa Senat mengenai dakwaan penyalahgunaan seksual terhadap calon Mahkamah Agung, Brett Kavanaugh.

src: The leak came sometime after the three senators had questioned Kavanaugh.
mt: Rahsia itu terbongkar selepas tiga orang senator telah menanya Kavanaugh.

src: Conservative sites such as Gateway Pundit and RedState reported that the IP address that identifies the source of the posts was associated with Waters" office and released the information of a member of Waters' staff, the Hill reported.
mt: Laman konservatif seperti Gateway Pundit dan RedState melaporkan bahawa alamat IP yang mengenal pasti sumber posting tersebut berkaitan dengan pejabat Waters dan telah membebankkan maklumat seorang ahli staf Waters, menurut laporan The Hill.

src: "This unfounded allegation is completely false and an absolute lie," Waters continued.
mt: "Akhmar ini adalah palsu dan satu kebohongan sepenuhnya," sambung Waters.

src: "The member of my staff - whose identity, personal information, and safety have been compromised as a result of these fraudulent and false allegations - was in no way responsible for the leak of this information.
mt: "Ahli jawatankuasa saya – yang identiti, maklumat peribadi, dan keselamatannya telah terjejas sebagai akibat dakwaan penipuan dan palsu ini – tidak bertanggungjawab langsung terhadap kebocoran maklumat tersebut."

src: This unfounded allegation is completely false and an absolute lie."
mt: Akhmar ini adalah palsu dan satu kebohongan sepenuhnya.

src: Waters' statement quickly drew criticism online, including from former White House press secretary Ari Fleischer.
mt: Pernyataan Waters dengan pantas mendapat kritikan dalam talian, termasuk dari bekas jurucakap media Bilik Putih, Ari Fleischer.

src: "This denial is angry," Fleischer wrote.
mt: "Penafian ini penuh dengan kemarahan," tulis Fleischer.

src: "This suggests she doesn't have the temperment to be a Member of Congress.
mt: Ini mencadangkan bahawa beliau tidak mempunyai sifat untuk menjadi Ahli Kongres.

src: When someone is accused of something they didn't do, they must not be angry.
mt: Apabila seseorang didakwa dengan sesuatu yang tidak mereka lakukan, mereka tidak sepatutnya marah.

src: They must not be defiant.
mt: Mereka tidak boleh memberontak.

src: They must not question the motives of the accuser.
mt: Mereka tidak boleh menyoal niat penuduh.

src: They must be calm and serene."
mt: Mereka mesti tenang dan tenang.

src: Fleischer was appearing to compare Waters' reaction to the Democrats' criticism of Judge Kavanaugh, who was accused by critics of seeming too angry during Thursday's hearing.
mt: Fleischer seolah-olah membandingkan reaksiaksi Waters terhadap kritikan parti Demokrat terhadap Hakim Kavanaugh, yang dituduh oleh kritikus seolah-olah terlalu marah semasa persidangan pada hari Khamis.

src: Omar Navarro, a Republican candidate running to unseat Waters in the midterm elections, also voiced his thoughts on Twitter.
mt: Omar Navarro, seorang calon Republikan yang bertanding untuk menggantikan Waters dalam pilihan raya pertengahan, juga menyatakan pendapatnya di Twitter.

src: "Big if true," he tweeted.
mt: "Bagus jika benar," tweet dia.

src: In her statement, Waters said her office had alerted "the appropriate authorities and law enforcement entities of these fraudulent claims.
mt: Dalam kenyataan itu, Waters menyatakan bahawa pejabatnya telah memberi amaran kepada "pihak berkuasa yang berkenaan dan badan-badan penyiasatan jenayah mengenai dakwaan-dakwaan palsu tersebut.

src: "We will ensure that the perpetrators will be revealed," she continued, "and that they will be held legally liable for all of their actions that are destructible and dangerous to any and all members of my staff."
mt: "Kami akan memastikan bahawa para pelaku akan terbongkar," sambung beliau, "dan mereka akan dikenakan tanggungjawab undang-undang bagi semua tindakan mereka yang memusnahkan dan membahayakan segenap serta semua ahli staf saya."

src: Johnny English Strikes Again review - underpowered Rowan Atkinson spy spoof
mt: Ulasan Johnny English Strikes Again: Parodi mata-mata Rowan Atkinson yang kurang berkemampuan

src: It's traditional now to look for Brexit significances in any new film with a British slant and that does seem applicable to this revival of the Johnny English action-comedy spoof franchise - which started back in 2003 with Johnny English and spluttered back to life in 2011 with Johnny English Reborn.
mt: Ia kini menjadi tradisi untuk mencari implikasi Brexit dalam mana-mana filem baharu dengan nuansa British, dan ia memang nampaknya sesuai dengan terbitan semula siri parodi aksi-komedi Johnny English ini — yang bermula pada tahun 2003 dengan Johnny English dan kembali kepada kehidupan pada tahun 2011 dengan Johnny English Reborn.

src: Will tongue-in-cheek self-satire on the subject of how obviously rubbish we are be the nation's new export opportunity?
mt: Adakah satiran diri yang menggigit lidah mengenai betapa jelasnya keburukan kita akan menjadi peluang eksport baharu bagi negara ini?

src: At any rate, the pop-eyed, rubber-faced incompetent Johnny English has had his licence to cock things up renewed for the second time - that name of his signalling more than anything else that he is a broad comic creation designed for non-English-speaking cinemagoing territories.
mt: Bagaimanapun, Johnny English yang tidak kompeten dengan mata bulat dan wajah seperti getah telah memperbaharui lesen untuk membuat kekacauan untuk kedua-dua kali – nama tersebut menandakan bahawa dia adalah satu watak komedi yang luas yang direka untuk pasaran filem bukan berbahasa Inggeris.

src: He is of course the daft secret agent who despite his bizarre pretensions to smoothie glamour has got a little bit of Clouseau, a dash of Mr Bean and a dollop of that chap contributing a single note to the Chariots of Fire theme tune at the London 2012 Olympics opening ceremony.
mt: Dia pastinya ejen rahsia yang bodoh, walaupun dengan pretensi gaya yang pelik untuk menjadi seperti seorang ejen yang sopan, dia mempunyai sedikit gaya Clouseau, sebiji cecahan Mr Bean, dan satu petikan daripada lagu tema Chariots of Fire semasa majlis pembukaan Sukan London 2012.

src: He's also originally based on the traveller and international man of mystery Atkinson once played in the now forgotten Barclaycard TV ads, leaving chaos in his wake.
mt: Beliau juga asalnya berasaskan kepada pelancong dan lelaki misteri antarabangsa yang pernah dimainkan Atkinson dalam iklan TV Barclaycard yang kini dilupakan, meninggalkan kekacauan di belakangnya.

src: There are one or two nice moments in this latest JE outing.
mt: Ada satu atau dua saat yang menarik dalam acara JE kali ini.

src: I loved Johnny English approaching a helicopter while dressed in a medieval suit of armour and the rotor blades briefly clanging against his helmet.
mt: Saya gemar apabila Johnny English mendekati helikopter sambil memakai pakaian pelindung zamani dan bilah rotornya bergoncang sebentar di atas helmnya.

src: Atkinson's gift for physical comedy is on display, but the humour feels pretty underpowered and weirdly superfluous, especially as the "serious" film brands like 007 and Mission Impossible themselves now confidently offer comedy as an ingredient.
mt: Kebolehan Atkinson dalam komedi fizikal sedang ditunjukkan, namun humor tersebut terasa agak tidak berkesan dan pelik, terutamanya apabila filem-filem "sungguh" jenama seperti 007 dan Mission Impossible sendiri kini menawarkan komedi sebagai sebahagian daripada unsur-unsurnya dengan keyakinan.

src: The humour feels as if it is pitched at kids rather than adults, and for me Johnny English's wacky misadventures aren't as inventive and focused as Atkinson's silent-movie gags in the persona of Bean.
mt: Humornya terasa seolah-olah ditujukan kepada kanak-kanak berbanding orang dewasa, dan bagi saya, cabaran lucu Johnny English kurang inovatif dan berfokus berbandangkan gelak senyap Atkinson dalam persona Bean.

src: The perennially topical premise now is that Great Britain is in serious trouble.
mt: Premis yang sentiasa menjadi bahan perbincangan kini ialah bahawa United Kingdom berada dalam kesukaran yang serius.

src: A cyber-hacker has infiltrated Britain's super-secret web network of spies, revealing the identities of all Britain's agents in the field, to the dismay of the agent on duty - a regrettably small role for Kevin Eldon.
mt: Sebuah perompak siber telah menyusup ke rangkaian web rahsia Britain yang digunakan oleh mata-mata, mendedahkan identiti semua agen Britain yang sedang bertugas di lapangan, menyebabkan kekecewaan kepada agen yang bertugas pada masa itu – sebuah peranan yang agak kecil untuk Kevin Eldon.

src: It's the last straw for a prime minister who is a pompous and embattled figure, already suffering a complete meltdown of political unpopularity: Emma Thompson does her very best with this quasi-Teresa-May character but there's nothing much in the script to work with.
mt: Ini adalah pucuk akhir bagi seorang perdana menteri yang sombong dan menghadapi pelbagai cabaran, yang sudah mengalami keruntuhan populariti politik yang lengkap: Emma Thompson cuba sekuat tenaga dengan watak quasi-Teresa May ini, tetapi tiada banyak lagi dalam skrip untuk dikerjakan.

src: Her intelligence advisers inform her that as every single active spy has been compromised, she will have to bring someone out of retirement.
mt: Ahlinya beritahu bahawa kerana setiap mata-mata aktif telah dipatahkan, dia perlu mencari seseorang yang telah bersara untuk dibawa keluar semula.

src: And that means bumbling Johnny English himself, now employed as a schoolmaster in some posh establishment, but giving off-the-record lessons in how to be an undercover operative: some nice gags here, as English offers a School of Rock-type academy of spying.
mt: Dan itu bermaksud Johnny English sendiri yang keliru, kini bekerja sebagai guru sekolah dalam sebuah institusi eksklusif, tetapi memberikan pelajaran secara rahsia tentang bagaimana menjadi seorang pegawai perisikan: beberapa jenaka yang menarik di sini, apabila English menawarkan sebuah akademi pengintipan bergaya 'Sekolah Rock'.

src: English is whisked back to Whitehall for an emergency briefing and reunited with his former long-suffering sidekick Bough, played again by Ben Miller.
mt: Bahasa Inggeris disedut kembali ke Whitehall untuk mesyuarat kecemasan dan berjumpa semula dengan rakan lamanya yang sering menderita, Bough, diperankan sekali lagi oleh Ben Miller.

src: Bough is now a married man, hitched to a submarine commander, a jolly-hockey-sticks role in which Vicki Pepperdine is a bit wasted.
mt: Bough kini seorang lelaki berkahin, diikat pada seorang pegawai komander kapal selam, sebuah peranan yang menyeronokkan seperti tongkat hoki di mana Vicki Pepperdine agak terbuang.

src: So the Batman and Robin of getting things terribly wrong on Her Majesty's Secret Service are back in action, encountering Olga Kurylenko's beautiful femme fatale Ophelia Bulletova.
mt: Oleh itu, Batman dan Robin yang sering membuat kesilapan teruk dalam *Her Majesty's Secret Service* kini kembali beraksi, berhadapan dengan Ophelia Bulletova, wanita mematikan yang cantik dari Olga Kurylenko.

src: Meanwhile, the prime minister is falling dangerously under the spell of the charismatic tech billionaire who claims he can solve Britain's computer woes: the sinister Jason Volta, played by Jake Lacy.
mt: Sementara itu, Perdana Menteri semakin terpesona dengan pesona penjawat awam teknologi yang berkharisma, Jason Volta yang diperankan oleh Jake Lacy, yang mengesyaratkan bahawa beliau dapat menyelesaikan masalah komputer di Britain.

src: English and Bough begin their odyssey of farcical high-jinks: disguised as waiters, they set fire to a flash French restaurant; they create mayhem smuggling themselves aboard Volta's luxury yacht; and English triggers pure anarchy as he attempts to use a Virtual Reality headset to familiarise himself with the interior of Volta's house.
mt: English dan Bough memulakan odyssey mereka yang penuh dengan kelakuan jenaka: disamar sebagai pelayan, mereka membakar sebuah restoran gaya Perancis; mereka menenggelamkan diri ke atas kapal pesiar mewah Volta yang menyebabkan kemusnahan; dan English mencetuskan anarki apabila cuba memakai peranti realiti maya untuk mengenali bilik dalam rumah Volta.

src: All the stops are certainly pulled out for that last sequence, but as amiable and boisterous as it is, there's quite a bit of kids' TV about the whole thing.
mt: Semua stop ditahan tanpa ragu untuk urutan akhir itu, tetapi segemah dan seronok pun ia, ia masih agak banyak ciri-ciri televisyen untuk kanak-kanak.

src: Pretty moderate stuff.
mt: Baru sikit je.

src: And as with the other Johnny English films I couldn't help thinking: can't the British film industry give Rowan Atkinson a role that really does justice to his talent?
mt: Dan sama seperti filem-filem Johnny English yang lain, saya tidak dapat mengelak daripada memikirkan: adakah industri filem British tidak mampu memberikan Rowan Atkinson watak yang benar-benar mengagumi bakatnya?

src: Labour denies it is devising a plan for Britons to work a four day week but be paid for five days
mt: Buruh menafikan bahawa mereka sedang merancang skema supaya rakyat Britain bekerja selama empat hari tetapi dibayar selama lima hari.

src: Jeremy Corbyn's Labour Party is to consider a radical plan which will see Britons working a four day week - but getting paid for five.
mt: Parti Buruh Jeremy Corbyn akan mempertimbangkan pelan radikal yang akan melihat rakyat Britain bekerja pada satu minggu empat hari tetapi dibayar seperti bekerja lima hari.

src: The party reportedly wants company bosses to pass on savings made through the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution to workers by giving them an extra day off.
mt: Parti itu dilaporkan ingin majikan syarikat menghulurkan simpanan yang diperolemi melalui revolusi kecerdasan buatan (AI) kepada pekerja dengan memberi mereka satu hari cuti tambahan.

src: It would see employees enjoy a three-day weekend - but still take home the same pay.
mt: Ini akan membolehkan pekerja menikmati hujung minggu tiga hari, tetapi masih menerima gaji yang sama.

src: Sources said the idea would 'fit' with the party's economic agenda and plans to tilt the country in favour of workers.
mt: Sumber berkata bahawa idea itu akan 'muai' dengan agenda ekonomi parti dan rancangan untuk memihak kepada pekerja.

src: Shifting to a four-day week has been endorsed by the Trades Union Congress as a way for workers to take advantage of the changing economy.
mt: Pergeseran kepada minggu empat hari telah diluluskan oleh Kongres Persatuan Buruh sebagai cara bagi pekerja untuk mengambil manfaat daripada ekonomi yang sedang berubah.

src: A senior Labour Party source told The Sunday Times: 'A policy review is expected to be announced before the end of the year.
mt: Sumber tinggi Parti Buruh memberitahu The Sunday Times: "Sebuah kajian semula dasar dijangka akan diumumkan sebelum akhir tahun."

src: 'It won't happen overnight but a four-day working week is an aspiration that fits in with the party's approach to rebalancing the economy in favour of the worker as well as the party's overall industrial strategy.'
mt: Ia tidak akan berlaku dalam waktu semalam, tetapi seminggu bekerja selama empat hari merupakan aspirasi yang selaras dengan pendekatan parti untuk menimbang semula ekonomi demi kepentingan pekerja serta strategi industri keseluruhan parti.

src: The Labour Party would not be the first to endorse such an idea, with the Green Party pledging a four-day working week during its 2017 general election campaign.
mt: Parti Buruh bukan parti pertama yang menyokong idea sedemikian, dengan Parti Hijau telah berjanji untuk memperkenalkan minggu bekerja empat hari sempena kempen pilihan raya umum 2017.

src: The aspiration is currently not being endorsed by the Labour Party as a whole, however.
mt: Walau bagaimanapun, aspirasi ini pada masa ini tidak disokong oleh parti Buruh secara keseluruhannya.

src: A Labour Party spokesman said: 'A four-day working week is not party policy and it is not being considered by the party.'
mt: Ahli penyelarasan Parti Buruh berkata: "Minggu kerja selama empat hari bukanlah dasar parti dan ia tidak sedang dipertimbangkan oleh parti."

src: Shadow Chancellor John McDonnell used last week's Labour conference to flesh out his vision for a socialist revolution in the economy.
mt: Timbalan Timbalan Perdana Menteri, John McDonnell, menggunakan persidangan parti Buruh minggu lalu untuk memperkembangkan lagi visi beliau bagi sebuah revolusi sosialis dalam ekonomi.

src: Mr McDonnell said he was determined to claw back power from 'faceless directors' and 'profiteers' at utility firms.
mt: Timbalan Perdana Menteri McConnell berkata beliau berkeputusan untuk memulih semula kuasa daripada 'pengarah tanpa wajah' dan 'penyedot keuntungan' di syarikat utiliti.

src: The shadow chancellor's plans also mean current shareholders in water companies may not get back their entire stake as a Labour government could make 'deductions' on the grounds of perceived wrongdoing.
mt: Rancangan Naib Menteri Kewangan itu juga bermakna pemegang saham semasa dalam syarikat-syarikat air mungkin tidak akan mendapat kembali pelancong saham mereka sepenuhnya, kerana kerajaan Parti Buruh boleh membuat 'pengekalan' atas dasar kesalahan yang disyaki.

src: He also confirmed plans to put workers on company boards and create Inclusive Ownership Funds to hand 10 per cent of private-sector firms' equity to employees, who stand to pocket annual dividends of up to £500.
mt: Beliau juga mengesahkan rancangan untuk menempatkan pekerja di papan pengarah syarikat dan mewujudkan Dana Kepemilikan Inklusif untuk menyerahkan 10 peratus daripada modal saham syarikat sektor swasta kepada pekerja, yang berpotensi menerima dividen tahunan sehingga £500.

src: Lindsey Graham, John Kennedy tell "60 Minutes" whether the FBI's investigation of Kavanaugh could change their minds
mt: Lindsey Graham dan John Kennedy memberitahu "60 Minutes" sama ada siasatan FBI terhadap Kavanaugh boleh mengubah minda mereka.

src: The FBI investigation into accusations against Judge Brett Kavanaugh has delayed a final vote on his nomination to the Supreme Court by at least a week, and raises the question of whether the bureau's findings could sway any Republican senators into pulling their support.
mt: Siasatan FBI terhadap dakwaan terhadap Hakim Brett Kavanaugh telah menangguhkan undian akhir mengenai pencalonannya ke Mahkamah Persekutuan sekurang-kurangnya selama seminggu, dan membawa ke atas soalan sama ada hasil siasatan agensi itu boleh mempengaruhi mana-mana senator Republik untuk menarik sokongan mereka.

src: In an interview airing Sunday, "60 Minutes" correspondent Scott Pelley asked Republicans Sens. John Kennedy and Lindsey Graham whether the FBI could unearth anything that would lead them to change their minds.
mt: Dalam satu temubual yang disiarkan pada hari Ahad, wartawan "60 Minutes", Scott Pelley, bertanya kepada Senator Republik John Kennedy dan Lindsey Graham sama ada Jabatan Federal Penyiasatan (FBI) dapat mengungkuap sebarang bukti yang boleh menyebabkan mereka mengubah pendirian mereka.

src: Kennedy appeared more open than his colleague from South Carolina.
mt: Kennedy kelihatan lebih terbuka berbanding rakan sejawatnya dari South Carolina.

src: "I mean, of course," said Kennedy.
mt: "Adalah tentu," kata Kennedy.

src: "I said going into the hearing, I said, I've talked to Judge Kavanaugh.
mt: "Saya berkata sebelum masuk ke dengar saksmai, saya telah berjumpa dengan Hakim Kavanaugh."

src: I called him after this happened, that allegation came out, said, 'Did you do it?'
mt: Saya menghubungi beliau selepas kejadian itu berlaku, apabila dakwaan tersebut keluar, dan saya bertanya, "Adakah anda yang melakukannya?"

src: He was resolute, determined, unequivocal."
mt: Dia bertekad, berketetapan hati, dan jelas tegas.

src: Graham's vote, however, appears set in stone.
mt: Namun, undi Graham kelihatan sudah pasti.

src: "My mind's made up about Brett Kavanaugh and it would take a dynamite accusation," he said.
mt: "Aku sudah membuat keputusan mengenai Brett Kavanaugh, dan ia memerlukan pertuduhan yang besar, katanya."

src: "Dr. Ford, I don't know what happened, but I know this: Brett denied it vigorously," Graham added, referring to Christine Blasey Ford.
mt: "Saya tidak tahu apa yang berlaku, Doktor Ford, tetapi saya tahu ini: Brett menafikannya dengan kuat," tambah Graham, merujuk kepada Christine Blasey Ford.

src: "And everybody she names couldn't verify it.
mt: "Dan setiap orang yang dia namakan tidak dapat mengesahkannya.

src: It's 36 years old.
mt: Ia berusia 36 tahun.

src: I don't see anything new changing."
mt: Saya tidak nampak sebarang perubahan baharu.

src: What is the Global Citizen Festival and Has it Done Anything to Decrease Poverty?
mt: Apakah Perkahiban Global Citizen dan adakah ia telah berjaya mengurangkan kemiskinan?

src: This Saturday New York will host the Global Citizen Festival, an annual music event which has a hugely impressive line-up of stars performing and an equally impressive mission; ending world poverty.
mt: Sabtu ini, New York akan menganjarkan Perayaan Warga Global, sebuah acara muzik tahunan yang mempunyai senarai artis yang sangat mengagumkan dan misi yang sama-sama mengagumkan, iaitu menghapuskan kemiskinan dunia.

src: Now in its seventh year, the Global Citizen Festival will see tens of thousands of people flock to Central Park's Great Lawn to not only enjoy acts such as Janet Jackson, Cardi B and Shawn Mendes, but also to raise awareness for the event's true goal of ending extreme poverty by 2030.
mt: Kini dalam tahun ketujuh, Perkhimpunan WargaNegara Global akan menarik puluhan ribu orang ke Padang Besar Taman Tengah untuk tidak hanya menikmati pelbagai pertunjukan seperti Janet Jackson, Cardi B, dan Shawn Mendes, tetapi juga untuk meningkatkan kesedaran bagi tujuan sebenar acara ini, iaitu menghapuskan kemiskinan ekstrem menjelang tahun 2030.

src: The Global Citizen Festival, which stated in 2012, is an extension of the Global Poverty Project, an international advocacy group hoping to end poverty by increasing the number of people actively fighting against it.
mt: Perkhembarangan Warganegara Global, yang pertama kali diadakan pada tahun 2012, merupakan pengembangan kepada Projek Kemiskinan Global, sebuah kumpulan advokasi antarabangsa yang berharap untuk mengakhiri kemiskinan dengan meningkatkan bilangan orang yang secara aktif berjuang menentanginya.

src: In order to receive a free ticket for the event (unless you were willing to pay for a VIP ticket), concertgoers had to complete a series of tasks, or "actions" such volunteering, emailing a world leader, making a phone call or any other meaningful ways to help raise awareness of their goal of ending poverty.
mt: Untuk mendapatkan tiket percuma bagi acara tersebut (kecuali jika anda bersedia membayar untuk tiket VIP), penonton konsert perlu menamatkan satu siri tugasan atau "aksi" seperti menjadi sukarelawan, menghantar e-mel kepada seorang pemimpin dunia, membuat panggilan telefon, atau sebarang cara bermakna lain untuk membantu meningkatkan kesedaran mengenai matlamat mereka untuk menghapuskan kemiskinan.

src: But just how successful has Global Citizen been with 12 years left to achieve its goal?
mt: Bagaimanakah kejayaan Global Citizen dengan 12 tahun lagi untuk mencapai matlamatnya?

src: Is the idea of rewarding people with a free concert a genuine way to persuade people to demand a call for action, or just another case of so-called "clicktivism" - people feeling like they are making a true difference by signing an online petition or sending a tweet?
mt: Adakah idea memberi hadiah berupa persembahan muzik percuma merupakan cara yang benar-benar berkesan untuk membimbangkan orang ramai agar menuntut tindakan, atau sekadar lagi satu kes "kliktisme" yang disebarkah—di mana individu merasa telah membuat perbezaan sebenar dengan menandatangani petisyen dalam talian atau menghantar tweet?

src: Since 2011, Global Citizen says it has recorded more than 19 million "actions" from its supporters, pushing for a host of different goals.
mt: Sejak 2011, Global Citizen berkata ia telah merakam lebih daripada 19 juta "aksi" daripada sokongannya, yang mendorong bagi pelbagai matlamat yang berbeza.

src: It says that these actions have helped spur world leaders to announce commitments and policies equating to more than $37 billion that is set to affect the lives of more than 2.25 billion people by 2030.
mt: Ia menyatakan bahawa tindakan-tindakan ini telah membantu mendorong pemimpin-pemimpin dunia untuk mengumumkan komitmen dan dasar-dasar yang setara dengan lebih daripada $37 bilion yang dijangka menjejaskan kehidupan lebih daripada 2.25 bilion orang menjelang tahun 2030.

src: In early 2018, the group cited 390 commitments and announcements stemming from its actions, at least $10 billion of which have already been disbursed or fundraised.
mt: Pada awal 2018, kumpulan itu mengutip 390 komitmen dan pengumuman yang timbul daripada tindakan mereka, dengan sekurang-kurangnya $10 bilion daripada jumlah tersebut telah dibayar atau dikumpul dana.

src: The group estimates the secured funds have so far made a direct impact on nearly 649 million people across the world.
mt: Kumpulan ini memperkirakangkan dana yang dikumpul telah memberi impak langsung kepada hampir 649 juta orang di seluruh dunia.

src: Some of the key commitments include The Power of Nutrition, a U.K. based partnership of investors and implementers committed to "helping children grow to their full potential," promising to provide Rwanda with $35 million to help end malnutrition in the county after receiving more than 4,700 tweets from Global Citizens.
mt: Sebahagian daripada komitmen utama termasuk The Power of Nutrition, sebuah rakan kongsi di United Kingdom yang terdiri daripada pelabur dan pelaksana yang komited untuk "membantu kanak-kanak mencapai potensi penuh mereka," yang berjanji untuk memberikan Rwanda sebanyak $35 juta bagi membantu mengakhiri kemalnutrisian di negara itu selepas menerima lebih daripada 4,700 tweet daripada Global Citizens.

src: "With support from the UK government, donors, national governments, and Global Citizens just like you, we can make the social injustice of undernutrition a footnote in history," The Power of Nutrition ambassador Tracey Ullman told the crowd during a live concert in London in April 2018.
mt: "Dengan sokongan daripada kerajaan UK, para donator, kerajaan negara, dan Warga Global seperti anda, kami boleh menjadikan ketidakadilan sosial akibat kurang nutrien sebagai catatan kecil dalam sejarah," kata duta Kuasa Nutrisi, Tracey Ullman, kepada orang ramai semasa konsert langsung di London pada April 2018.

src: The group also said that after more than 5,000 actions were taken calling on the U.K. improve nutrition for mothers and children, the government announced funding for a project, the Power of Nutrition, that will reach 5 million women and children with nutrition interventions.
mt: Kumpulan itu juga berkata bahawa selepas lebih 5,000 tindakan yang diambil untuk menyeru United Kingdom memperbaiki pemakanan bagi ibu dan kanak-kanak, kerajaan mengumumkan peruntukan untuk satu projek, iaitu Kuasa Pemakanan, yang akan menjangkau 5 juta wanita dan kanak-kanak dengan campur tangan pemakanan.

src: In response to one of the FAQs on its website asking "what makes you think we can end extreme poverty?"
mt: Sebagai tindak balas kepada salah satu soalan yang sering ditanyakan di laman web mereka yang bertanya, "Adakah anda yakin bahawa kita boleh mengakhiri kemiskinan ekstrem?"

src: Global citizen replied: "It'll be a long and hard path - sometimes we will fall and fail.
mt: Warga dunia global itu membalas: "Ini akan menjadi jalan yang panjang dan sukar—kadang-kadang kita akan jatuh dan gagal."

src: But, like the great civil rights and anti-apartheid movements before us, we will succeed, because we are more powerful together.
mt: Namun, seperti pergerakan hak-hak sivil dan anti-apartheid yang hebat sebelum kita, kami akan berjaya, kerana kami lebih berkuasa apabila bersatu.

src: Janet Jackson, the Weeknd, Shawn Mendes, Cardi B, Janelle Monáe are among some of the acts performing at this year's event in New York, which will be hosted by Deborra-Lee Furness and Hugh Jackman.
mt: Janet Jackson, The Weeknd, Shawn Mendes, Cardi B, dan Janelle Monáe merupakan sebahagian daripada pelakon-pelakon yang akan tampil pada acara tahun ini di New York, yang akan dipengerusikan oleh Deborra-Lee Furness dan Hugh Jackman.

src: US could use Navy for "blockade" to hamper Russian energy exports - Interior Secretary
mt: Amerika Syarikat mungkin menggunakan armada laut untuk "pemblokauan" bagi menggagalkan eksport tenaga Rusia – Setiausaha Dalam Negeri

src: Washington can "if necessary" resort to its Navy to prevent Russian energy hitting the markets, including in the Middle East, US Internal Secretary Ryan Zinke has revealed, as cited by Washington Examiner.
mt: Washington boleh memulangkan tentera lautnya sekiranya perlu untuk menghalang tenaga Rusia daripada memasuki pasaran, termasuk di Timur Tengah, seperti yang telah dibaringkan oleh Setiausaha Dalam Negeri Washington, Ryan Zinke, menurut Washington Examiner.

src: Zinke alleged that Russia's engagement in Syria - notably, where it is operating at the invitation of the legitimate government - is a pretext to explore new energy markets.
mt: Zinke mendakwa bahawa keterlibatan Rusia di Syria, khususnya di mana ia beroperasi atas undangan kerajaan yang sah, hanyalah hiasan untuk meneroka pasaran tenaga baharu.

src: "I believe the reason they are in the Middle East is they want to broker energy just like they do in eastern Europe, the southern belly of Europe," he has reportedly said.
mt: "Menurut laporannya, beliau berkata, 'Saya percaya sebab mereka berada di Timur Tengah ialah kerana mereka ingin membincangkan tenaga seperti yang mereka lakukan di Eropah Timur, bahagian perut selatan Eropah.'"

src: And, according to to the official, there are ways and means to tackle it.
mt: Dan, menurut pegawai rasmi itu, terdapat kaedah dan cara untuk menanganinya.

src: "The United States has that ability, with our Navy, to make sure the sea lanes are open, and, if necessary, to blockade, to make sure that their energy does not go to market," he said.
mt: "Amerika Syarikat mempunyai keupayaan itu, dengan armada laut kami, untuk memastikan laluan laut tetap terbuka, dan, jika perlu, untuk membendung supaya tenaga mereka tidak sampai ke pasaran," katanya.

src: Zinke was addressing the attendees of the event hosted by the Consumer Energy Alliance, a non-profit group which styles itself as the "voice of the energy consumer" in the US.
mt: Zinke sedang berucap kepada peserta dalam acara yang dikendalikan oleh Aliansi Tenaga Pengguna, sebuah kumpulan bukan untung yang bergaya diri sebagai "suara pengguna tenaga" di Amerika Syarikat.

src: He went to compare Washington's approaches to dealing with Russia and Iran, noting that they are effectively the same.
mt: Dia pergi untuk membandingkan pendekatan Washington dalam menangani Rusia dan Iran, mencatat bahawa kedua-duanya adalah secara berkesan sama.

src: "The economic option on Iran and Russia is, more or less, leveraging and replacing fuels," he said, while referring to Russia as a "one trick pony" with an economy dependent on fossil fuels.
mt: "Oleh itu, pilihan ekonomi terhadap Iran dan Rusia adalah lebih kurang memaksimumkan dan menggantikan bahan api," katanya, sambil merujuk kepada Rusia sebagai "seekor kuda yang hanya pandai satu trik" dengan ekonomi yang bergantung kepada bahan api fosil.

src: The statements come as Trump administration has been on a mission to boost the export of its liquefied natural gas to Europe, replacing Russia, the far cheaper option for European consumers.
mt: Pernyataan tersebut dibuat ketika pentadbiran Trump sedang berusaha meningkatkan eksport gas asli cecair (LNG) ke Eropah, menggantikan Rusia, pilihan yang jauh lebih murah untuk pengguna Eropah.

src: For that effect, the Trump administration officials, including US President Donald Trump himself, try to persuade Germany to pull out of the "inappropriate" Nord Stream 2 pipeline project, which according to Trump, made Berlin Moscow's "captive."
mt: Bagaimanapun, pegawai-pegawai pentadbiran Trump, termasuk Presiden Amerika Syarikat sendiri, Donald Trump, cuba meyakinkan Jerman untuk keluar daripada projek paip Nord Stream 2 yang "tidak sesuai", yang menurut Trump menjadikan Berlin sebagai "tawanan" Moscow.

src: Moscow has repeatedly stressed that the $11 billion Nord Stream 2 pipeline, which is set to double the existing pipeline capacity to 110 billion cubic meters, is a purely economic project.
mt: Moscow telah berulang kali menekankan bahawa projek paip Nord Stream 2 bernilai $11 bilion, yang dijangkakan mengkapasiti paip sedia ada dua kali ganda kepada 110 bilion meter padu, adalah sepenuhnya projek ekonomi.

src: The Kremlin argues that Washington's fervent opposition to the project is simply driven by economic reasons and is an example of unfair competition.
mt: Kremlin berpendapat bahawa perlawanan hangat Washington terhadap projek ini hanyalah dipacu oleh alasan ekonomi dan merupakan contoh persaingan yang tidak adil.

src: "I believe we share the view that energy cannot be a tool to exercise pressure and that consumers should be able to choose the suppliers," Russian Energy Minister Aleksandr Novak said following a meeting with US Energy Secretary Rick Perry in Moscow in September.
mt: "Saya percaya bahawa kita bersepadu dalam pandangan bahawa tenaga tidak boleh dijadikan alat untuk memayankan tekanan dan bahawa pengguna harus mempunyai pilihan untuk memilih pembekal," kata Menteri Tenaga Rusia, Aleksandr Novak, selepas satu mesyuarat dengan Setiausaha Tenaga Amerika Syarikat, Rick Perry, di Moscow pada bulan September.

src: The US stance has drawn backlash from Germany, which has reaffirmed its commitment to the project.
mt: Stansi Amerika Syarikat telah menarik serangan balik daripada Jerman, yang telah mengukuhkan komitmen mereka terhadap projek tersebut.

src: Germany's leading organization for industry, the Federation of German Industries (BDI), has called on the US to stay away from the EU energy policy and the bilateral agreements between Berlin and Moscow.
mt: Pertubuhan industri terkemuka Jerman, Persekutuan Industri Jerman (BDI), telah menyeru Amerika Syarikat untuk menjauhi dasar tenaga Kesatuan Eropah dan perjanjian dwibahagian antara Berlin dan Moscow.

src: "I have a big problem when a third state interferes in our energy supply," Dieter Kempf, head of the Federation of German Industries (BDI) said following a recent meeting between German Chancellor Angela Merkel and Russian President Vladimir Putin.
mt: "Kita menghadapi masalah besar apabila sebuah negara ketiga campur tangan dalam bekalan tenaga kita," kata Dieter Kempf, pengerusian Gabungan Perindustrian Jerman (BDI), selepas mesyuarat baru-baru ini antara Canselor Jerman Angela Merkel dan Presiden Rusia Vladimir Putin.

src: Elizabeth Warren Will Take "Hard Look" At Running For President in 2020, Massachusetts Senator Says
mt: Senator Massachusetts Elizabeth Warren Akan Meninjau Kemasukan Bersungguh-sungguh Untuk Bertanding Dalam Pilihan Raya Presiden 2020

src: Massachusetts Senator Elizabeth Warren said on Saturday she would take a "hard look" at running for president following the midterm elections.
mt: Senator Elizabeth Warren dari Massachusetts berkata pada hari Sabtu bahawa dia akan membuat pertimbangan yang teliti mengenai pencalonannya sebagai presiden selepas pilihan raya pertengahan.

src: During a town hall in Holyoke, Massachusetts, Warren confirmed she'd consider running.
mt: Semasa sebuah forum awam di Holyoke, Massachusetts, Warren mengesahkan beliau akan pertimbangkan untuk bertanding.

src: "It's time for women to go to Washington and fix our broken government and that includes a woman at the top," she said, according to The Hill.
mt: "Waktunya wanita pergi ke Washington dan membetulkan kerajaan yang rosak kita, dan ia merangkumi seorang wanita di puncak," katanya, menurut The Hill.

src: "After November 6, I will take a hard look at running for president."
mt: Selepas 6 November, saya akan mengambil langkah serius untuk menubuhkan diri sebagai calon presiden.

src: Warren weighed in on President Donald Trump during the town hall, saying he was "taking this county in the wrong direction.
mt: Warren menasihati Presiden Donald Trump semasa majlis town hall, dengan berkata beliau "menyedari arah salah untuk county ini".

src: "I am worried down to my bones about what Donald Trump is doing to our democracy," she said.
mt: "Saya sangat prihatin sehingga ke tulang tentang apa yang Donald Trump lakukan terhadap demokrasi kita," katanya.

src: Warren has been outspoken in her criticism of Trump and his Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh.
mt: Warren telah bersuara keras mengkritik Trump dan calon mahkamah agaranya, Brett Kavanaugh.

src: In a tweet on Friday, Warren said "of course we need an FBI investigation before voting."
mt: Dalam satu tweet pada Khamis, Warren berkata, "tentu kita perlukan siasatan FBI sebelum mengundi."

src: A poll released on Thursday, however, showed a majority of Warren's own constituents do not think she should run in 2020.
mt: Sebuah kajian yang dikeluarkan pada hari Khamis itu menunjukkan bahawa kebanyakan penyokong Warren sendiri tidak menjangkanya akan bertanding dalam pilihan raya tahun 2020.

src: Fifty-eight percent of "likely" Massachusetts voters said the senator should not run, according to the Suffolk University Political Research Center/Boston Globe poll.
mt: Lima puluh-eight peratus daripada pengundi Massachusetts yang "mungkin" mengundi berkata senator tidak sepatutnya bertanding, menurut polling Pusat Penyelidikan Politik Universiti Suffolk/Boston Globe.

src: Thirty-two percent supported such a run.
mt: Tiga puluh dua peratus menyokong perlaksanaan tersebut.

src: The poll showed more support for a run by former Governor Deval Patrick, with 38 percent supporting a potential run and 48 percent against it.
mt: Suruhanjaya tersebut menunjukkan sokongan yang lebih besar terhadap calon rasmi bekas Timbalan Presiden Deval Patrick, dengan 38 peratus menyokong potensi larian beliau dan 48 peratus menentang.

src: Other high profile Democratic names discussed in regard to a potential 2020 run include former Vice President Joe Biden and Vermont Senator Bernie Sanders.
mt: Nama-nama Demokrat lain yang dibincangkan berhubung dengan peluang bertanding dalam pilihan raya 2020 termasuk bekas Naib Presiden Joe Biden dan Senator Vermont Bernie Sanders.

src: Biden said he would decide officially by January, the Associated Press reported.
mt: Menurut Associated Press, Biden berkata beliau akan membuat keputusan rasmi pada Januari.

src: Sarah Palin cites Track Palin's PTSD at Donald Trump rally
mt: Sarah Palin merujuk kepada PTSD Track Palin semasa perhimpunan Donald Trump.

src: Track Palin, 26, spent a year in Iraq after enlisting on Sept.
mt: Pencarian Palin, 26, telah menghabiskan setahun di Iraq selepas mendaftar pada September.

src: He was arrested and charged in a domestic violence incident on Monday night
mt: Dia ditahan dan dakwa atas kejadian keganasan rumah tangga pada malam Ahad.

src: "What my own son is going through, what he is going through coming back, I can relate to other families who feel ramifications of PTSD and some of the woundedness that our soldiers do return with," she told the audience at a rally for Donald Trump in Tulsa, Oklahoma.
mt: "Apakah yang anak saya sendiri alami, dan apa yang dialaminya apabila kembali, boleh saya rasakan oleh keluarga-keluarga lain yang merasakan ramalan PTSD dan sebahagian daripada kecederaan yang diderita oleh askar kita apabila mereka kembali," katanya kepada hadirin pada sebuah perhimpunan untuk Donald Trump di Tulsa, Oklahoma.

src: Palin called his arrest "the elephant in the room" and said of her son and other war veterans, "they come back a bit different, they come back hardened, they come back wondering if there is that respect for what it is that their fellow soldiers and airmen, and every other member of the military, has given to the country."
mt: Palin menyebut penangkapannya sebagai "gajah dalam bilik" dan berkata mengenai putranya dan veteran perang lain, "mereka kembali sedikit berbeza, mereka kembali dengan hati yang keras, mereka kembali bertanya-tanya sama ada ada penghormatan terhadap apa yang diberikan oleh rekan-rakan tentera dan anggota-anggota udara mereka, serta setiap ahli lain dalam tentera, kepada negara."

src: He was arrested on Monday in Wasilla, Alaska, and charged with domestic violence assault on a female, interfering with a report of domestic violence and possession of a weapon while intoxicated, according to Dan Bennett, a spokesman for the Wasilla Police Department.
mt: Beliau ditahan pada hari Isnin di Wasilla, Alaska, dan dakwa dengan serangan ke atas wanita dalam keraaan rumah, mengganggu laporan ke atas kekerasan rumah dan mempunyai senjata semasa dalam keadaan mabuk, menurut Dan Bennett, seorang peneraju bagi Jabatatan Polis Wasilla.

src: 18 states, D.C. support challenge to new asylum policy
mt: 18 buah negeri dan DC menyokong cabaran terhadap dasar pengungsi baharu

src: Eighteen states and the District of Columbia are supporting a legal challenge to a new U.S. policy that denies asylum to victims fleeing gang or domestic violence.
mt: Delapan belas negeri dan Wilayah Washington, D.C. menyokong cabaran undang-undang terhadap dasar baru Amerika Syarikat yang menafikan perlindungan perlindungan asylum kepada mangsa yang melarikan diri daripada pergaduhan dalam kumpulan jenayah atau keganasan rumah tangga.

src: Representatives from the 18 states and the district filed a friend-of-the-court brief Friday in Washington to support an asylum-seeker challenging the policy, NBC News reported.
mt: Naib Presiden Joe Biden, dalam satu kenyataan hari Khamis, berkata beliau "terkejut dan sedih" dengan tindakan Trump untuk menentang pelan tersebut.

src: The full name of the plaintiff in the Grace v. Sessions suit that the American Civil Liberties Union filed in August against the federal policy has not been revealed.
mt: Nama penuh plaintiff dalam kes Grace v. Sessions yang difailkan oleh American Civil Liberties Union pada bulan Ogos terhadap dasar persekutuan itu belum diumumkan.

src: She said her partner "and his violent gang member sons," abused her but U.S. officials denied her request for asylum July 20.
mt: Dia berkata rakan sebaya dan anak-anak perempuannya yang merupakan ahli kumpulan jenayah ganas menyalahgunakannya, namun pegawai Amerika Syarikat menafikan permohonannya untuk perlindungan awam pada 20 Julai.

src: She was detained in Texas.
mt: Dia ditahan di Texas.

src: The states' attorneys supporting Grace described El Salvador, Honduras and Guatemala, which produce a large number of applicants for U.S. asylum, as nations facing pervasive problems with gangs and domestic violence.
mt: Para peguam negeri yang menyokong Grace menggambarkan El Salvador, Honduras dan Guatemala, yang menghasilkan ramai pelamar sukan ke Amerika Syarikat, sebagai negara yang menghadapi masalah mendalam dengan geng dan keganasan dalaman.

src: The new U.S. asylum policy reversed a 2014 decision by the Board of Immigrant Appeals that allowed undocumented immigrants fleeing domestic violence to apply for asylum.
mt: Kebijakan penempatan pelindung AS yang baru telah membatalkan keputusan Jawatankuasa Bandaran Pengemigran pada tahun 2014 yang membenarkan pendatang asing tanpa status yang melarikan diri daripada keganasan rumah tangga untuk memohon perlindungan.

src: District of Columbia Attorney General Karl Racine said in a statement Friday that the new policy "ignores decades of state, federal, and international law."
mt: Penghulu Peguam Negeri Washington DC, Karl Racine, berkata dalam kenyataan pada Jumaat bahawa dasar baharu itu "mengabaikan seabad undang-undang negeri, persekutuan, dan antarabangsa."

src: "Federal law requires that all asylum claims be adjudicated on the particular facts and circumstances of the claim, and such a bar violates that principle," the friend-of-the court brief said.
mt: Undang-undang persekutuan memerlukan bahawa semua tuntutan suaka diselesaikan berdasarkan fakta dan keadaan khusus bagi tuntutan tersebut, dan larangan sedemikian melanggar prinsip itu, kata hujah rakan mahkamah.

src: Attorneys further argued in the brief that the policy denying immigrants entry hurts the U.S. economy, saying they are more likely to become entrepreneurs and "supply necessary labor."
mt: Ahli-ahli undang-undang juga berdebat dalam hujah tersebut bahawa dasar yang menafikan pemindahan masuk kepada pemegang imigresyen merosakkan ekonomi Amerika Syarikat, kerana mereka lebih cenderung menjadi usahawan dan "menyediakan tenaga kerja yang diperlukan."

src: Attorney General Jeff Sessions ordered immigration judges to no longer grant asylum to victims fleeing domestic abuse and gang violence in June.
mt: Ketua Peguam Negara Jeff Sessions telah mengarahkan hakim-jamim imigresyen supaya tidak lagi mengiktiraskan hak suaka kepada mangsa yang melarikan diri daripada keganasan rumah tangga dan keganasan kumpulan jenayah pada bulan Jun.

src: "Asylum is available for those who leave their home country because of persecution or fear on account of race, religion, nationality, or membership in a particular social group or political opinion," Sessions said in his June 11 announcement of the policy.
mt: "Perlindungan diberikan kepada mereka yang meninggalkan negara asal mereka kerana kebuluran atau rasa takut kerana ras, agama, kebangsaan, atau keahlian dalam kumpulan sosial tertentu atau pendirian politik," kata Sessions dalam pengumuman kejenayahnya pada 11 Jun.

src: Asylum was never meant to alleviate all problems -- even all serious problems -- that people face every day all over the world.
mt: Asylum bukan sekali lagi bermaksud untuk meredakan semua masalah -- walaupun semua masalah serius -- yang dihadapi oleh orang-orang setiap hari di seluruh dunia.

src: Desperate rescue efforts in Palu as death toll doubles in race to find survivors
mt: Upayaan penyelamatan yang desperat di Palu apabila bilangan kematian berlipat dalam usaha mencari mangsa yang masih hidup.

src: For survivors, the situation was increasingly dire.
mt: Bagi para yang selamat, keadaan semakin teruk.

src: "It feels very tense," said 35-year-old mother Risa Kusuma, comforting her feverish baby boy at an evacuation centre in the gutted city of Palu.
mt: "Perasaan ini sangat tegang," kata ibu berusia 35 tahun, Risa Kusuma, sambil menenangkan anak lelakinya yang demam di pusat evakuasi di bandar Palu yang telah rosak.

src: "Every minute an ambulance brings in bodies.
mt: "Tiap-tiap minit, ambulans membawa masuk jenazah.

src: Clean water is scarce."
mt: Air bersih itu langka.

src: Residents were seen returning to their destroyed homes, picking through waterlogged belongings, trying to salvage anything they could find.
mt: Penduduk dilihat pulang ke rumah yang hancur, memeriksa barang-barang yang terendam air, dan berusaha menyelamatkan apa-apa yang masih boleh diselamatkan.

src: Hundreds of people were injured and hospitals, damaged by the magnitude 7.5 quake, were overwhelmed.
mt: Beratus-ratus orang cedera dan hospital yang rosak akibat gempa bumi berkuat kuasa 7.5 menjadi teruk.

src: Some of the injured, including Dwi Haris, who suffered a broken back and shoulder, rested outside Palu's Army Hospital, where patients were being treated outdoors due to continuing strong aftershocks.
mt: Sebilangan mangsa, termasuk Dwi Haris yang mengalami patah tulang belakang dan bahu, berehat di luar Hospital Tentera Palu, di mana pesakit dirawat di luar kerana guncangan susulan yang kuat masih berterusan.

src: Tears filled his eyes as he recounted feeling the violent earthquake shake the fifth-floor hotel room he shared with his wife and daughter.
mt: Air mata membasahi matanya apabila ia menceritakan bagaimana gempa bumi yang ganas itu mengguncang bilik hotel tingkat kelima yang dikongsi bersama isteri dan anaknya.

src: "There was no time to save ourselves.
mt: Tiada masa untuk menyelamat diri.

src: I was squeezed into the ruins of the wall, I think," Haris told Associated Press, adding that his family was in town for a wedding.
mt: "Awak terseret masuk ke dalam reruntuhan dinding itu, saya rasa," kata Haris kepada Associated Press, menambah bahawa keluarganya sedang berada di bandar itu untuk sebuah pernikahan.

src: "I heard my wife cry for help, but then silence.
mt: Saya terdengar isteri saya menjerit minta tolong, kemudian kesunyian.

src: I don't know what happened to her and my child.
mt: Saya tidak tahu apa yang telah berlaku kepadanya dan kepada anak saya.

src: I hope they are safe."
mt: Saya berharap mereka selamat.

src: U.S. ambassador accuses China of 'bullying' with 'propaganda ads'
mt: Duta AS menuduh China melakukan 'bulu' dengan 'iklan propaganda'

src: A week after an official Chinese newspaper ran a four-page ad in a U.S. daily touting the mutual benefits of U.S.-China trade, the U.S. ambassador to China accused Beijing of using the American press to spread propaganda.
mt: Satu minggu selepas akhbar rasmi China menyiarkan iklan empat muka surat dalam akhbar harian Amerika Syarikat yang mempromosikan faedah dua hala perdagangan antara Amerika Syarikat dan China, duta besar Amerika Syarikat di China menuduh Beijing menggunakan media Amerika untuk menyebarkan propaganda.

src: U.S. President Donald Trump last Wednesday referred to the China Daily's paid supplement in the Des Moines Register - the state of Iowa's biggest selling newspaper - after accusing China of seeking to meddle in the Nov. 6 U.S. congressional elections, a charge China denies.
mt: Presiden Amerika Syarikat, Donald Trump, pada Rabu lepas merujuk kepada terbitan berbayar China Daily dalam akhbar Des Moines Register - akhbar terlaris di negeri Iowa - selepas menuduh China cuba campur tangan dalam pilihan raya kongres AS pada 6 November, sebuah dakwaan yang ditolak oleh China.

src: Trump's accusation that Beijing was trying to meddle in U.S. elections marked what U.S. officials told Reuters was a new phase in an escalating campaign by Washington to put pressure on China.
mt: Penafian Trump bahawa Beijing cuba mengganggu pilihan raya AS menandakan fasa baharu dalam kempen yang semakin meningkat oleh Washington untuk menekan China, menurut pegawai AS yang memberitahu Reuters.

src: While it is normal for foreign governments to place advertisements to promote trade, Beijing and Washington are currently locked in an escalating trade war that has seen them level rounds of tariffs on each other's imports.
mt: Walaupun ia adalah normal bagi kerajaan asing untuk memaparkan iklan bagi mempromosikan perdagangan, Beijing dan Washington kini terkunci dalam satu pergaduan perdagangan yang semakin meruncing yang telah menyaksikan mereka mengenakan beberapa putaran cukai import ke atas import masing-masing.

src: China's retaliatory tariffs early in the trade war were designed to hit exporters in states such as Iowa that supported Trump's Republican Party, Chinese and U.S. experts have said.
mt: Pakar-pakar China dan AS telah berkata, caj balasan awal China dalam perang perdagangan itu direka untuk menjejaskan eksportur di negeri-negeri seperti Iowa yang menyokong parti Republikan Trump.

src: Terry Branstad, the U.S. ambassador to China and the former longtime governor of Iowa, a major exporter of agricultural goods to China, said Beijing had hurt American workers, farmers and businesses.
mt: Terry Branstad, duta besar Amerika Syarikat kepada China dan bekas gubernur lama Iowa, sebuah negeri pendarat utama barang-barang pertanian ke China, berkata Beijing telah melukai pekerja, petani, dan perniagaan Amerika Syarikat.

src: China, Branstad wrote in an opinion piece in Sunday's Des Moines Register, "is now doubling down on that bullying by running propaganda ads in our own free press."
mt: China, seperti yang ditulis Branstad dalam satu artikel pendirian dalam edisi Ahad Des Moines Register, "kini memperkasakan serangan balasannya itu dengan menjalankan iklan propaganda dalam media arus perdana kita sendiri yang bebas."

src: "In disseminating its propaganda, China's government is availing itself of America's cherished tradition of free speech and a free press by placing a paid advertisement in the Des Moines Register," Branstad wrote.
mt: "Dalam mempromosikan propaganda, kerajaan China menggunakan tradisi hak kebebasan bercakap dan kebebasan media yang dikehendaki oleh Amerika dengan meletakkan iklan berbayar dalam Des Moines Register," kata Branstad.

src: "In contrast, at the newsstand down the street here in Beijing, you will find limited dissenting voices and will not see any true reflection of the disparate opinions that the Chinese people may have on China's troubling economic trajectory, given that media is under the firm thumb of the Chinese Communist Party," he wrote.
mt: "Sebaliknya, di kedai koran di sepanjang jalan di sini di Beijing, anda hanya akan menemui suara pembangkang yang terhad dan tidak akan melihat sebarang pantulan sebenar bagi pelbagai pendapat yang mungkin dimiliki rakyat China terhadap perkembangan ekonomi China yang mencemaskan, memandangkan media berada di bawah kawalan ketat Parti Komunis China," tulis beliau.

src: He added that "one of China's most prominent newspapers dodged the offer to publish" his article, although he did not say which newspaper.
mt: Dia menambah bahawa "salah satu akhbar paling terkemuka di China mengelakkan tawaran untuk memuatkan" artikelnya, walaupun beliau tidak menyebut akhbar tersebut.

src: Republicans Alienating Women Voters Ahead of Midterms With Kavanaugh Debacle, Analysts Warn
mt: Repulikan meminggirkan pengundi wanita menjelang pilihan raya pertengahan, amaran analis berikran kes Kavanaugh.

src: As many top Republicans stand-by and defend Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh in the face of several allegations of sexual assault, analyst have warned they will see a backlash, particularly from women, during the upcoming midterm elections.
mt: Apabila banyak ahli Republik terkemuka berkhidmat sebagai pemegang amanah dan mempertahankan penjawat jawatan Mahkamah Persekutuan, Brett Kavanaugh, berhadapan dengan beberapa tuduhan penderaan seksual, para penganalisis telah memberi amaran bahawa mereka akan menyaksikan gelombang balasan, terutamanya daripada wanita, semasa pilihan raya pertengahan yang akan datang.

src: The emotions surrounding this have been extremely high, and most Republicans are on record already showing they wanted to go forward with a vote.
mt: Perasaan yang mengelilingi perkara ini sangat tinggi, dan kebanyakan Republikan telah menyatakan niat mereka untuk melangsungkan undian.

src: Those things can't be walked back," Grant Reeher, a professor of political science at Syracuse University's Maxwell School told The Hill for an article published Saturday.
mt: "Kejadian-kejadian tersebut tidak boleh dipulihkan semula," kata Grant Reeher, seorang profesor ilmu politik di Sekolah Maxwell, Universiti Syracuse, kepada The Hill dalam artikel yang diterbitkan pada hari Sabtu.

src: Reeher said he doubts Senator Jeff Flake's (R-Arizona) last-minute push for an FBI investigation will be enough to placate angry voters.
mt: Reeher berkata bahawa beliau ragu bahawa usaha Senator Jeff Flake (R-Arizona) pada saat akhir untuk menghasuskan siasatan FBI mencukupi untuk menenangkan pemilih yang marah.

src: "Women are not going to forget what happened yesterday - they are not going to forget it tomorrow and not in November," Karine Jean-Pierre, a senior adviser and national spokeswoman for the progressive group MoveOn said on Friday, according to the Washington, D.C. newspaper.
mt: "Wanita tidak akan melupakan apa yang berlaku semalam – mereka tidak akan melupakannya esok dan bukan pada bulan November," kata Karine Jean-Pierre, seorang penasihat kanan dan jurucakap negara bagi kumpulan berhaluan kiri, MoveOn, pada Jumaat, menurut akhbar Washington, D.C.

src: On Friday morning, protestors chanted "November is coming!" as they demonstrated in the hallway of the Senate as the Republicans controlling the Judiciary Committee chose to move forward with Kavanaugh's nomination despite the testimony of Dr. Christine Blasey Ford, Mic reported.
mt: Pada pagi Jumaat, para penunjuk arah menyanyikan slogan "November akan datang!" semasa mereka memprotes di lorong Senat, apabila parti Republik yang mengawal Jawatankuasa Kehakiman memutuskan untuk meneruskan penyertaan Kavanaugh walaupun terdapat kesaksian Dr. Christine Blasey Ford, lapor Mic.

src: "Democratic enthusiasm and motivation is going to be off the chart," Stu Rothenberg, a nonpartisan political analyst, told the news site.
mt: "Antusiasme dan motivasi demokrasi akan berada di tahap luar biasa," kata Stu Rothenberg, seorang penyelidik politik yang tidak bersikap berpihak, kepada laman berita tersebut.

src: "People are saying it's already been high; that's true.
mt: Orang-orang mengatakan ia sudah tinggi; itu benar.

src: But it could be higher, particularly among swing women voters in the suburbs and younger voters, 18- to 29-year-olds, who while they don't like the president, often don't vote."
mt: Namun ia boleh menjadi lebih tinggi, terutamanya di kalangan pemilih wanita yang berminat di daerah luar bandar dan pemilih yang lebih muda, iaitu mereka berumur 18 hingga 29 tahun, yang walaupun tidak menyokong presiden, sering kali tidak memungut undian.

src: Even before Ford's public testimony detailing her allegations of sexual assault against the Supreme Court nominee, analysts suggested a backlash could follow if Republicans pushed forward with the confirmation.
mt: Sebelum pertubuhan rasmi Ford yang mendedahkan dakwaan penderaannya seksual terhadap calon Mahkamah Persekutuan, para penyelidik sudah menganggarkan bahawa sebuah gelombang reaksi negatif mungkin berlaku jika parti Republikan meneruskan proses pengesahan tersebut.

src: "This has become a muddled mess for the GOP," said Michael Steele, former chairman of the Republican National Committee, early last week, according to NBC News.
mt: "Inkara menjadi kekacauan yang membingungkan bagi Parti Republikan," kata Michael Steele, bekas pengerusi Jawatankuasa Kebangsaan Republik, pada awal minggu lepas, menurut NBC News.

src: "It's just not about the committee vote or the final vote or whether Kavanaugh is put on the bench, it's also about the way Republicans have handled this and how they have treated her," Guy Cecil, director of Priorities USA, a group that helps to elect Democrats, pointed out to the news channel.
mt: "Masalahnya bukan sekadar mengenai undian jawatankuasa, undian akhir, atau sama ada Kavanaugh akan diletakkan di bangku hakim, tetapi juga tentang cara parti Republik menangani perkara ini dan bagaimana mereka memperlakarkan beliau," kata Guy Cecil, ketua Priorities USA, sebuah kumpulan yang membantu mengundi parti Demokrat kepada saluran berita itu.

src: However, Americans appear to be somewhat split over who to believe in the wake of Ford's and Kavanaugh's testimonies, with slightly more siding with the latter.
mt: Walau bagaimanapun, orang Amerika nampaknya agak terbahagi mengenai siapa yang perlu dipercayai berikutan kesaksian Ford dan Kavanaugh, dengan sedikit lebih ramai memihak kepada yang terakhir.

src: A new poll from YouGov shows that 41 percent of respondents definitely or probably believed Ford's testimony, while 35 percent said they definitely or probably believed Kavanaugh.
mt: Sebuah penyiasan terkini daripada YouGov menunjukkan bahawa 41 peratus responden bersetuju atau cenderung bersetuju dengan keterangan Ford, manakala 35 peratus mengatakan mereka bersetuju atau cenderung bersetuju dengan Kavanaugh.

src: Additionally, 38 percent said they thought Kavanaugh has probably or definitely lied during his testimony, while just 30 percent said the same about Ford.
mt: Selain itu, 38 peratus berkata mereka percaya Kavanaugh telah berbohong semasa kesaksiannya atau mungkin berbohong, manakala hanya 30 peratus yang mengatakan perkara yang sama mengenai Ford.

src: After the push from Flake, the FBI is currently investigating the allegations brought forward by Ford as well as at least one other accuser, Deborah Ramirez, The Guardian reported.
mt: Selepas tekanan daripada Flake, Biro Pemburu Jenayah Federal (FBI) sedang menyiasat dakwaan yang dikemukakan oleh Ford serta sekurang-kurangnya seorang penuduh lain, Deborah Ramirez, seperti dilaporkan oleh The Guardian.

src: Ford testified before the Senate Judiciary Committee under oath last week that Kavanaugh drunkenly assaulted her at the age of 17.
mt: Ford bersaksi di hadapan Jawatankuasa Perundangan Senat dengan bersumpah minggu lalu bahawa Kavanaugh telah memalukannya secara mabuk pada usia 17 tahun.

src: Ramirez alleges that the Supreme Court nominee exposed his genitals to her while they attended a party during their time studying at Yale in the 1980s.
mt: Ramirez mendakwa calon Mahkamah Agung itu telah mendedahkan bahagian organ intimnya kepadanya semasa mereka menghadiri sebuah pesta semasa mereka belajar di Yale pada 1980-an.

src: The Inventor of the World Wide Web Plans to Start a New Internet to Take on Google and Facebook
mt: Pencipta World Wide Web Berancang Memulakan Internet Baru untuk Menentang Google dan Facebook

src: Tim Berners-Lee, the inventor of the World Wide Web, is launching a startup that seeks to rival Facebook, Amazon and Google.
mt: Tim Berners-Lee, pencipta Talian Dunia, melancarkan syarikat permulaan yang bertujuan untuk menyaingi Facebook, Amazon dan Google.

src: The technology legend's latest project, Inrupt, is a company that builds off of Berners-Lee's open source platform Solid.
mt: Proyek terkini legenda teknologi ini, Inrupt, adalah syarikat yang dibina daripada platform sumber terbuka Solid oleh Berners-Lee.

src: Solid allows users to choose where their data is stored and what people are allowed to have access to what information.
mt: Solid membolehkan pengguna memilih di mana data mereka disimpan dan apa yang dibenarkan untuk diakses oleh orang lain.

src: In an exclusive interview with Fast Company, Berners-Lee joked that the intent behind Inrupt is "world domination."
mt: Dalam temubual eksklusif bersama Fast Company, Berners-Lee bergurau bahawa niat di sebalik Inrupt ialah "kekuasaan dunia."

src: "We have to do it now," he said of the startup.
mt: "Kita perlu melakukannya sekarang," katanya mengenai syarikat pemula tersebut.

src: "It's a historical moment."
mt: "It adalah saat yang bersejarah."

src: The app uses Solid's technology to allow people to create their own "personal online data store" or a POD.
mt: Aplikasi ini menggunakan teknologi Solid untuk membolehkan orang ramai mewujudkan "penyimpanan data peribadi dalam talian" atau POD mereka sendiri.

src: It can contain contact lists, to-do lists, calendar, music library and other personal and professional tools.
mt: Ia boleh mengandungi senarai kontak, senarai kerja, kalendar, perpustakaan muzik, dan pelbagai alat peribadi serta profesional.

src: It's like Google Drive, Microsoft Outlook, Slack and Spotify are all available on one browser and all at the same time.
mt: Ia seolah-olah Google Drive, Microsoft Outlook, Slack dan Spotify semuanya tersedia dalam satu pelayar web dan semuanya serentak.
