src: "We think the decision to seek the death penalty rather than accepting a guilty plea to life in prison with no possibility of release will only prolong the trauma of these events for everyone involved," Patton said.
mt: "Patton berkata, kami berpendapat bahawa keputusan untuk menuntut hukuman mati sebagai ganti menerima dakwaan bersalah dengan hukuman penjara seumur hidup tanpa sebarang kemungkinan pelepasan hanya akan memanjangkan trauma kejadian ini untuk semua orang yang terlibat."

src: Saipov's defense team had previously asked prosecutors not to seek the death penalty.
mt: Pasukan pembela Saipov telah sebelum ini meminta peguama tidak menuntut hukuman mati.

src: Tory MP says NIGEL FARAGE should be put in charge of Brexit negotiations
mt: Anggota Parlimen Parti Tory berkata, Nigel Farage hendaklah mengetuai perundingan Brexit.

src: Nigel Farage vowed to 'mobilise the people's army' today during a protest at the Tory conference.
mt: Nigel Farage berjanji untuk 'menyusun barisan tentera rakyat' hari ini semasa sebuah perhimpunan di sidang konvensyen parti Konservatif.

src: The former Ukip leader said politicians had to 'feel the heat' from Eurosceptics - as one of Theresa May's own MPs suggested he should be in charge of negotiations with the EU.
mt: Pengerusi Ukip yang telah lalu berkata bahawa ahli politik mesti 'merasakan panas' daripada golongan euroskeptik, seperti yang dicadangkan oleh salah seorang ahli parlimen sendiri Theresa May bahawa beliau hendaklah mengetuai perundingan dengan Kesatuan Eropah.

src: Conservative backbencher Peter Bone told the march in Birmingham that the UK 'would have been out' by now if Mr Farage was Brexit Secretary.
mt: Penyokong kanan Parlimen, Peter Bone, memberitahu perhimpunan di Birmingham bahawa UK 'mungkin sudah keluar' jika Timbalan Setiausaha Brexit, Mr Farage, memegang jawatan tersebut.

src: But the challenge Mrs May faces in reconciling her deeply divided ranks has been underlined by pro-Remain Tories joining a separate protest against Brexit in the city.
mt: Namun, cabaran yang dihadapi oleh Puan May dalam meredakan perpecahan mendalam dalam barisan parti telah ditegaskan apabila ahli Parti Konservatif yang menyokong 'Tetap (Remain)' menyertai sebuah protes berasingan menentang Brexit di bandar tersebut.

src: The premier is struggling to keep her Chequers compromise plan on track amid attacks from Brexiteers, Remainers and the EU.
mt: Perdana Menteri sedang berusaha untuk memastikan pelan kompromi Chequersnya berjalan lancar di tengah serangan daripada pihak-pihak yang menyokong Brexit, penentang Brexit, dan Kesatuan Eropah.

src: Allies insisted she will push ahead with trying to strike a deal with Brussels despite the backlash - and force Eurosceptics and Labour to choose between her package and 'chaos'.
mt: Rakan sekutu insisted bahawa beliau akan meneruskan usaha untuk menjayakan persembahan dengan Brussels walaupun berdepan dengan penolakan – dan memaksa Eurosceptic dan Parti Buruh untuk memilih antara paket beliau dan 'kekacauan'.

src: Mr Bone told the Leave Means Leave rally in Solihull that he wanted to 'chuck Chequers'.
mt: Beliau Bone memberitahu rakan-rakan dalam perhimpunan 'Leave Means Leave' di Solihull bahawa beliau ingin 'melemparkan Chequers'.

src: He suggested Mr Farage should have been made a peer and given responsibility for negotiations with Brussels.
mt: Beliau mencadap agar Timbalan Presiden Britain, Nigel Farage, dijadikan ahli parlimen dan diberi tanggungjawab untuk rundingan dengan Brussels.

src: 'If he had been in charge, we would have been out by now,' he said.
mt: "Jika dia telah berada di hadapan, kita sudah pasti telah tersingkir pada masa ini," katanya.

src: The Wellingborough MP added: 'I will stand up for Brexit but we need to chuck Chequers.'
mt: Ahli Parlimen Wellingborough itu menambah: "Saya akan menentang Brexit tetapi kita perlu membuang Cadangan Chequers."

src: Setting out his opposition to the EU, he said: 'We didn't fight world wars to be subservient.
mt: Dia berkata, "Kami tidak berkhidmat dalam Perang Dunia untuk menjadi hamba."

src: We want to make our own laws in our own country.'
mt: Kami mahu membuat undang-undang sendiri di negara sendiri.

src: Mr Bone dismissed suggestions that public opinion had changed since the 2016 vote: 'The idea that the British people have changed their minds and want to remain is completely untrue.'
mt: Rakan Parlimen Bone menolak cadangan bahawa pandangan awam telah berubah sejak undian 2016: "Fikir bahawa rakyat Britain telah berubah minda dan mahu kekal adalah sepenuhnya palsu."

src: Tory Brexiteer Andrea Jenkyns was also at the march, telling reporters: 'I am simply saying: Prime Minister, listen to the people.
mt: Andrea Jenkyns, ahli Tory yang menyokong Brexit, turut hadir dalam demonstrasi itu dan berkata kepada wartawan: "Saya sekadar ingin berkata: Perdana Menteri, dengarlah suara rakyat."

src: 'Chequers is unpopular with the general public, the Opposition's not going to vote for it, it's unpopular with our party and our activists who actually pound the streets and get us elected in the first place.
mt: Chequers tidak popular di kalangan masyarakat umum, pihak Berlawanan tidak akan mengundi untuknya, ia tidak popular dalam parti kami dan aktivis kami yang benar-benar mengetuk pintu-pintu dan berjaya memilihkan kami pada awalnya.

src: Please drop Chequers and start listening.'
mt: Kerjakan Chequers dan mulalah untuk mendengar.

src: In a pointed message to Mrs May, she added: 'Prime ministers keep their jobs when they keep their promises.'
mt: Dalam satu mesej yang tajam kepada Timbalan Perdana Menteri, beliau menambah: "Perdana Menteri mengekalkan jawatannya apabila mereka menepati janji mereka."

src: Mr Farage told the rally politicians must be made to 'feel the heat' if they were about to betray the decision made in the 2016 referendum.
mt: Nasib baik, rundingan itu akan gagal.

src: 'This is now about a matter of trust between us - the people - and our political class,' he said.
mt: "Kini, ia menyangkut isu kepercayaan antara kami – rakyat – dan kelas politik kita," katanya.

src: 'They are trying to betray Brexit and we are here today to tell them 'we won't let you get away with doing that'.'
mt: "Mereka cuba mengkhianati Brexit dan kami hadir hari ini untuk memberitahu mereka bahawa kami tidak akan membiarkan mereka terlepas daripada melakukan hal itu."

src: In a message to the enthusiastic crowd he added: 'I want you to make our political class, who are on the verge of betraying Brexit, feel the heat.
mt: Dalam satu kenyataan kepada audiens yang bersemangat, beliau menambah: "Saya mahu anda membuatkan kelas politik kami, yang berada di ambang mengkhianati Perjanjian Brexit, berasa terdedah kepada tekanan."

src: 'We are mobilising the people's army of this country that gave us victory in Brexit and will never rest until we have become an independent, self-governing, proud United Kingdom.'
mt: "Kita sedang menggerakkan tentera rakyat negara ini yang telah membawa kita kemenangan dalam Brexit dan tidak akan berhenti sehingga kita telah menjadi United Kingdom yang merdeka, bersendirian menguruskan diri, dan bangga."

src: Meanwhile, Remainers marched through Birmingham before holding a two-hour rally in the city centre.
mt: Sementara itu, para penstasis merentasi Birmingham sebelum mengadakannya perhimpunan dua jam di pusat bandar.

src: A smattering of activists waved Tories Against Brexit banners after the launch of the group this weekend.
mt: Sebilangan kecil aktivis mengangkat banner 'Tory Against Brexit' selepas pelancaran kumpulan itu pada hujung minggu ini.

src: Labour peer Lord Adonis mocked the Conservatives for the security issues they suffered with a party app as the conference opened.
mt: Lawat sejawat, Lord Adonis, menyindir Parti Konservatif mengenai isu keselamatan yang mereka hadapi dengan aplikasi parti tersebut apabila mesyuarat dibuka.

src: 'These are the people who tell us they can have the IT systems in place and all of the technology for Canada plus plus, for the frictionless border, for free trade without borders in Ireland,' he added.
mt: "Orang-orang ini memberitahu kita bahawa mereka boleh menubuhkan sistem IT dan semua teknologi untuk Kanada, serta lebih lagi, untuk sempadan tanpa geseran dan perdagangan bebas tanpa sempadan di Ireland," tambahnya.

src: 'It is a complete farce.
mt: Ini adalah satu lakonan penuh.

src: There isn't such a thing as a good Brexit,' he added.
mt: "Tiada seumpama Brexit yang baik," tambahnya.

src: Warren plans to take a 'hard look' at running for president
mt: Warren berancang untuk mengambil "tinjauan mendalam" tentang pencalonan sebagai presiden.

src: U.S. Sen. Elizabeth Warren says she'll take a "hard look at running for president" after the November elections.
mt: Senator Elizabeth Warren daripada AS berkata beliau akan mengambil langkah tegas untuk bertanding sebagai Presiden selepas pilihan raya pada bulan November.

src: The Boston Globe reports the Massachusetts Democrat spoke about her future during a town hall in western Massachusetts Saturday.
mt: Laporan The Boston Globe bahawa ahli Demokrat Massachusetts itu bercakap mengenai masa depannya semasa majlis terbuka di bahagian barat Massachusetts pada hari Sabtu.

src: Warren, a frequent critic of President Donald Trump, is running for re-election in November against GOP state Rep. Geoff Diehl, who was co-chairman of Trump's 2016 Massachusetts campaign.
mt: Warren, seorang kritikan kerap terhadap Presiden Donald Trump, sedang bertanding untuk penggalan kedua pada November berhadapan dengan Ahli Dewan Undangan Negeri GOP, Geoff Diehl, yang pernah menjadi pengerusi bersama kempen Massachusetts Trump pada 2016.

src: She has been at the center of speculation that she might take on Trump in 2020.
mt: Dia berada di pusat spekulasi bahawa beliau mungkin menghadapi Trump dalam pilihan raya 2020.

src: Saturday afternoon's event in Holyoke was her 36th meeting with constituents using the town hall format since Trump took office.
mt: Acara pada petang Sabtu di Holyoke adalah pertemuan ke-36 beliau dengan rakyat menggunakan format town hall sejak Trump mengambil jawatan.

src: An attendee asked her if she planned to run for president.
mt: Seorang hadirin bertanya kepadanya sama ada dia berancang menjadi calon presiden.

src: Warren replied that it's time "for women to go to Washington to fix our broken government, and that includes a woman at the top."
mt: Warren membalas bahawa sudah masanya "wanita-wanita pergi ke Washington untuk membetulkan kerajaan yang rosak kita, dan ia termasuk seorang wanita di puncak."

src: Arrest made in shooting death of LSU's Sims
mt: Penghantaran dibuat dalam kes bunuh Sim daripada LSU.

src: Police in Baton Rouge, La., announced Saturday that a suspect has been arrested in the shooting death of LSU basketball player Wayde Sims on Friday.
mt: Polis di Baton Rouge, Louisiana, mengumumkan pada Sabtu bahawa seorang suspek telah ditahan berhubung pembunuhan pemain bola keranjang LSU, Wayde Sims, pada Jumaat.

src: The Baton Rouge Police Department announced the arrest of Dyteon Simpson, 20, at an 11 a.m. ET news conference.
mt: Suruhanjaya Polis Baton Rouge mengumumkan penangkapan Dyteon Simpson, 20, pada majlis media pada pukul 11 pagi ET.

src: They had released a video of the shooting on Friday, asking for help identifying a man seen in the footage.
mt: Mereka telah memuat naik video mengenai tembakpan tersebut pada hari Khamis, meminta bantuan untuk mengenal pasti seorang lelaki yang dilihat dalam rakaman tersebut.

src: Sims, 20, was shot and killed near Southern University's campus early Friday.
mt: Sims, 20, telah ditembak dan dibunuh berhampiran kampus Southern University awal pada hari Jumaat.

src: "Wayde Sims suffered a gunshot wound to the head and ultimately died as a result," police chief Murphy J. Paul told the media Saturday, per 247sports.
mt: "Pegawai Polis Utama Murphy J. Paul memberitahu media pada hari Sabtu, melalui 247sports, bahawa Wayde Sims mengalami kecederaan akibat tembakan ke kepala dan pada akhirnya meninggal dunia sebagai hasilnya."

src: Wayde stepped in to defend his friend and was shot by Simpson.
mt: Wayde melangkah masuk untuk melindungi rakan karibnya dan dipukul oleh Simpson.

src: Simpson was questioned and admitted to being on scene, in possession of a weapon, and admitted to shooting Wayde Sims.
mt: Simpson ditanya dan mengaku berada di tempat kejadian, mempunyai senjata, dan mengaku menembak Wayde Sims.

src: Simpson was arrested without incident and taken into custody at East Baton Rouge Parish Police Department.
mt: Simpson ditangkap tanpa insiden dan dibawa ke bawah pentadbiran Jabatan Polis Daerah East Baton Rouge.

src: A 6-foot-6 junior who grew up in Baton Rouge, Sims played in 32 games with 10 starts last season and averaged 17.4 minutes, 5.6 points and 2.9 rebounds per game.
mt: Seorang pemain junior berbadan besar setinggi 6 kaki 6 inci yang tumbes di Baton Rouge, Sims bermain dalam 32 perlawanan dengan 10 permulaan musim lepas dan purata 17.4 minit, 5.6 mata dan 2.9 remitan setiap perlawanan.

src: Russian Grand Prix: Lewis Hamilton closes in on world title after team orders hand him win over Sebastian Vettel
mt: GP Rusia: Lewis Hamilton hampir merebut gelaran juara dunia selepas arahan pasukan membolehkan beliau mengalahkan Sebastian Vettel

src: It became clear from the moment that Valtteri Bottas qualified ahead of Lewis Hamilton on Saturday that Mercedes" team orders would play a large part in the race.
mt: Ia menjadi jelas sejak ketika Valtteri Bottas berjaya menyalip Lewis Hamilton pada sesi kelayakan pada hari Sabtu bahawa arahan pasukan Mercedes akan memainkan peranan besar dalam perlumbaan.

src: From pole, Bottas got a good start and almost hung Hamilton out to dry as he defended his position in the first two turns and invited Vettel to attack his teammate.
mt: Daripada grid, Bottas mendapat permulaan yang baik dan hampir meninggalkan Hamilton dalam keadaan terdedah semasa beliau mempertahankan kedudukannya dalam dua pusingan pertama dan mengundang Vettel untuk menyerang rakan seramaiannya.

src: Vettel went into the pits first and left Hamilton to run into the traffic at the tail of the pack, something which should have been decisive.
mt: Vettel memasuki pit pertama kali dan membiarkan Hamilton masuk ke dalam lalu lintas di bahagian belakang kereta, sesuatu yang sepatutnya menentukan.

src: The Mercedes pitted a lap later and came out behind Vettel, but Hamilton went ahead after some wheel-to-wheel action that saw the Ferrari driver reluctantly leave the inside free at risk of holding out after a double-move to defend on the third corner.
mt: Mercedes melakukan pit stop pada satu pusingan selepas itu dan keluar di belakang Vettel, namun Hamilton berjaya mengambil tempat selepas aksi dekat-dekat yang melihat pemandu Ferrari itu secara tidak sukarela meninggalkan laluan dalam di hujung litar, mengambil risiko gagal bertahan selepas dua-dua kali manevr pada tikungan ketiga.

src: Max Verstappen started from the back row of the grid and was in seventh by the end of the first lap on his 21st birthday.
mt: Max Verstappen memulakan perlumbaan dari baris ketiga dan berada di tempat ketujuh pada akhir lap pertama pada ulang tahun ke-21nya.

src: He then led for a large part of the race as he held onto his tyres to target a quick finish and overtake Kimi Raikkonen for fourth.
mt: Selepas itu, beliau memimpin sebahagian besar perlumbaan kerana dia menahan tayarnya untuk menargetkan tamat yang pantas dan mengimbangi Kimi Raikkonen untuk merebut tempat keempat.

src: He eventually came into the pits on the 44th lap but was unable to increase his pace in the remaining eight laps as Raikkonen took fourth.
mt: Dia akhirnya memasuki pit pada lap ke-44 tetapi tidak dapat meningkatkan kelajuannya dalam lapan lap baki apabila Raikkonen mengambil tempat keempat.

src: It's a difficult day because Valtteri did a fantastic job all weekend and was a real gentleman told let me by.
mt: Hari ini sukar kerana Valtteri melakukan kerja yang luar biasa sepanjang weekend dan benar-benar seorang gentleman yang memberi ruang kepada saya.

src: The team have done such an exceptional job to have a one two," said Hamilton.
mt: "Tim telah melakukan kerja yang sangat luar biasa untuk menghasilkan serangan satu-dua," kata Hamilton.

src: That Was Really Bad Body Language
mt: Tandas Badan Yang Sungguh Buruk

src: President Donald Trump mocked Senator Dianne Feinstein at a rally on Saturday over her insistence she did not leak the letter from Christine Blasey Ford accusing Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh of sexual assault.
mt: Presiden Donald Trump menyindir Senator Dianne Feinstein semasa perhimpunan pada hari Sabtu mengenai pendiriannya bahawa beliau tidak membocorkan surat Christine Blasey Ford yang menuduh bakal hakim Mahkamah Tinggi, Brett Kavanaugh, melakukan jenayah seksual.

src: Speaking at a rally in West Virginia, the president did not directly address the testimony given by Ford before the Senate Judiciary Committee, instead commenting that what was going on in the Senate showed that people were "mean and nasty and untruthful."
mt: Semasa berucap dalam satu perhimpunan di West Virginia, presiden itu tidak secara langsung menangani kesaksian yang diberikan oleh Ford sebelum Jawatankuasa Yurispdensen Senat, sebaliknya mengulas bahawa apa yang berlaku di Senat menunjukkan bahawa orang ramai adalah "kejam, ganas dan tidak jujur."

src: "The one thing that could happen and the beautiful thing that is going on over the last few days in the Senate, when you see the anger, when you see people that are angry and mean and nasty and untruthful," he said.
mt: "Satu-satunya perkara yang boleh berlaku dan perkara yang indah yang sedang berlaku di Senat dalam beberapa hari lepas, apabila anda melihat kemarahan, apabila anda melihat orang-orang yang marah, jahat, dan tidak jujur," katanya.

src: "When you look at releases and leaks and then they say "oh, I didn't do it.
mt: Apabila anda melihat pelancaran dan kebocoran, kemudian mereka berkata, "Oh, saya tidak melakukannya."

src: I didn't do it."
mt: Saya tidak melakukan itu.

src: Remember?
mt: Ingatkah anda?

src: Dianne Feinstein, did you leak?
mt: Adakah Dianne Feinstein telah membocorkan maklumat itu?

src: Remember her answer... did you leak the document - "oh, oh, what?
mt: Ingat jawapannya dia... adakah anda membocorkan dokumen itu? – "Oh, oh, apa?"

src: Oh, no.
mt: Oh, tidak.

src: I didn't leak."
mt: Saya tidak bocorkan apa-apa.

src: Well, wait one minute.
mt: Nanti sekejap.

src: Did we leak...No, we didn't leak," he added, in an impression of the senator.
mt: "Adakah kami telah membocorkan... Tidak, kami tidak membocorkan," tambahnya, dalam meniru seorang senator.

src: Feinstein was sent the letter detailing the allegations against Kavanaugh by Ford back in July, and it was leaked earlier in September - but Feinstein denied that the leak came from her office.
mt: Feinstein telah menerima surat yang mengandungi dakwaan-dakwaan terhadap Kavanaugh daripada Ford pada bulan Julai, dan ia bocor pada awal September – namun Feinstein menafikan bahawa kebocoran tersebut berasal dari pejabatnya.

src: "I did not hide Dr. Ford's allegations, I did not leak her story," Feinstein told the committee, The Hill reported.
mt: "Tiada yang saya persembunyikan mengenai tuduhan Dr. Ford, saya juga tidak bocorkan ceritanya," kata Feinstein kepada jawatankuasa, menurut The Hill.

src: "She asked me to hold it confidential and I kept it confidential as she asked."
mt: "Saya diminta untuk menyimpannya sebagai rahsia dan saya mematuhi permintaan tersebut."

src: But her denial did not appear to sit well with the president, who commented during the Saturday night rally: "I'll tell you what, that was really bad body language.
mt: Tapi penafian beliau nampaknya tidak disukai oleh Presiden, yang mengulas semasa perhimpunan pada malam Sabtu: "Biarlah saya beritahu anda, itu bahasa badan yang sangat buruk."

src: Maybe she didn't, but that's the worst body language I've ever seen."
mt: Mungkin tidak, tetapi itu bahasa isyarat tubuh terburuk yang pernah saya lihat.

src: Continuing his defense of the Supreme Court nominee, who has been accused of sexual misconduct by three women, the president suggested that the Democrats were using the allegations for their own ends.
mt: Berterusan mempertahankan calon mahkamah tertinggi yang didakwa tiga wanita dengan tuduhan salah laku seksual, Presiden mencadangkan bahawa Demokrat menggunakan dakwaan tersebut untuk tujuan sendiri.

src: "They are determined to take back power by any means necessary.
mt: Mereka berjanji untuk mengambil semula kuasa dengan apa jua cara yang perlu.

src: You see the meanness, the nastiness, they don't care who they hurt, who they have to run over to get power and control," Mediaite reported the president saying.
mt: Anda nampakkan kekejaman dan kekejian mereka; mereka tidak mempedulikan siapa yang mereka lasak demi kuasa dan kawalan," lapor Mediaite mengenai kata-kata Presiden tersebut.

src: Elite League: Dundee Stars 5-3 Belfast Giants
mt: Liga Elite: Dundee Stars 5-3 Belfast Giants

src: Patrick Dwyer hit two goals for the Giants against Dundee
mt: Patrick Dwyer menjaring dua gol untuk Giants beraksi menentang Dundee.

src: Dundee Stars atoned for Friday's Elite League loss against Belfast Giants by winning the return match 5-3 in Dundee on Saturday.
mt: Dundee Stars telah membasmi kekalahan Liga Elite pada hari Jumaat melawat Belfast Giants dengan menewaskan pasukan tersebut 5-3 dalam perlawanan balas di Dundee pada hari Sabtu.

src: The Giants got an early two-goal lead through strikes from Patrick Dwyer and Francis Beauvillier.
mt: The Giants meraih keuntungan awal dua gol melalui gol daripada Patrick Dwyer dan Francis Beauvillier.

src: Mike Sullivan and Jordan Cownie brought the home side level before Dwyer restored the Giants' lead.
mt: Mike Sullivan dan Jordan Cownie mengetuk jaring untuk menyamakan kedudukan untuk pasukan tuan rumah sebelum Dwyer memperkukuh semula kelebihan Giants.

src: Francois Bouchard equalised for Dundee before two Lukas Lundvald Nielsen goals secured their victory.
mt: Francois Bouchard meratakan kedudukan untuk Dundee sebelum dua gol dari Lukas Lundvald Nielsen memastikan kemenangan mereka.

src: It was a third Elite League defeat of the season for Adam Keefe's men, who had come from behind to beat Dundee 2-1 in Belfast on Friday night.
mt: Ini merupakan kekalahan ketiga Liga Elite musim ini bagi pasukan Adam Keefe yang telah berjaya menang 2-1 menentang Dundee di Belfast pada malam Jumaat.

src: It was a fourth meeting of the season between the sides, with the Giants winning the previous three matches.
mt: Ini adalah perlawanan keempat musim di antara kedua-dua pasukan, dengan Giants yang menewaskan tiga perlawanan sebelumnya.

src: Dwyer's opener came in the fourth minute on 3:35 from a Kendall McFaull assist, with David Rutherford providing the assist as Beauvillier doubled the lead four minutes later.
mt: Pembukaan Dwyer berlaku pada minit keempat pada masa 3:35 berikutan bantuan oleh Kendall McFaull, manakala David Rutherford memberikan bantuan apabila Beauvillier memperkukuhkan kedudukan dengan menjaringkan gol kedua empat minit kemudian.

src: In what was a busy opening period, Sullivan brought the home side back into the game on 13:10 before Matt Marquardt became provider for Cownie's equaliser on 15:16.
mt: Dalam tempoh pembukaan yang sibuk, Sullivan membawa pasukan rumah kembali ke dalam permainan pada minit ke-13:10 sebelum Matt Marquardt menjadi pembekal gol untuk kesinambongan Cownie pada minit ke-15:16.

src: Dwyer made sure the Giants took a lead into the first break when he hit his second goal of the night at the end of the first period.
mt: Dwyer memastikan Giants mengambil keutamaan sebelum rehat pertama apabila dia menjejakan gol kedua malamnya pada akhir tempoh pertama.

src: The home side regrouped and Bouchard once again put them on level terms with a power play goal on 27:37.
mt: Pasukan tuan rumah berkumpul semula dan Bouchard sekali lagi menyamakan kedudukan dengan gol serangan kuasa pada minit 27:37.

src: Cownie and Charles Corcoran combined to help Nielsen give Dundee the lead for the first time in the match late in the second period and he made sure of the win with his team's fifth halfway through the final period.
mt: Cownie dan Charles Corcoran bersatu membantu Nielsen memberikan Dundee keunggulan untuk pertama kali dalam perlawanan itu pada akhir separuh masa kedua, dan beliau memastikan kemenangan dengan gol kelima pasukan itu di separuh masa ketiga.

src: The Giants, who have now lost four of their last five matches, are at home to Milton Keynes in their next match on Friday.
mt: Para Gergasi, yang kini telah tewas dalam empat daripada lima perlawanan terakhir mereka, akan menjamu Milton Keynes di laman sendiri pada perlawanan seterusnya pada Jumaat.

src: Air Traffic Controller Dies To Ensure Hundreds On Plane Can Escape Earthquake
mt: Pegawal Lalulintas Udara Maut Memastikan Ratusan Penumpang Dalam Pesawat Berpeluang Melarikan Diri Dari Gempa Bumi

src: An air traffic controller in Indonesia is being hailed as a hero after he died ensuring that a plane carrying hundreds of people made it safely off the ground.
mt: Seorang kawalan lalu lintas udara di Indonesia dipuji sebagai pahlawan selepas beliau meninggal dunia demi memastikan sebuah pesawat yang membawa ratusan penumpang berjung离开 padang landasan dengan selamat.

src: More than 800 people have died and many are missing after a major earthquake hit the island of Sulawesi on Friday, triggering a tsunami.
mt: Lebih daripada 800 orang telah meninggal dunia dan ramai lagi hilang selepas gempa bumi besar menghunus Pulau Sulawesi pada Jumaat, menyebabkan tsunami.

src: Strong aftershocks continue to plague the area and many are trapped in debris in the city of Palu.
mt: Gempa gempuran yang kuat masih terus melanda kawasan tersebut dan ramai lagi terperangkap di bawah reruntuhan di bandar Palu.

src: But despite his colleagues fleeing for their lives, 21-year-old Anthonius Gunawan Agung refused to leave his post in the wildly swaying control tower at Mutiara Sis Al Jufri Airport Palu airport.
mt: Namun, walaupun rakan-rakannya melarikan diri demi nyawa, Anthonius Gunawan Agung berumur 21 tahun enggan meninggalkan posnya di menara kawalan yang bergoyang hebat di Lapangan Terbang Mutiara Sis Al Jufri, Palu.

src: He stayed put to make sure that the Batik Air Flight 6321, which was on the runway at the time, was able to take off safely.
mt: Dia kekal di tempat tersebut untuk memastikan bahawa Penerbangan Batik Air 6321, yang berada di landasan pada masa itu, mampu lepas landas dengan selamat.

src: He then jumped off the traffic control tower when he thought it was collapsing.
mt: Kemudian, dia melompat menuruni menara kawalan trafik apabila dia mengira ia sedang runtuh.

src: He died later in hospital.
mt: Beliau meninggal dunia di hospital kemudian.

src: Spokesman for Air Navigation Indonesia, Yohannes Sirait, said the decision may have saved hundreds of lives, Australia's ABC News reported.
mt: Penasihat penerbangan bagi Indonesia, Yohannes Sirait, berkata keputusan tersebut mungkin telah menyelamatkan ratusan nyawa, menurut laporan Berita ABC Australia.

src: We prepared a helicopter from Balikpapan in Kalimantan to take him to a bigger hospital in another city.
mt: Kami menyediakan helikopter dari Balikpapan di Kalimantan untuk menghantarnya ke hospital yang lebih besar di bandar lain.

src: Unfortunately we lost him this morning before the helicopter reached Palu.
mt: Malangnya, kita kehilangan beliau pagi ini sebelum helikopter mencapai Palu.

src: "Our heart breaks to hear about this," he added.
mt: "Kami terkejut mendengar berita ini," tambahnya.

src: Meanwhile, authorities fear that the death toll could reach the thousands with the country's disaster mitigation agency saying that access to the the towns of Donggala, Sigi and Boutong is limited.
mt: Pada masa yang sama, pihak berkuasa bimbang bahawa bilangan kematian boleh mencecah ribuan dengan agensi penanggulangan bencana negara itu berkata akses ke bandar-bandar Donggala, Sigi, dan Boutong adalah terhad.

src: "The toll is believed to be still increasing since many bodies were still under the wreckage while many have not able to be reached," agency spokesman Sutopo Purwo Nugroho said.
mt: "Anggaran korban dipercayai masih bertambah kerana banyak mayat masih berada di bawah reruntuhan manakala ramai lagi belum dapat dijangkau," kata jurucakap agensi, Sutopo Purwo Nugroho.

src: Waves that reached up to six meters have devastated Palu which will hold a mass burial on Sunday.
mt: Gelombang setinggi enam meter telah menenggelamkan Palu yang akan mengadakan pengebumian besar-besaran pada hari Ahad.

src: Military and commercial aircraft are bringing in aid and supplies.
mt: Pesawat-pesawat tentera dan komersial sedang mengangkut bantuan dan bekalan.

src: Risa Kusuma, a 35-year-old mother, told Sky News: "Every minute an ambulance brings in bodies.
mt: Risa Kusuma, seorang ibu berusia 35 tahun, berkata kepada Sky News, "Tiap-tiap minit ambulans membawa masuk jenazah."

src: Clean water is scarce.
mt: Air bersih itu langka.

src: The mini-markets are looted everywhere."
mt: Pasaran mini di merata-rata telah dirampas.

src: Jan Gelfand, head of the International Red Cross in Indonesia, told CNN: "The Indonesian Red Cross is racing to help survivors but we don't know what they'll find there.
mt: Jan Gelfand, pengerusi Persaingan Merah Silang Antarabangsa di Indonesia, memberitahu CNN: "Persaingan Merah Silang Indonesia sedang berlumba untuk membantu mangsa, tetapi kami tidak tahu apa yang mereka akan dapati di sana."

src: This is already a tragedy, but it could get much worse."
mt: Ini sudah menjadi sebuah tragedi, tetapi ia boleh menjadi jauh lebih teruk.

src: Indonesia's President Joko Widodo arrived in Palu on Sunday and told the country's military: "I am asking all of you to work day and night to complete every tasks related to the evacuation.
mt: Presiden Indonesia, Joko Widodo, tiba di Palu pada hari Ahad dan berkata kepada tentera negara: "Saya meminta seluruh anda bekerja siang dan malam untuk menyiapkan setiap tugas berkaitan pengangkutan.

src: Are you ready?" CNN reported.
mt: "Apakah anda bersedia?" lapor CNN.

src: Indonesia was hit earlier this year by earthquakes in Lombok in which more than 550 people died.
mt: Indonesia dilanda gempa bumi di Lombok awal tahun ini yang menewaskan lebih daripada 550 orang.

src: Micronesia plane crash: Air Niugini now says one man missing after lagoon plane crash
mt: Nasib Pesawat Micronesia: Air Niugini kini memberitahu bahawa seorang lelaki hilang selepas kemalangan pesawat di laguna

src: The airline operating a flight that crashed into a Pacific lagoon in Micronesia now says one man is missing, after earlier saying all 47 passengers and crew had safely evacuated the sinking plane.
mt: Syarikat penerbangan yang mengendalikan penerbangan yang berlanggar dengan teluk di Micronesia kini berkata seorang lelaki hilang, selepas sebelum ini menyatakan bahawa semua 47 penumpang dan kakitangan telah berjaya menyelamatkan diri daripada pesawat yang tenggelam.

src: Air Niugini said in a release that as of Saturday afternoon, it was unable to account for a male passenger.
mt: Air Niugini mengumumkan dalam satu kenyataan bahawa sehingga petang Sabtu, mereka tidak dapat mengesahkan keberadaan seorang penumpang lelaki.

src: The airline said it was working with local authorities, hospitals and investigators to try to find the man.
mt: Syarikat penerbangan itu berkata mereka sedang bekerja sama dengan pihak berkuasa tempatan, hospital dan penyelidik untuk cuba mencari lelaki itu.

src: The airline did not immediately respond to requests for more details about the passenger, such as his age or nationality.
mt: Syarikat penerbangan itu tidak serta-merta menjawab permintaan untuk butiran lanjut mengenai penumpang itu, seperti umurnya atau kebangsaannya.

src: Local boats helped rescue the other passengers and crew after the plane hit the water while trying to land at the Chuuk Island airport.
mt: Kapal-kapal tempatan membantu menyelamatkan penumpang dan kru lain selepas pesawat tersebut melanggar air manakala cuba mendarat di lapangan terbang Pulau Chuuk.

src: Officials said on Friday that seven people had been taken to a hospital.
mt: Rakan-rakan rasmi berkata pada Jumaat bahawa tujuh orang telah dibawa ke hospital.

src: The airline said six passengers remained at the hospital Saturday, and all of them were in stable condition.
mt: Syarikat penerbangan itu berkata, enam penumpang masih berada di hospital pada hari Sabtu dan kesemuanya berada dalam keadaan stabil.

src: What caused the crash and the exact sequence of events remains unclear.
mt: Apa yang menyebabkan keruntuhan dan urutan kejadian yang tepat masih belum jelas.

src: The airline and the U.S. Navy both said the plane landed in the lagoon short of the runway.
mt: Syarikat penerbangan dan Tentera Laut Amerika Syarikat kedua-duanya mengesahkan pesawat itu mendarat di teluk, sebelum sampai ke landasan.

src: Some witnesses thought the plane overshot the runway.
mt: Beberapa saksi berpendakan pesawat itu terlepas landasan.

src: American passenger Bill Jaynes said the plane came in very low.
mt: Pelawat Amerika, Bill Jaynes, berkata pesawat itu datang dari bawah dengan sangat rendah.

src: "That's an extremely good thing," said Jaynes.
mt: "Itu sangat baik," kata Jaynes.

src: Jaynes said he and others managed to wade through waist-deep water to the emergency exits on the sinking plane.
mt: Jaynes berkata bahawa beliau dan orang lain berjaya menyeberangi air setinggi pinggang untuk sampai ke pintu keluar kecemasan pada pesawat yang tenggelam itu.

src: He said the flight attendants were panicking and yelling, and that he suffered a minor head injury.
mt: Dia berkata bahawa kakitangan penerbangan sedang panik dan berteriak, dan bahawa beliau cedera kepala dengan kecederaan ringan.

src: The U.S. Navy said sailors working nearby on improving a wharf also helped in the rescue by using an inflatable boat to shuttle people ashore before the plane sank in about 30 meters (100 feet) of water.
mt: Tentera Laut AS berkata, para marin yang bekerja berhampiran untuk memperbaiki pelabuhan juga membantu dalam operasi penyelamatan dengan menggunakan bot kembal untuk mengangkut orang ke darat sebelum pesawat tenggelam pada kedalaman kira-kira 30 meter (100 kaki).

src: Data from the Aviation Safety Network indicates 111 people have died in crashes of PNG-registered airlines in the past two decades but none involved Air Niugini.
mt: Data dari Jaring Keselamatan Penerbangan menunjukkan bahawa 111 orang telah mati dalam kemalangan syarikat penerbangan berdaftar Papua Nugini dalam dua dekad lepas, namun tiada kes melibatkan Air Niugini.

src: Analyst lays out timeline of night woman was burned alive
mt: Penasihat meletakkan garis masa wanita itu dibakar hidup-hidup pada waktu malam.

src: The prosecution rested its case Saturday in the retrial of a man who is accused of burning a Mississippi woman alive in 2014.
mt: Perakuan pendakwaan telah berakhir pada hari Sabtu dalam perbicara semula bagi seorang lelaki yang didakwa membakar seorang wanita dari Mississippi sehingga mati pada tahun 2014.

src: U.S. Department of Justice Analyst Paul Rowlett testified for hours as an expert witness in the field of intelligence analysis.
mt: Ahli Analisis Paul Rowlett dari Jabatan Kehakiman Amerika Syarikat memberi kesaksian sebagai saksi pakar dalam bidang analisis intelijen selama berjam-jam.

src: He outlined for the jury how he used cellphone records to piece together the movements of 29-year-old defendant Quinton Tellis and the 19-year-old victim, Jessica Chambers, on the night she died.
mt: Dia menerangkan kepada juri bagaimana beliau menggunakan rekod telefon bimbit untuk menyusun semula pergerakan tertuduh Quinton Tellis, yang berumur 29 tahun, dan mangsa Jessica Chambers, yang berumur 19 tahun, pada malam kematian mangsa tersebut.

src: Rowlett said he received location data from several cellphones that showed Tellis was with Chambers the evening of her death, contradicting his previous claims, The Clarion Ledger reported .
mt: Rowlett berkata bahawa beliau menerima data lokasi dari beberapa telefon bimbit yang menunjukkan Tellis berada bersama Chambers pada malam kematian beliau, satu fakta yang bertentangan dengan dakwaan terdahulu beliau, seperti yang dilaporkan oleh The Clarion Ledger.

src: When data showed his cellphone was with Chambers' during the time he said he was with his friend Michael Sanford, police went to talk to Sanford.
mt: Apabila data menunjukkan telefon bimbitnya berada bersama Chambers' pada masa dia mengaku bersama kawannya, Michael Sanford, polis telah pergi untuk bercakap dengan Sanford.

src: Sanford took the stand Saturday and testified that he wasn't in town that day.
mt: Sanford menduduki saksi pada hari Sabtu dan bersaksi bahawa beliau tidak berada di bandar pada hari itu.

src: When prosecutors asked if Tellis was telling the truth when he said he was in Sanford's truck that night, Sanford said he was "lying, because my truck was in Nashville."
mt: Apabila pendakwa raya bertanya sama ada Tellis berbohong apabila berkata dia berada dalam trak Sanford pada malam itu, Sanford menjawab, "dia berbohong, kerana trak saya berada di Nashville."

src: Another inconsistency was that Tellis said he had known Chambers for about two weeks when she died.
mt: Keanehan lain ialah Tellis menyatakan bahawa dia telah mengenali Chambers selama kira-kira dua minggu apabila dia meninggal dunia.

src: Cellphone records indicated they'd only known each other for a week.
mt: Rekod panggilan telefon menunjukkan mereka hanya saling dikenali selama seminggu.

src: Rowlett said that sometime after Chambers' death, Tellis deleted Chambers' texts, calls and contact information from his phone.
mt: Rowlett berkata bahawa sesetengah ketika selepas kematian Chambers, Tellis telah memadamkan mesej, panggilan, dan maklumat hubungan Chambers dari telefonnya.

src: "He erased her from his life," Hale said.
mt: "Hale memberitahu bahawa dia telah memadamkannya dari hidupnya."

src: The defense is scheduled to begin its closing arguments Sunday.
mt: Pertahanan dijangka memulakan hujah penutup mereka pada hari Ahad.

src: The judge said he expected the trial to go to the jury later that day.
mt: Hakim berkata dia berharap perbicaraan akan dibangkitkan ke hadapan juri pada lewat hari itu.

src: The High Breed: What is conscious hip hop?
mt: Baka Tinggi: Apakah hip hop sedar?

src: A hip hop trio wants to challenge the negative view of the genre by filling their music with positive messages.
mt: Sebuah tarian hip hop mahu menantang pandangan negatif terhadap genre tersebut dengan mengisi muzik mereka dengan mesej yang positif.

src: The High Breed, from Bristol, claim hip hop moved away from its origins of political messages and tackling social issues.
mt: The High Breed dari Bristol menegaskan bahawa hip hop telah berpaling dari asal-usulnya iaitu mesej politik dan menangani isu-isu sosial.

src: They want to go back to its roots and make conscious hip hop popular again.
mt: Mereka mahu kembali kepada akar umbi dan menjadikan hip hop yang sedar semakin popular.

src: Artists like The Fugees and Common have seen a recent resurgence in the UK through artists such as Akala and Lowkey.
mt: Artis seperti The Fugees dan Common telah melihat kebangkitan terkini di UK melalui artis-artis seperti Akala dan Lowkey.

src: Another black person?!
mt: Orang hitam lagi?

src: NY nanny sues couple over firing after "racist" text
mt: Nanny NY mendakwa pasangan selepas dipecat berikutan teks "rasis"

src: A New York nanny is suing a couple for discriminatory firing after receiving a misdirected text from the mother complaining that she was "another black person."
mt: Seorang penjaga kanak-kanak di New York sedang memfailkan suit terhadap sepasang suami isteri selepas dibuang kerja secara diskriminasi setelah menerima teks mesej yang salah arah daripada ibu bapa tersebut yang mengeluh bahawa dia adalah "orang kulit hitam yang lain."

src: The couple deny they are racist, likening the suit to "extortion."
mt: Pasangan itu menafikan dakwaan rasisme mereka, menyamakan suit tersebut dengan "pemerasan".

src: Lynsey Plasco-Flaxman, a mother of two, expressed dismay when finding out that the new child care provider, Giselle Maurice, was black upon arriving for her first day of work in 2016.
mt: Lynsey Plasco-Flaxman, seorang ibu kepada dua orang anak, menyatakan kekecewaan apabila mengetahui bahawa penyedia penjagaan anak baharunya, Giselle Maurice, berkulit hitam apabila tiba untuk bekerja pada hari pertamanya pada tahun 2016.

src: "NOOOOOOOOOOO ANOTHER BLACK PERSON," wrote Mrs Plasco-Flaxman to her husband in a text.
mt: "BALIKKOT BLACK PERSON LAGI," tulis isteri Plasco-Flaxman kepada suaminya dalam teks.

src: However, instead of sending it to her husband, she sent it to Ms. Maurice, twice.
mt: Namun, bukannya menghantar ke suaminya, dia menghantarnya kepada Puan Maurice, sebanyak dua kali.

src: After realizing her gaffe, an "uncomfortable" Plasco-Flaxman fired Ms. Maurice, stating that their outgoing nanny, who was African-American, had done a bad job and that she was instead expecting a Filipino, according to the New York Post.
mt: Selepas sedar kesalahannya, Plasco-Flaxman yang "tidak selesa" memarahi Encik Maurice, menyatakan bahawa penjaga rumah keluaran mereka yang berbangsa Afrika-Amerika telah melakukan kerja yang buruk dan beliau sebenarnya menjangkakan seorang Filipina, menurut New York Post.

src: Ms. Maurice was paid for her one day of work and then sent home for an Uber.
mt: Saudawati Maurice dibayar bagi hari kerjanya yang satu dan kemudian dihantar pulang menggunakan Uber.

src: Now, Maurice is suing the couple for compensation over the firing, and is seeking compensation to the tune of $350 a day for the six-month, live-in gig she had initially been hired to do, albeit without a contract.
mt: Sekarang, Maurice sedang mendakwa pasangan itu untuk tuntutan ganti rugi atas pemergian tersebut, dan beliau menuntut ganti rugi sebanyak $350 sehari untuk tugas berdurasi enam bulan sebagai pembantu dalam rumah yang awalnya dilakukannya, walaupun tanpa sebarang kontrak.

src: "I want to show them, look, you don't do stuff like that," she told the Post on Friday, adding "I know it's discrimination."
mt: "Saya mahu tunjukkan kepada mereka, lihat, anda tidak melakukan perkara sebegini," katanya kepada akhbar Post pada hari Jumaat, menambah, "Saya tahu ia adalah diskriminasi."

src: The couple have hit back at the claims that they are racist, saying that terminating Maurice's employment was the reasonable thing to do, fearing they could not trust her after offending her.
mt: Pasangan itu telah membalas dakwaan bahawa mereka rasis, dengan mengatakan bahawa memutuskan kerja Maurice adalah langkah yang wajar, kerana mereka bimbang tidak dapat mempercayainya selepas dia melukai perasaan mereka.

src: "My wife had sent her something that she didn't mean to say.
mt: Isteri saya telah menghantar sesuatu yang tidak disangkanya hendak dikatakannya.

src: She's not a racist.
mt: Dia bukan rasis.

src: We're not racist people," husband Joel Plasco told the Post.
mt: "Kami bukan orang yang berketengan ras," kata suami Joel Plasco kepada The Post.

src: "But would you put your children in the hands of someone you've been rude to, even if it was by mistake?
mt: "Tapi adakah anda akan meletakkan anak-anak anda di tangan seseorang yang telah anda perlakukan dengan kasar, walaupun hanya secara tidak sengaja?"

src: Your newborn baby?
mt: Bayi yang baru lahir?

src: Come on."
mt: Ayuh."

src: Likening the suit to "extortion," Plasco said his wife was just two months off having a baby and was in a "very difficult situation."
mt: Plasco membandingkan tuntutan tersebut dengan "pemerasan" dan berkata isterinya hanya dua bulan lagi bersalin dan berada dalam situasi yang "sangat sukar".

src: "You're going to go after someone like that?
mt: Kau akan mengejar orang macam tu?

src: That's not a very nice thing to do," the investment banker added.
mt: "Bukanlah itu perkara yang sangat baik untuk dilakukan," tambah penaja pelaburan tersebut.

src: While the legal case is still ongoing, the court of public opinion has been quick to denounce the couple on social media, slamming them for their behavior and logic.
mt: Manakala kes undang-undang masih sedang berlangsung, mahkamah pendapat awam telah dengan pantas menyalahkan pasangan itu di media sosial, mengutuk tingkah laku dan logik mereka.

src: Paddington publishers feared readers wouldn't relate to a talking bear, new letter reveals
mt: Penerbit buku Paddington bimbang pembaca tidak dapat berhubung dengan seekor beruang yang bercakap, menurut surat baru.

src: Bond's daughter Karen Jankel, who was born shortly after the book was accepted, said of the letter: "It's hard to put oneself in the shoes of somebody reading it for the first time before it was published.
mt: Putera Bond, iaitu anak perempuannya Karen Jankel yang dilahirkan tidak lama selepas buku itu diterima, berkata tentang surat tersebut: "Sukar untuk meletakkan diri kita dalam kasut seseorang yang membacanya untuk pertama kalinya sebelum ia diterbitkan."

src: It's very amusing knowing now what we know about Paddington's huge success."
mt: Sangat lucu untuk mengetahui sekarang apa yang kita ketahui mengenai kejayaan besar Paddington.

src: Saying her father, who had worked as a BBC cameraman before being inspired to write the children's book by a small toy bear, would have been sanguine about his work being rejected, she added the 60th anniversary of the books publication was "bittersweet" after his death last year.
mt: Mengatakan bapanya, yang telah bekerja sebagai kru kamera BBC sebelum diilhamkan untuk menulis buku kanak-kanak itu oleh seekor beruang kecil, akan bersikap tenang mengenai penolakan kerja mereka, beliau menambah bahawa sambutan ulang tahun ke-60 penerbitan buku itu menjadi "manis getir" selepas kematian beliau tahun lalu.

src: Of Paddington, whom she describes as a "very important member of our family," she added her father was quietly proud of his eventual success.
mt: Tentang Paddington, yang digambarkannya sebagai "anggota keluarga yang sangat penting", beliau menambah bahawa bapanya dengan rendah hati bangga atas kejayaan akhirnya.

src: "He was quite a quiet man, and he wasn't a boastful person," she said.
mt: "Ia seorang lelaki yang agak sunyi, dan dia bukanlah seseorang yang suka memuji diri," katanya.

src: "But because Paddington was so real to him, it was almost like if you have a child who achieves something: you're proud of them even though it's not your doing really.
mt: "Namun kerana Paddington begitu nyata baginya, ia hampir seperti apabila seorang anak berjaya mencapai sesuatu: anda bangga dengan mereka walaupun ia bukan sepenuhnya usaha anda sendiri."

src: I think he viewed Paddington's success sort of in that way.
mt: Saya rasa dia melihat kejayaan Paddington dengan cara itu.

src: Although it was his creation and his imagination, he always used to give the credit to Paddington himself."
mt: Walaupun ia adalah ciptaannya dan imaginasi beliau, beliau sentiasa memberikan pujian kepada Paddington itu sendiri.

src: My daughter was dying and I had to say goodbye over the phone
mt: Putera saya sedang sekarat dan saya terpaksa berpisah dengannya melalui telefon.

src: On landing her daughter had been rushed to Nice's Hospital Louis Pasteur 2, where doctors worked in vain to save her life.
mt: Selepas mendarat, puterinya telah dibawa ke Hospital Louis Pasteur 2 di Nice, di mana para doktor cuba menyelamatkan nyawanya tetapi dengan kekosongan.

src: "Nad was calling regularly to say it was really bad, that she wasn't expected to make it," said Mrs Ednan-Laperouse.
mt: "Nad menelefon secara berkala untuk memberitahu bahawa kesihatannya benar-benar teruk, dan dia tidak dijangka akan pulih," kata Encik Ednan-Laperouse.

src: "Then I got the call from Nad to say she was going to die within the next two minutes and I had to say goodbye to her.
mt: Kemudian saya menerima panggilan daripada Nad untuk memberitahu bahawa dia akan mati dalam masa dua minit lagi dan saya perlu berpisah dengannya.

src: And I did.
mt: Dan aku melakukannya.

src: I said, "Tashi, I love you so much, darling.
mt: Saya berkata, "Tashi, saya sangat menyayangimu, sayangan."

src: I'll be with you soon.
mt: Saya akan bersama anda segera.

src: I'll be with you.
mt: Aku akan berada bersamamu.

src: The drugs doctors had given her to keep her heart pumping were slowly petering out and leaving her system.
mt: Obat-obatan yang diberi oleh doktor untuk mengepamkan jantungnya perlahan-lahan habis dan meninggalkan sistem badannya.

src: She had died some time before hand and this was it all shutting down.
mt: Dia telah meninggal dunia beberapa waktu sebelum ini dan kini segalanya tertutup.

src: I had to just sit there and wait, knowing this was all unfolding.
mt: Saya terpaksa hanya duduk dan menunggu, mengetahui bahawa semua ini sedang berlaku.

src: I couldn't howl or scream or cry because I was in a situation surrounded by families and people.
mt: Saya tidak dapat meraung, berseru, atau menangis kerana saya berada dalam situasi yang dikelilingi oleh keluarga-keluarga dan orang ramai.

src: I had to really hold it together."
mt: Saya terpaksa benar-benar mengekalkan kendali saya.

src: Eventually Mrs Ednan-Laperouse, by now grieving for the loss of her daughter, boarded the plane alongside the other passengers - oblivious to the ordeal she was going through.
mt: Akhirnya, Puan Ednan-Laperouse, yang kini bersedih kerana kehilangan anaknya, telah menaiki pesawat bersama penumpang lain tanpa sedar akan penderitaan yang bakal dialaminya.

src: "No-one knew," she said.
mt: "Tidak ada seorang pun yang tahu," katanya.

src: "I had my head down, and tears were falling the whole time.
mt: Kepala saya tertunduk, dan air mata mengalir sepanjang masa.

src: It's hard to explain, but it was on the flight I felt this overwhelming sense of sympathy for Nad.
mt: Susah untuk diterangkan, tetapi ketika berada dalam penerbangan itu, saya merasakan satu rasa simpati yang mendalam terhadap Nad.

src: That he needed my love and understanding.
mt: Bahawa dia memerlukan kasih sayang dan fahamanku.

src: I knew how much he loved her."
mt: "Saya tahu betapa dia menyayanginya."

src: Grieving women post cards to prevent suicides on bridge
mt: Wanita yang berduka memposkan kad untuk menghalang bunuh diri di jambatan

src: Two women who lost loved ones to suicide are working to prevent others from taking their own lives.
mt: Dua wanita yang kehilangan orang yang dicintai mereka kerana bunuh diri sedang berusaha untuk mencegah orang lain melakukan perbuatan yang sama.

src: Sharon Davis and Kelly Humphreys have been posting cards on a Welsh bridge with inspirational messages and phone numbers that people can call for support.
mt: Sharon Davis dan Kelly Humphreys telah memaparkan kad-kad di atas jambatan Wales dengan mesej-mesej yang memberi inspirasi dan nombor-nombor telefon yang boleh dipanggil untuk mendapatkan sokongan.

src: Ms Davis' son Tyler was 13 when he began suffering with depression and killed himself aged 18.
mt: Anak bongsu kepada Encik Davis, Tyler, baru berusia 13 tahun apabila dia mula mengalami kesukaran dengan depresi dan meninggal dunia kerana bunuh diri pada usia 18 tahun.

src: "I don't want any parent to feel the way I have to feel everyday," she said.
mt: "Saya tidak mahu sebarang ibu bapa rasa seperti apa yang saya rasa setiap hari," katanya.

src: Ms Davis, aged 45, who lives in Lydney, said her son was a promising chef with an infectious grin.
mt: Saudara Davis, berumur 45 tahun, yang tinggal di Lydney, berkata anaknya ialah seorang jururasa yang berkebolehan dengan senyuman yang berjangkit.

src: "Everyone knew him for his smile.
mt: "Sesiapa pun mengenali dia kerana senyuman beliau."

src: They always said his smile lit up any room."
mt: "Senyumnya sentiasa menyinari sebarang bilik."

src: However, he gave up work before he died, as he was "in a really dark place."
mt: Walau bagaimanapun, beliau berhenti bekerja sebelum meninggal dunia kerana beliau berada dalam keadaan yang sangat gelap.

src: In 2014, Tyler's brother, who was 11 at the time, was the one to find his sibling after he had taken his own life.
mt: Pada tahun 2014, saudara lelaki Tyler, yang ketika itu berusia 11 tahun, adalah yang menemukan adik beradiknya selepas adik itu mengambil nyawanya sendiri.

src: Ms Davis said: "I continually worry that there's going to be a knock on effect."
mt: Saudara Davis berkata: "Saya sentiasa bimbang bahawa ia akan mempunyai kesan domino."

src: Ms Davis created the cards, "to let people know there are people out there that you can go to and you can talk to, even if it's a friend.
mt: Encik Davis telah mencipta kad tersebut untuk memberitahu orang ramai bahawa terdapat orang-orang di luar sana yang boleh anda hampiri dan bercakap dengannya, walaupun ia seorang rakan.

src: Don't sit in silence - you need to talk."
mt: Jangan duduk dalam kesunyian – anda perlu bercakap.

src: Ms Humphreys, who has been friends with Ms Davies for years, lost Mark, her partner of 15 years, not long after the death of his mother.
mt: Nyonya Humphreys, yang telah menjadi rakan dengan Nyonya Davies selama bertahun-tahun, kehilangan Mark, rakan sehidupnya selama 15 tahun, tidak lama selepas kematian ibunya.

src: "He didn't say that he was feeling down or depressed or anything," she said.
mt: "Belum tentu dia berasa sedih atau depresi atau apa-apa," katanya.

src: "A couple of days before Christmas we noticed his change in attitude.
mt: Beberapa hari sebelum Krismas, kami perbezaan perubahan sikapnya.

src: He was at rock bottom on Christmas Day - when the kids opened their presents he didn't make eye contact with them or anything."
mt: Dia berada pada titik terendah pada Hari Krismas – apabila anak-anak membukakan hadiah mereka, dia tidak membuatkan silingan mata dengan mereka atau sebarang apa pun.

src: She said his death was a huge trauma to them, but they have to work through it: "It rips a hole through the family.
mt: Dia berkata kematian beliau merupakan trauma besar buat mereka, namun mereka perlu meneruskannya: "Ia membuka lubang besar dalam keluarga."

src: It tears us apart.
mt: Ia memecahkan hati kami.

src: But we've all got to carry on and fight."
mt: "Namun, kita semua mesti terus maju dan berjuang."

src: If you are struggling to cope, you can call Samaritans free on 116 123 (UK and Ireland), email jo@samaritans.org, or visit the Samaritans website here.
mt: Jika anda sedang bergelut untuk menyesuaikan diri, anda boleh menghubungi Samaritans secara percuma di talian 116 123 (UK dan Ireland), memetik e-mel ke jo@samaritans.org, atau melawat laman web Samaritans di sini.

src: Brett Kavanaugh's future hangs in the balance as FBI begins investigation
mt: Masa depan Brett Kavanaugh bergantung pada keputusan FBI yang kini memulakan siasatan

src: "I thought, if we could actually get something like what he was asking for - an investigation limited in time, limited in scope - we could maybe bring a little unity," said Mr Flake on Saturday, adding that he feared the committee was "falling apart" amid entrenched partisan gridlock.
mt: "Saya fikir, jika kita benar-benar dapat sesuatu seperti yang diminta olehnya - satu siasatan yang dibatasi dalam masa dan ruang lingkupnya - kita mungkin boleh membawa sedikit kesatuan," kata Timbalan Ketua Jabatan Pengawas, Mr Flake, pada hari Sabtu, menambah bahawa beliau bimbang jawatankuasa itu sedang "terpecah" di tengah-tengah kebuntuan partisan yang berakar umbi.

src: Why didn't Mr Kavanaugh and his Republican supporters want the FBI to investigate?
mt: Mengapakah Encik Kavanaugh dan sokongan-parti Republiknya tidak mahu Jabatan Keselamatan Dalam Negeri (FBI) menjalankan siasatan?

src: Their reluctance is all due to timing.
mt: Ketiadaan semangat mereka adalah semata-mata disebabkan oleh masa.

src: The midterm elections are only five weeks away, on November 6 - if, as expected, the Republicans do badly, then they will be severely weakened in their attempts to get the man they want elected to the highest court in the land.
mt: Pemilihan tengah hanya lima minggu lagi, pada 6 November – jika, seperti yang dijangka, Republikans gagal, maka mereka akan terjejas teruk dalam usaha mereka untuk memilih individu yang diingini mereka ke mahkamah tertinggi di negara ini.

src: George W. Bush has been picking up the phone to call Senators, lobbying them to support Mr Kavanaugh, who worked in the White House for Mr Bush and through him met his wife Ashley, who was Mr Bush's personal secretary.
mt: George W. Bush telah mengangkat telefon untuk menghubungi para senator, menggalakkan mereka untuk menyokong Mr Kavanaugh, yang pernah berkhidmat di Putrajaya bagi Mr Bush dan melalui beliau bertemu dengan isterinya, Ashley, yang merupakan setiausaha peribadi Mr Bush.

src: What happens after the FBI produces its report?
mt: Apakah yang berlaku selepas Biro Pemburu Perjanjian Amerika Syarikat (FBI) mengeluarkan laporan mereka?

src: There will be a vote in the Senate, where 51 Republicans and 49 Democrats currently sit.
mt: Akan adaundi undian di Senat, di mana semasa ini terdapat 51 orang Republikan dan 49 orang Demokrat.

src: It's still not clear whether Mr Kavanaugh can get to at least 50 votes on the Senate floor, which would allow Mike Pence, the vice president, to break a tie and confirm him to the Supreme Court.
mt: Masih belum jelas sama ada Timbaga Kavanaugh dapat meraih sekurang-kurangnya 50 undi di dalam Dewan Senat, yang mana akan membolehkan Mike Pence, Timbalan Presiden, memecahkan keimaran dan mengesahkannya ke Mahkamah Agung.

src: North Korea defector numbers 'drop' under Kim
mt: Bilangan pelarian Korea Utara yang telah meninggalkan negara itu 'turun' di bawah pemerintahan Kim.

src: The number of North Korean defectors to South Korea has fallen since Kim Jong-un came to power seven years ago, a South Korean lawmaker has said.
mt: Jumlah pelarian dari Korea Utara ke Korea Selatan telah menurun sejak Kim Jong-un mengambil alih kuasa tujuh tahun lalu, menurut seorang ahli politik Korea Selatan.

src: Park Byeong-seug, citing data from the South's unification ministry, said there had been 1,127 defections last year - compared with 2,706 in 2011.
mt: Park Byeong-seug, merujuk kepada data daripada Kementerian Penyatuan Korea Selatan, berkata terdapat sebanyak 1,127 orang yang telah menyertai pihak Utara tahun lalu — berbanding dengan 2,706 pada tahun 2011.

src: Mr Park said tighter border controls between North Korea and China and higher rates charged by people smugglers were key factors.
mt: Ngeri Park berkata bahawa kawalan sempadan yang lebih ketat antara Korea Utara dan China serta kadar caj yang lebih tinggi oleh pengedar manusia merupakan faktor utama.

src: Pyongyang has made no public comments.
mt: Pyongyang tiada sebarang komen awam.

src: The vast majority of defectors from the North are eventually offered South Korean citizenship.
mt: Sebilangan besar pelarian dari Utara pada akhirnya ditawarkan kewarganegaraan Korea Selatan.

src: Seoul says more than 30,000 North Koreans have illegally crossed the border since the end of the Korean War in 1953.
mt: Seoul berkata lebih daripada 30,000 warga Korea Utara telah melintas sempadan secara haram sejak akhir Perang Korea pada tahun 1953.

src: Most flee via China, which has the longest border with North Korea and is easier to cross than the heavily protected Demilitarised Zone (DMZ) between the two Koreas.
mt: Sebilangan besar melarikan diri melalui China, yang mempunyai sempadan terpanjang dengan Korea Utara dan lebih mudah untuk dilintasi berbanding Zon Demiliterisasi (DMZ) yang beratih perlindungan yang terletak antara kedua-dua Korea.

src: China regards the defectors as illegal migrants rather than refugees and often forcibly repatriates them.
mt: China menganggap para pengungsi itu sebagai pelarian yang tidak sah dan sering memulangkan mereka secara paksa.

src: Relations between the North and the South - who are still technically at war - have markedly improved in recent months.
mt: Hubungan antara Utara dan Selatan - yang secara teknikal masih dalam keadaan perang - telah meningkat dengan ketara dalam beberapa bulan lepas.

src: Earlier this month, the leaders of the two countries met in Pyongyang for talks that centred on the stalled denuclearisation negotiations.
mt: Pada awal bulan ini, pemimpin kedua-dua negara berjumpa di Pyongyang bagi membincangkan perbincangan yang terhenti mengenai penanggalan senjata nuklear.

src: This came after June's historic meeting between US President Donald Trump and Kim Jong-un in Singapore, when they agreed in broad terms to work towards the nuclear-free Korean peninsula.
mt: Ini berlaku selepas pertemuan bersejarah antara Presiden Amerika Syarikat Donald Trump dan Kim Jong-un di Singapura pada bulan Jun, apabila mereka bersetuju secara umumnya untuk bekerjasama menuju kepada penjanaan Korea yang bebas nuklear.

src: But on Saturday, North Korean Foreign Minister Ri Yong-ho blamed US sanctions for the lack of progress since then.
mt: Namun pada hari Sabtu, Menteri Luar Negeri Korea Utara Ri Yong-ho menyalahkan penalti Amerika Syarikat atas kekurangan kemajuan sejak itu.

src: "Without any trust in the US, there will be no confidence in our national security and under such circumstances, there is no way we will unilaterally disarm ourselves first," Mr Ri said in a speech to the UN General Assembly in New York.
mt: "Tanpa sebarang kepercayaan terhadap AS, tidak akan ada keyakinan terhadap keselamatan negara kita dan dalam keadaan sedemikian, tiada cara bagi kita untuk memundurkan senjata secara satu hala terlebih dahulu," kata Tun Dr Mahathir dalam ucapannya di Perhimpunan Agung Perserikatan Bangsa-Bangsa di New York.

src: Nancy Pelosi calls Brett Kavanaugh "hysterical," says he is unfit to serve on the Supreme Court
mt: Nancy Pelosi memanggil Brett Kavanaugh "histerik" dan berkata dia tidak layak untuk dilayan di Mahkamah Persekutuan.

src: House Minority Leader Nancy Pelosi called Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh "hysterical" and said that he was temperamentally unfit to serve on the Supreme Court.
mt: Ketua Minoriti Dewan Perwakilan Nancy Pelosi menyebut calon hakim Mahkamah Agung, Brett Kavanaugh, sebagai "histerik" dan berkata bahawa beliau tidak sesuai secara sifat untuk berkhidmat di Mahkamah Agung.

src: Pelosi made the comments in an interview Saturday at the Texas Tribune Festival in Austin, Texas.
mt: Pelosi membuat komen tersebut dalam temubual pada Sabtu di Perhimpunan Texas Tribune di Austin, Texas.

src: "I couldn't help but think that if a woman had ever performed that way, they would say 'hysterical,'" Pelosi said about her reaction to Kavanaugh's testimony before the Senate Judiciary Committee on Thursday.
mt: "Pelosi berkata mengenai tindakannya terhadap kesaksian Kavanaugh di hadapan Jawatankuasa Perundangan Senat pada Khamis, saya tidak dapat menahan diri daripada berfikir bahawa jika seorang wanita pernah bertindak sedemikian, mereka akan menyebutnya 'histeria'."

src: Kavanaugh emotionally denied allegations that he had sexually assaulted Dr. Christine Blasey Ford when they were both teenagers.
mt: Kavanaugh menafikan dengan emosi dakwaan bahawa dia telah meluca Dr. Christine Blasey Ford apabila mereka berdua masih remaja.

src: During his opening statement, Kavanaugh was very emotional, at times nearly shouting and choking up while discussing his family and his high school years.
mt: Semasa pembukaannya, Kavanaugh sangat emosi, pada masa-masa tertentu hampir berseru dan tersesak semasa membincangkan keluarganya dan tahun-tahun sekolah menengahnya.

src: He also explicitly condemned Democrats on the committee, calling the allegations against him a "grotesque and coordinated character assassination" organized by liberals angry that Hillary Clinton lost the 2016 presidential election.
mt: Beliau juga secara terang-terangan mengutuk Democrat dalam committee tersebut, memanggil dakwaan terhadapnya sebagai "pembunuhan watak yang menjijikkan dan terancang" yang disusun oleh para liberal yang marah kerana Hillary Clinton kalah dalam pilihan raya presiden 2016.

src: Pelosi said that she believed Kavanaugh's testimony proved that he could not serve on the Supreme Court, because it showed that he is biased against Democrats.
mt: Pelosi berkata bahawa beliau percaya kesaksian Kavanaugh membuktikan bahawa beliau tidak boleh berkhidmat di Mahkamah Persekutuan, kerana ia menunjukkan bahawa beliau mempunyai bias terhadap parti Demokrat.

src: "I think that he disqualifies himself with those statements and the manner in which he went after the Clintons and the Democrats," she said.
mt: "Adalah dengan kenyataan-kenyataan tersebut dan cara dia mengejar Clinton serta Democrat-parti bahawa beliau telah membatalkan keputusannya," katanya.

src: Pelosi demurred when asked if she would try to impeach Kavanaugh if he is confirmed, and if Democrats gain the majority in the House of Representatives.
mt: Pelosi menolak untuk mengulas apabila ditanya sama ada dia akan cuba mengadil Kavanaugh jika beliau diluluskan, dan jika Demokrat berjaya menguasai majoriti dalam Dewan Perwakilan.

src: "I will say this -- if he is not telling the truth to Congress or to the FBI, then he's not fit not only to be on the Supreme Court, but to be on the court he's on right now," Pelosi said.
mt: "Saya akan mengatakan ini -- jika beliau tidak jujur kepada Kongres atau kepada FBI, maka beliau tidak layak untuk berada di Mahkamah Persekutuan, mahupun di mahkamah yang beliau pegang sekarang," kata Pelosi.

src: Kavanaugh is currently a judge on the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals.
mt: Kavanaugh kini merupakan hakim di Mahkamah Bandaran Daerah Washington D.C.

src: Pelosi added that as a Democrat she was concerned about potential Kavanaugh rulings against the Affordable Care Act or Roe v. Wade, as he is considered to be a conservative justice.
mt: Pelosi menambah bahawa sebagai seorang Demokrat, dia bimbang mengenai keputusan-keputusan Kavanaugh yang berpotensi menentang Undang-Undang Penjaminan Kesihatan Persekitaran atau keputusan Roe v. Wade, kerana beliau dianggap sebagai seorang hakim konservatif.

src: In his confirmation hearings, Kavanaugh sidestepped questions on whether he would overturn certain Supreme Court decisions.
mt: Semasa sesi pengesahan, Kavanaugh mengelakkan soalan sama ada beliau akan membatalkan keputusan Mahkamah Agung tertentu.

src: "It's not time for a hysterical, biased person to go to the court and expect us to say, 'isn't that wonderful,'" Pelosi said.
mt: "Pelosi berkata, 'Ini bukan masa untuk orang yang histeris dan bias pergi ke mahkamah dan menjangkakan kami untuk berkata, 'adakah itu hebat.'"

src: And Women Need to Wield It.
mt: Dan Perempuan Perlu Menggunakannya.

src: It is a righteous diatribe, months and years of fury spilling over, and she can't get it out without weeping.
mt: Ia adalah seruan keadilan yang panjang, amarah yang tumpah selama bermula-mula dan bertahun-tahun, dan dia tidak dapat meluaskannya tanpa menangis.

src: "We cry when we get angry," Ms. Steinem said to me 45 years later.
mt: "Kita menangis apabila kita marah," kata Nyawain Steinem kepada saya 45 tahun kemudian.

src: "I don't think that's uncommon, do you?"
mt: "Rasuah tak lah biasa, kan?"

src: She continued, "I was greatly helped by a woman who was an executive someplace, who said she also cried when she got angry, but developed a technique which meant that when she got angry and started to cry, she'd say to the person she was talking to, "You may think I am sad because I am crying.
mt: Dia meneruskan, "Saya sangat dibantu oleh seorang wanita yang merupakan eksekutif di suatu tempat, yang berkata dia juga menangis apabila marah, tetapi membangunkan satu teknik yang bermaksud apabila dia marah dan mula menangis, dia akan berkata kepada orang yang dia bercakap dengannya, 'Anda mungkin fikir saya sedih kerana saya menangis.'

src: I am angry."
mt: Saya marah.

src: And then she just kept going.
mt: Dan kemudian dia terus melangkah.

src: And I thought that was brilliant."
mt: Dan saya berfikir itu sangat hebat.

src: Tears are permitted as an outlet for wrath in part because they are fundamentally misunderstood.
mt: Air mata dibenarkan sebagai saluran bagi kemarahan sebahagian kerana ia secara asas dipelajar dengan salah.

src: One of my sharpest memories from an early job, in a male-dominated office, where I once found myself weeping with inexpressible rage, was my being grabbed by the scruff of my neck by an older woman - a chilly manager of whom I'd always been slightly terrified - who dragged me into a stairwell.
mt: Salah satu kenangan tertajam saya daripada pekerjaan awal saya, di sebuah pejabat yang didominasi lelaki, di mana saya pernah mendapati diri saya menangis dengan kemarahan yang tidak dapat diungkapkan, ialah apabila seorang wanita yang lebih tua - seorang pengurus yang sejuk dan yang sentiasa saya rasa sedikit takut - mencengkam saya dari kerongkongan dan menjerit saya ke dalam lorong tangga.

src: "Never let them see you crying," she told me.
mt: "JANGAN PERNAH BIARKAN MEREKA LIHAT KAMU BERSEMA," katanya.

src: "They don't know you're furious.
mt: "Mereka tidak tahu bahawa anda sedang marah."

src: They think you're sad and will be pleased because they got to you."
mt: Mereka berfikir anda sedang sedih dan akan gembira kerana mereka berjaya menyentuh hati anda."

src: Patricia Schroeder, then a Democratic congresswoman from Colorado, had worked with Gary Hart on his presidential runs.
mt: Patricia Schroeder, seorang ahli Kongres Parti Demokratik dari Colorado pada ketika itu, telah bekerja sama dengan Gary Hart dalam pengembaraan pencalonan presiden beliau.

src: In 1987, when Mr. Hart was caught in an extramarital affair aboard a boat called Monkey Business and bowed out of the race, Ms. Schroeder, deeply frustrated, figured there was no reason she shouldn't explore the idea of running for president herself.
mt: Pada tahun 1987, ketika Encik Hart terdedah kepada skandal persetiaan luar rumah di atas sebuah bot bernama Monkey Business dan menyingkirkan daripada pertandingan tersebut, Cik Schroeder, yang sangat frustrasi, memutuskan bahawa tiada sebab mengapa dia tidak patut meneroka idea untuk bertanding menjadi presiden sendiri.

src: "It was not a well-thought-out decision," she said to me with a laugh 30 years later.
mt: "Itu bukan keputusan yang dipikirkan dengan teliti," katanya kepada saya dengan tawa 30 tahun kemudian.

src: "There were already seven other candidates in the race, and the last thing they needed was another one.
mt: Sudah ada tujuh orang lagi pencalonan dalam pertandingan itu, dan perkara terakhir yang mereka perlukan ialah seorang lagi.

src: Somebody called it "Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs.""
mt: Seseorang menamakannya "Puteri Salji dan Tujuh Penari".

src: Because it was late in the campaign, she was behind on fund-raising, and so she vowed that she wouldn't enter the race unless she raised $2 million.
mt: Oleh kerana ia berlaku pada akhir kempen, beliau ketinggalan dalam pengumpulan dana, dan oleh itu beliau berjanji bahawa beliau tidak akan memasuki pertandingan itu melainkan beliau berjaya mengumpul dana sebanyak $2 juta.

src: It was a losing battle.
mt: Itu adalah satu perpadahan yang hilang.

src: She discovered that some of her supporters who gave $1,000 to men would give her only $250.
mt: Dia mendapati bahawa sesetengah penyokongnya yang akan memberikan $1,000 kepada lelaki hanya akan memberikannya $250.

src: "Do they think I get a discount?" she wondered.
mt: "Adakah mereka menyangka saya mendapat diskaun?" dia terfikir.

src: When she made her speech announcing that she would not launch a formal campaign, she was so overcome by emotions - gratitude for the people who'd supported her, frustration with the system that made it so difficult to raise money and to target voters rather than delegates, and anger at the sexism - that she got choked up.
mt: Apabila beliau membuat ucapan pengumuman bahawa beliau tidak akan melancarkan kempen rasmi, beliau begitu diliputi oleh emosi – rasa syukur kepada mereka yang telah menyokongnya, kekecewaan terhadap sistem yang menjadikan pengumpulan dana dan menjejaki pemilih sangat sukar berbanding delegasi, serta kemarahan terhadap seksisme – sehingga beliau tersesak-sesak.

src: "You would have thought I'd had a nervous breakdown," recalled Ms. Schroeder about how the press reacted to her.
mt: "Seolah-olah saya telah mengalami gangguan saraf," kata semula Puan Schroeder mengenai bagaimana media membalas tindakannya.

src: "You'd have thought Kleenex was my corporate sponsor.
mt: Anda mungkin berfikir Kleenex adalah hos korporat saya.

src: I remember thinking, what are they going to put on my tombstone?
mt: Saya teringat terfikir, apakah yang akan mereka letakkan pada nisan saya?

src: "She cried"?""
mt: "Baginya menangis?"

src: How the US-China trade war may be good for Beijing
mt: Bagaimana Perang Dagang AS-Cina Mungkin Menguntungkan Beijing

src: The opening salvos of the trade war between the US and China were deafening, and while the battle is far from over, a rift between the countries may be beneficial to Beijing in the long term, experts say.
mt: Serangan pembuka perang dagangan antara AS dan China itu bergema keras, dan walaupun pertempuran itu jauh daripada tamat, jurang yang wujud antara kedua-dua negara tersebut mungkin menguntungkan Beijing dalam jangka panjang, menurut pakar-pakar.

src: Donald Trump, the US President, fired the first warning earlier this year by taxing key Chinese exports including solar panels, steel and aluminium.
mt: Presiden AS, Donald Trump, telah mengeluarkan amaran pertama pada awal tahun ini dengan mengenakan cukai kepada eksport utama China termasuk panel solar, keluli, dan aluminium.

src: The most significant escalation rolled in this week with new tariffs affecting $200 billion (£150 billion) worth of items, effectively taxing half of all goods coming into the US from China.
mt: Perkairan yang paling penting telah berlaku minggu ini dengan mengenakan cukai baharu yang menjejaskan barang bernilai $200 bilion (£150 bilion), yang secara berkesan mengenakan cukai kepada separuh daripada semua barang yang masuk ke Amerika Syarikat dari China.

src: Beijing has retaliated each time in kind, most recently slapping tariffs of five to ten per cent on $60 billion of American goods.
mt: Pekong telah membalas setiap kali secara setimpal, sekali lagi mengenakan cukai penguatkuasaan sebanyak lima hingga sepuluh peratus terhadap $60 bilion barang Amerika Syarikat.

src: China has pledged to match the US shot-for-shot, and the world's second largest economy is unlikely to blink anytime soon.
mt: China berjanji untuk membalas secara beransur-ansur, dan ekonomi kedua terbesar di dunia tidak mungkin akan berkedip seketika.

src: Getting Washington to back down means caving into demands, but publicly bowing to the US would be far too embarrassing for Xi Jinping, China's president.
mt: Menyerah kepada Washington bermaksud mengalah terhadap tuntutan, tetapi secara terbuka mematuhi Amerika Syarikat akan menjadi sangat memalukan bagi Xi Jinping, presiden China.

src: Still, experts say if Beijing can play its cards right, US trade war pressures could positively support China over the long term by lowering the inter-dependence of the two economies.
mt: Walaupun demikian, para pakar berkata bahawa jika Beijing memainkan kad-kadnya dengan betul, tekanan perang perdagangan AS boleh menyokong China dalam jangka panjang dengan mengurangkan ketergantungan ekonomi antara kedua-dua negara.

src: "The fact that a quick political decision in either Washington or Beijing could create the conditions that start an economic tailspin in either country is actually a lot more dangerous than onlookers have acknowledged before," said Abigail Grace, a research associate who focuses on Asia at the Center for New American Security, a think tank.
mt: "Kenyataan bahawa keputusan politik yang pantas di Washington atau Beijing boleh mewujudkan keadaan yang mencetuskan kejatuhan ekonomi di mana-mana negara sebenarnya jauh lebih berbahaya daripada yang diakui oleh pemerhati sebelum ini," kata Abigail Grace, seorang ahli kajian yang berfokus pada Asia di Pusat Keselamatan Amerika Baharu, sebuah institusi pemikir.

src: Syria 'ready' for refugees to return, says Foreign Minister
mt: Syria 'siap' bagi pengungsi kembali, kata Menteri Luar

src: Syria says it's ready for the voluntary return of refugees and is appealing for help to rebuild the country devastated by a more than seven-year long war.
mt: Syria berkata ia sedia menerima kembali para pelarian secara sukarela dan menggesa bantuan untuk memulihkan negara yang telah hancur akibat lebih daripada tujuh tahun perang.

src: Speaking to the United Nations General Assembly, Foreign minister Walid al-Moualem said conditions in the country are improving.
mt: Berucap di Perhimpunan Agung Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu, Menteri Luar Negeri Walid al-Moualem berkata keadaan di negara ini sedang bertambah baik.

src: "Today the situation on the ground is more stable and secure thanks to progress made in combating terrorism," he said.
mt: "Hari ini, keadaan di tanah lebih stabil dan selamat berikutan kemajuan dalam memerangi keganasan," katanya.

src: The government continues to rehabilitate the areas destroyed by terrorists to restore normalcy.
mt: Pemerintah meneruskan usaha memulih kawasan yang hancur akibat serangan teroris untuk memulihkan keadaan normal.

src: All conditions are now present for the voluntary return of refugees to the country they had to leave because of terrorism and the unilateral economic measures that targeted their daily lives and their livelihoods.
mt: Semua syarat kini hadir untuk pengembalian sukarela pelarian ke negara yang mereka tinggalkan disebabkan oleh kemusnahan dan langkah ekonomi sepihak yang menjejaskan kehidupan harian dan penghidupan mereka.

src: The UN estimates that more than 5.5 million Syrians have fled the country since the war began in 2011.
mt: Menurut anggaran Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu (PBB), lebih daripada 5.5 juta orang Syria telah melarikan diri dari negara tersebut sejak peperangan bermula pada tahun 2011.

src: Another six million people still living in the country are in need of humanitarian assistance.
mt: Enam juta lagi penduduk negara masih memerlukan bantuan kemanusiaan.

src: Al-Moualem said the Syrian regime would welcome help in rebuilding the devastated country.
mt: Al-Moualem berkata bahawa rejim Syria akan menyambut baik bantuan dalam membina semula negara yang hancur itu.

src: But he stressed that it would not accept conditional assistance or help from countries that sponsored the insurgency.
mt: Namun, beliau menekankan bahawa ia tidak akan menerima bantuan atau pertolongan bertentangan daripada negara-negara yang menyokong pemberontakan.

src: Europe clinches Ryder Cup victory in Paris
mt: Eropah menawan kemenangan dalam Kejohanan Ryder di Paris
