src: Team Europe has won the 2018 Ryder Cup defeating Team USA by a final score of 16.5 to 10.5 at Le Golf National outside Paris, France.
mt: Pasukan Eropah telah menewaskan Pasukan Amerika Syarikat dalam Piala Ryder 2018 dengan skor akhir 16.5 ke 10.5 di Le Golf National, di luar Paris, Perancis.

src: The US has now lost six consecutive times on European soil and has not won a Ryder Cup in Europe since 1993.
mt: AS kini telah tewas enam kali berturut-turut di tanah Eropah dan tidak pernah menewaskan Piala Ryder di Eropah sejak tahun 1993.

src: Europe regained the crown as the Danish captain Thomas Bjorn's team reached the 14.5 points they required to beat the United States.
mt: Eropah berjaya merebut kembali gelaran tersebut apabila pasukan kapten Denmark, Thomas Bjorn, mencapai 14.5 mata yang diperlukan untuk mengalahkan Amerika Syarikat.

src: US star Phil Mickelson, who struggled most of the tournament, plunked his tee-shot into the water at the par-3 16th hole, conceding his match to Francesco Molinari.
mt: Bintang Amerika Syarikat, Phil Mickelson, yang mengalami kesulitan sepanjang kejohanan, memukul pukulan awal padanya ke dalam air di lubang ke-16 yang berpari-3, mengizinkannya kalah kepada Francesco Molinari.

src: The Italian golfer Molinari shined in all of his rounds, becoming 1-of-4 players to ever go 5-0-0 since the tournament's current format begun in 1979.
mt: Pelagari Itali, Molinari, berprestasi cemerlang dalam semua pusingannya, menjadi salah satu daripada empat pemain yang pernah mencatatkan rekod 5-0-0 sejak format semasa kejohanan ini dimulakan pada tahun 1979.

src: American Jordan Spieth was blown out 5&4 by the lowest-ranked player on the European team, Thorbjorn Olesen of Denmark.
mt: Jordan Spieth dari Amerika Syarikat telah dikalahkan dengan keputusan 5&4 oleh pemain darjah rendah dalam pasukan Eropah, Thorbjorn Olesen dari Denmark.

src: The world's top-ranked player, Dustin Johnson, fell 2 and 1 to Ian Poulter of England who may have played in his final Ryder Cup.
mt: Rangking teratas dunia, Dustin Johnson, tewas dengan perbezaan 2 dan 1 kepada Ian Poulter dari England yang mungkin bermain dalam Edisi Terakhir Piala Ryder.

src: A veteran of eight Ryder Cups, Spaniard Sergio Garcia became the tournaments all-time winningest European with 25.5 career point.
mt: Seorang veterana lapan Piala Ryder, Sergio Garcia dari Sepanyol menjadi juara separa profesional bagi Eropah dengan rekod mata kerjaya 25.5.

src: "I don't usually cry but today I can't help it.
mt: Saya biasanya tidak menangis, tetapi hari ini saya tidak dapat menahan air mata.

src: It's been a rough year.
mt: Tahun ini agak sukar.

src: So thankful for Thomas to pick me and believe in me.
mt: Sangat bersyukur kepada Thomas kerana memilih saya dan mempercayai saya.

src: I am so happy, so happy to get the cup back.
mt: Saya sangat gembira, sangat gembira untuk kembali mendapat cawan itu.

src: It's about the team., and I'm happy I was able to help," said an emotional Garcia following the European victory.
mt: "It's about the team, dan saya gembira kerana saya berjaya membantu," kata Garcia yang terharu selepas kemenangan di Eropah.

src: He passes the torch to his fellow countryman John Ram who took down US golf legend Tiger Woods 2&1 in singles play on Sunday.
mt: Beliau telah menyerahkan tongkat estafet kepada rakan sebangsanya, John Ram, yang mengalahkan legenda golf Amerika Syarikat, Tiger Woods, dengan skor 2 & 1 dalam permainan tunggal pada hari Ahad.

src: "The incredible pride I feel, to beat Tiger Woods, I grew up watching that guy," said 23-year-old Rahm.
mt: "Kebanggaan yang tidak ternilai yang saya rasakan, kerana berjaya mengalahkan Tiger Woods, kerana saya besar menonton pemain itu," kata Rahm yang berumur 23 tahun.

src: Woods lost all four of his matches in France and now has a record of 13-21-3 career Ryder Cup record.
mt: Woods tewas dalam keempat-empat permainannya di Perancis dan kini mempunyai rekod kerjaya Piala Ryder 13-21-3.

src: A strange statistic by one of the greatest players of all-time, having won 14 major titles second to only Jack Nicklaus.
mt: Satu statistik yang aneh oleh salah seorang pemain terhebat sepanjang masa, yang telah memenangi 14 gelaran besar, terunggul hanya selepas Jack Nicklaus.

src: Team USA struggled all weekend to find the fairways with the exception of Patrick Reed, Justin Thomas and Tony Finau, who played high-calibre golf throughout the entire tournament.
mt: Pasukan USA mengalami kesukaran sepanjang minggu untuk menjejakkan bola ke dalam fairway, kecuali bagi Patrick Reed, Justin Thomas dan Tony Finau yang bermain golf pada tahap yang sangat tinggi sepanjang keseluruhan kejohanan.

src: US captain Jim Furyk spoke after a disappointing performance for his squad, "I'm proud of these guys, they fought.
mt: Ketua jurulatih Amerika Syarikat, Jim Furyk, berkata selepas prestasi mengecewakan pasukan beliau, "Saya bangga dengan pemain-pemain ini, mereka telah berjuang."

src: There was time this morning when we put some heat on Europe.
mt: Tadi pagi, kami memberikan tekanan kepada Eropah.

src: We scrapped.
mt: Kita dibuang.

src: Hats off to Thomas.
mt: Berseluruh ke Thomas.

src: He is a great captain.
mt: Dia seorang kapten yang hebat.

src: All 12 of his players played very well.
mt: Semua 12 pemainnya bermain dengan sangat baik.

src: We'll regroup, I'll work with the PGA of America and our Ryder Cup Committee and we'll move forward.
mt: Kita akan berkumpul semula, saya akan bekerja bersama PGA Amerika dan Jawatankuasa Piala Ryder, dan kita akan bergerak ke hadapan.

src: I love these 12 guys and I'm proud to serve as captain.
mt: Saya amat cinta kepada 12 orang ini dan saya bangga berkhidmat sebagai kapten.

src: You have to tip your cap.
mt: Anda perlu menghargai.

src: We got outplayed."
mt: Kita kalah kerana ditimpa kekalahan."

src: Red Tide Update: Concentrations decrease in Pinellas, Manatee and Sarasota
mt: Kemas kini Gelombang Merah: Konsentrasi berkurang di Pinellas, Manatee dan Sarasota

src: The newest report from the Florida Fish and Wildlife Commission shows a general decrease in Red Tide concentrations for parts of the Tampa Bay area.
mt: Laporan terkini daripada Suruhanjaya Ikan dan Haiwan liar Florida menunjukkan penurunan am dalam kepekatan Air Merah bagi sebahagian kawasan Teluk Tampa.

src: According to the FWC, patchier bloom conditions are being reported in areas of Pinellas, Manatee, Sarasota, Charlotte and Collier counties - which suggests decreasing concentrations.
mt: Menurut FWC, keadaan berbunga yang lebih bercorak dilaporkan di wilayah-wilayah wilayah Pinellas, Manatee, Sarasota, Charlotte dan Collier – yang menunjukkan paras pekatn yang menurun.

src: A bloom the Red Tide extends approximately 130 miles of coastline from northern Pinellas to southern Lee counties.
mt: Sebuah blooming yang dihasilkan oleh Red Tide merentasi kira-kira 130 batu pesisir, membentang dari wilayah Pinellas Utara ke wilayah Lee Selatan.

src: Patches can be found about 10 miles offshore of Hillsborough County, but at fewer sites relative to last week.
mt: Pecahan boleh didapati kira-kira 10 batu darat di luar pesisir County Hillsborough, tetapi di lebih sedikit tapak berbanding minggu lepas.

src: Red Tide has also been observed in Pasco County.
mt: Gelombang merah juga telah diperhatikan di Pasco County.

src: Medium concentrations in or offshore of Pinellas County have been reported in the past week, low to high concentrations offshore of Hillsborough County, background to high concentrations in Manatee County, background to high concentrations in or offshore of Sarasota County, background to medium concentrations in Charlotte County, background to high concentrations in or offshore of Lee County, and low concentrations in Collier County.
mt: Kadar sederhana dilaporkan di atau di luar pinggir Pinellas County, kadar rendah hingga tinggi di luar pinggir Hillsborough County, kadar latar belakang hingga tinggi di Manatee County, kadar latar belakang hingga tinggi di atau di luar pinggir Sarasota County, kadar latar belakang hingga sederhana di Charlotte County, kadar latar belakang hingga tinggi di atau di luar pinggir Lee County, dan kadar rendah di Collier County.

src: Respiratory irritation continues to be reported in Pinellas, Manatee, Sarasota, Lee, and Collier counties.
mt: Iritasi pernafasan dilaporkan secara berterusan di wilayah-wilayah Pinellas, Manatee, Sarasota, Lee, dan Collier.

src: Respiratory irritation was not reported in Northwest Florida over the past week.
mt: Iritasi pernafasan tidak dilaporkan di bahagian utara Florida pada minggu lepas.
